Name: Astrea Group
Description:
At AstreaGroup, we do business differently.

We are a premium B2B solutions provider operating across the GCC, China, and the United States, delivering exceptional services in trading, contracting, furniture, interior design, joinery, uniforms, and promotional products. 
Our business model is built on efficiency, transparency, and specialization, offering our clients a single point of contact for diverse needs without sacrificing quality or control.

Our unique structure allows each division to operate with expert focus while remaining fully integrated under one unified brand. This means clients benefit from specialist-level service in every area, be it interior design, hospitality supplies, office & IT equipment, uniforms, or complex procurement, without the inefficiencies of managing multiple vendors.

We take pride in delivering projects on time and on budget, whether it’s custom furniture manufacturing, large-scale fit-out, contracting, or sourcing mission-critical supplies. With in-house production facilities in Dubai and Qatar, our ability to design, manufacture, and deliver faster and more cost-effectively than competitors is a core advantage.

Our clients include government agencies, schools, oil & gas companies, hotels, property managers, and military entities. From concept to completion, we deliver value with integrity, backed by a team of highly skilled professionals with deep market knowledge and a no-excuses approach to execution.

When others say “No,” we say “Yes, we can.”

Let us handle your operational complexity—so you can focus on growing your business.

Name: Groupe Finadorm
Description:
Créer et innover pour se différencier sur des produits durables et utiles ! Telle est une des caractéristiques communes à chaque activité du Groupe. Loin de parier sur l’éphémère, nous répondons à des besoins sur le long terme, dans les différents secteurs d’activité que nous couvrons : fabrication et distribution de literie, aménagement d'espace pour les professionnels de la petite enfance, habitations légères de loisir ou encore charpentes et constructions bois sont toutes faites pour durer au-delà des modes passagères. Et pourtant, nous avons su conserver un temps d’avance sur nos concurrents et proposer des produits toujours plus modernes, toujours plus ingénieux.

Nous cultivons cette énergie et cet esprit de bâtisseurs d’entreprises depuis 40 ans au sein de Finadorm. Chaque entreprise du Groupe provient à l’origine d’une activité artisanale émanant du travail du bois. Fortes de leur esprit d’indépendance et de leur créativité, nous avons consolidé leurs bases artisanales en leur fournissant les moyens nécessaires à leur croissance. Ainsi, nous les avons alliées à notre puissance industrielle et grâce à cela, nous avons pu déployer leurs savoir-faire pour proposer une offre toujours plus exigeante, réactive et adaptée à nos clients.

Name: Impacto S.A.
Description:
En 1982 nace IMPACTO S.A, la marca que revolucionaría el concepto del confort y el diseño, ofreciendo desde ese entonces, productos de calidad para un Paraguay que crece cada día con mayores exigencias. 

Al visitar la fábrica, el cliente no sólo encuentra muebles para todos los ambientes, sino que además del trato personal, recibe un asesoramiento especializado a fin de satisfacer todas sus necesidades. 

El grupo IMPACTO S.A está formado por 5 divisiones: 
• Impacto Home 
• Impacto Corporativo 
• Impacto Colchones 
• Impacto Industrial 
• Impacto Obras Civiles 

IMPACTO S.A es hoy en día también una de las empresas de mayor crecimiento en la elaboración de Espumas de Poliuretano, para diferentes usos, como son los colchones, camas sommier, almohadas, cortes para tapicería, entre otros. 

En la planta fabril y salón de exposición, trabajan directamente alrededor de 300 personas, que día a día dan lo mejor de ellas para producir lo más variados productos, brindando así un óptimo resultado. 

Desde hace 43 años, IMPACTO S.A se estableció dentro del mercado  paraguayo, rápidamente fue posicionándose como el referente de entre las empresas del rubro mobiliario, situación que además de enorgullecer, compromete a toda la organización a seguir trabajando día a día en satisfacer a los numerosos clientes que buscan a través IMPACTO S.A , mejorar su ESTILO DE VIDA.

Name: TONON S.p.A.
Description:
Design since 1926
 
Tonon is one of the best known international brands in the world of chairs and tables, reliable and synonymous for design and quality “made in Italy”. Characterizing features that come from the past: their origins date back to the Twenties, many years of careful and creative craftsmanship. After that came the industrialisation of the Fifties with a remarkable production increase. The pleasure of”thinking and making” however never failed. Tonon today bases itself on research and experience, on cultural and marketing factors, on new materials and new technologies. All with a craftsmansheart and an industrial mind, a combination ensuring a better life while seated, whether relaxing, working, or at the table.
 
Design technology
 
Tonon products have as a common denominator the ability to enhance interior decoration. Even if romantic or classical rather than innovative or trendy, they are always original proposals, never ordinary, characterized by a contemporary idea and by a developed technology. Products conceived and destined for international markets and cultures, for ways of life and daily living very different from each other. Products made equal by good taste, sensitivity, elegance and regularly presented at the international top Furniture Fairs: Milan, Köln,
 London, Rotterdam, Stockholm, Moskow, Kiev, Miami, Las Vegas, Dubai, Bahrein. In several inexhaustible combinations of shape, finish and fabric.

Name: MOLISSEA
Description:
Jesteśmy producentem mebli tapicerowanych na indywidualne zamówienie klienta. W głównej mierze współpracujemy z klientami hurtowymi, architektami, salonami sprzedaży, z rynkami zagranicznymi, hotelami. Posiadamy meble dla osób, które cenią sobie wygodę oraz elegancję.

Dlaczego nasze meble? Ponieważ nasze produkty tworzymy sami od podstaw, począwszy od szkieletu, a kończąc na obiciu tapicerskim. Do produkcji mebli, staramy się stosować komponenty wyższej jakości. Dobrym przykładem jest niezaniżanie jakości pianki na siedziskach, konstrukcja stelaży z mocniej sklejki, z płyty wiórowej, tkaniny z topowych hurtowni, itp.

Co proponujemy? Produkujemy tapicerowane łóżka, sofy, narożniki, fotele, krzesła, leżanki, ławeczki, szafki nocne, komody, wnęki, itd... Naszą szczególną zaletą są produkty w stylu Chesterfield, co potęguję ekskluzywność naszej firmy. Produkty są wykonane z należytą starannością, co zachwyca każdego, kto na nie spojrzy.

Dlaczego akurat my? Ponieważ w naszych produktach nie zauważycie Państwo żadnych niedociągnięć. Staramy się, aby klient był zachwycony naszym wyrobem.

Name: DHARMA. Artisan geometry
Description:
DHARMA. Artisan geometry


En febrero de 2023, durante el proceso de preparación de un evento en Marrakech con nuestro equipo de Mabrouka events (www.mabrouka.es;  IG: @mabroukabcn) nos topamos con estas novedosas técnicas de fabricación artesanal de mobiliario.

Se trata de una versión renovada de una artesanía milenaria, conocida como taracea o bone inlay: incrustaciones de hueso, pero también de cuerno, nácar y otros materiales sobre bases de madera, formando diseños florales altamente complejos.

Recientemente se ha venido introduciendo en los talleres de artesanos de la Medina de Marrakech la resina como elemento novedoso en esta técnica. Y fue ahí en ese momento donde llamó nuestra atención.

Tras más de 20 años fabricando e importando todo tipo de muebles y artesanía de estilo oriental para nuestros eventos desde Marruecos, Egipto o Indonesia, entre otros, vimos un atisbo de vanguardia entre todas aquellas flores y filigranas en resina blanca.

Decidimos desarrollar esas técnicas aplicadas a maderas nobles autóctonas como el nogal, el cedro o el naranjo y hacerlo con patrones modernos y con colores diferentes y atrevidos en las resinas. Así nació DHARMA. Artisan geometry: todo tipo de muebles a medida, con múltiples patrones geométricos y colores a elegir, para aportar un toque diferente a alguna estancia de tu casa. Para romper la monotonía de la decoración de tu hogar pero con elegancia, equilibrio y armonía… Y con calidad artesana: cada pieza está hecha con los mejores materiales disponibles y a mano en un complejo proceso en varios talleres especializados.

En abril empezamos a comercializar a pequeña escala algunas unidades de nuestros primeros 14 prototipos. Ahora nos lanzamos con todo, como siempre hemos hecho en Mabrouka, con pasión, entusiasmo y amor por el detalle, a vivir esta nueva e increíble aventura.

El equipo de Mabrouka.

Name: Sit in peace
Description:
Sit in peace réinvente notre rapport à la mémoire sous toutes ses formes grâce à un concept unique : le Banc de Mémoire.

Ce mobilier poétique et intemporel, conçu et fabriqué en France, trouve naturellement sa place dans nos espaces du quotidien. Il devient un objet porteur de sens, capable de raconter une histoire, d’honorer un souvenir, ou de préserver un patrimoine immatériel pour les générations futures.

Chaque banc, orné d’une plaque en bronze personnalisée, incarne une trace vivante : celle d’un être cher, d’un lieu, d’une époque, ou d’un engagement collectif. Ensemble, ces bancs composent une cartographie sensible de nos mémoires, un patrimoine partagé à ciel ouvert.

 Notre vision
Nous rêvons d’un monde où la mémoire ne serait plus un devoir, mais une envie : celle de raconter, de transmettre et de relier. La mémoire comme source de lien, d’inspiration et d’émerveillement.

 Notre mission
Faire du banc de mémoire un symbole universel de transmission et de rencontre. En démocratisant ce symbole, nous souhaitons créer des espaces d’émotion et de partage, où la mémoire individuelle nourrit la mémoire collective.

Name: RUM TIL MAGI
Description:
INDRETNING TIL LEG & LÆRING

Indretning påvirker os dybt, uanset om vi er bevidste om det eller ej. RUM TIL MAGI skaber indretning med en stærk hensigt, en unik specialdesignet indretning der forholder sig specifikt til den pædagogik der skal foregå, og som skaber den ønskede atmosfære, stemning og følelse hvor man trives, føler sig tryg og mødt.

I RUM TIL MAGI arbejder vi med konceptet om rummet som den tredje pædagog og "dit rum, din DNA". Det betyder, at rum og indretning fungerer som et pædagogisk værktøj, der vil frigive tid og overskud i hverdagen. Det er vigtigt for os at skabe fortryllende rum og inspirerende omgivelser, vi er stolte af og kan stå inde for, og hvor jeres DNA er omsat til rum. For vores største ambition er at gøre en forskel for trivslen og balancen i hverdagen.

Rum og indretning påvirker os på et dybt plan. Hvordan vil I påvirkes? Det er et omfattende spørgsmål. Et spørgsmål som vi vil tage på vores skuldre og hjælpe jer i mål med at besvare. 
Det er vores løfte til jer.


I er velkomne til at besøge websitet, samt at følge vores Instagram @Rumtilmagi, hvor du kan få tips og tricks til selv at skabe magi i dine omgivelser 

https://www.instagram.com/rumtilmagi/

Name: Kenz Bahrain
Description:
Kenz Furnishing W.L.L is a leading furnishing and decor company in the Kingdom of Bahrain which creates custom furniture and accessories. Our unique, statement designs are the epitome of ‘bespoke’ – adorning our customers’ home, offices and other spaces to reflect their signature style.
Since our establishment in 2007, we have provided customers with products and services that fulfill their needs, match their comfort and exceed their expectations. Starting with a range of top-of-the-line curtains, blinds and wallpapers, we have successfully expanded our presence and grown our range of products and services allowing us to provide complete interior fit out and design solutions. 

With each passing year, our company has added to its portfolio, earning a stellar reputation for being a top-tier provider of completely customized interiors in Bahrain, with products being exported to clients in Saudi Arabia, too. Kenz now has a showroom located in Tubli and an expansive production facility at Askar supported by an ever-growing team and unmatched manpower which enables us to execute large-scale fit out projects. Our level of skill, craftsmanship and attention to detail has resulted in some of the most welcoming interiors that are both: aesthetically-appealing and highly functional.

Our growing base of customers now includes some of the most renowned hospitality venues, corporate brands, banks, hospitals, schools and luxury housing properties in the Kingdom of Bahrain. This is in addition to our retail operation which caters to residents.

With our dedicated team and approach to close collaboration, you’re sure to achieve the most exuberant result for your home or business.

Nuestro lineal abarca más de 1.000 modelos de muebles para todos los ambientes del hogar, equipamientos para oficinas, obras edilicias y exhibidores comerciales que generan una exposición destacada para productos de consumo masivo en los puntos de venta y showrooms.

El arduo trabajo, el esfuerzo, la confianza en nuestros colaboradores, la responsabilidad social y empresarial, seriedad comercial, entre muchas otras más!
Transmitiendo nuestros valores corporativos que desde el inicio son y continuarán siendo: el respeto, la honestidad, la transparencia y el compromiso. 
Legado que buscamos trascender desde EMC Fábrica de Muebles y familia Casanova a las siguientes generaciones. 

Mirando un poco al futuro, 
Nuestra premisa es continuar  innovando para ofrecer a clientes y usuarios productos de mayor valor agregado.
Mediante la incorporación de tecnología a los procesos industriales, operativos, comerciales y logísticos, además de nuevos productos, accesorios y materiales que se enfocan en las necesidades de los mismos.
Nos apasiona poder crear soluciones que brinden a nuestros clientes un diferencial cualitativo. Que nos permita ser una organización competitiva a nivel mundial. 


VAMOS POR MUCHO MÁS!

Description:

Name: Astin Yatak
Description:
Founded in 2012, our company produces mattresses, plinths and headboards under the name of ‘Astin Bed’. Our company, which has gained the appreciation of customers in a very short time, has become a leading company by growing day by day. Astin Mattress provides a healthy sleep as well as comfort and quality to its users.


Astin Mattress attaches importance to R & D studies in order to develop the products it produces and to apply the developing technology both in the products and in the production facility. The goal of Astin Mattress R&D studies is to integrate the products that users may need in and around the bed into the products produced under our brand and to find more benefits than the expected or targeted benefit in our products.


The bed is the product that the person is in contact with the most among the household products. For this reason, the primary goal of our company is hygienic production and consequently hygienic delivery. The aim is to ensure that the user's personal bed reaches immaculate as a result of health and hygiene requirements.

Name: Fantasy Furniture & Fabricators
Description:
Fantasy Furniture was established in the year 1998, over a decade has a well-equipped manufacturing industry in Indore (Madhya Pradesh) for manufacturing customised Modular Furniture using engineered wood boards such as MDF, HDHMR, Boilo, Particle Board etc. Our expertise in designing and building modular furniture includes, but is not limited to modular kitchens, wardrobes, office furniture, retail showroom furniture and bespoke home interior furniture.
We are committed to delivering the best quality, with procurement of the most suitable raw material from the best brands available and training our team to work with precision and technique following the ergonomics standards to meet every expectation of our esteemed customers. Our approach is client-centric, we design and manufacture the products as per their specifications, in terms of size, design, pattern and style prioritising utility and comfort.
In the past 25 years, we have accomplished many projects, making us more capable of handling complexities and completing our projects on time under the guidance of our founders Mrs Neelima Bapna who is an industrial engineer and Mr Shirish Bapna who is an electrical engineer. Over the years they have developed a set of control systems for all steps in the process, from incoming material to production, delivery and installation. We are happy that our premium quality adds value to your living space.

Name: MEZGEC d.o.o.
Description:
MEZGEC d.o.o. is a leading family-owned company with over 40 years of deep experience designing, developing, and manufacturing high-quality upholstered products. Founded in 1979 as a craft workshop, we have evolved and adapted to the contemporary market by shifting our focus to the development of innovative products and serial manufacturing. We heavily invest in digitalization, innovative materials, and sustainable practices to remain at the forefront of the industry.
We are experts in upholstery craftsmanship, employing cutting-edge technologies like industrial CNC cutting, 3D scanning, CAD modeling, and parametric design. Our pipelines include reverse engineering, 3D-to-2D conversion, and pattern digitalization, further ensuring top-tier quality and efficient manufacturing.
Our specialty areas include the recreational vehicle (RV), nautical, automotive, and sports industries and providing interior solutions for public institutions such as conference and sports halls, theaters, hotels, universities, and hospitals. 
We pride ourselves on our ability to provide solutions to many Slovenian and foreign companies supplying world markets. Despite the challenges in the Slovenian textile and wood industry, we have consistently proven our ability to excel in this field while keeping an eye on future trends.

Name: Creativentures Incorporated
Description:
At TubeStyle, we believe that furniture should do more than fill a space — it should define it. Based in Bengaluru, we specialize in custom-built furniture solutions for hospitality, commercial, and premium residential spaces across India.

With over 20 years of industry experience, we’ve partnered with leading architects, interior designers, and brands to create furniture that blends function, durability, and aesthetics — built to perform and made to last.

What sets us apart? Everything is crafted in-house. Our 40,000 sq. ft. manufacturing unit houses teams for metal fabrication, woodwork, upholstery, powder coating, assembly, and quality control — ensuring that every piece is thoughtfully made and precisely delivered. We take pride in our collaborative process, working closely with design teams from sketch to final install.

From luxury breweries to fine-dine restaurants and concept cafés, we’ve contributed to iconic spaces like LUPA, Dali & Gala, Golden Circle, Toit, Ironhill, Mirage, and Maize & Malt, delivering furniture that responds to each brand’s identity and spatial needs.

Our services include:
 Custom furniture design & production
 Prototyping & technical development
 White-background product photography
 Site-based installations
 Collaboration with architects & design studios

At TubeStyle, we value precision, transparency, and long-term partnerships. Whether you need 10 pieces or 100, we bring the same level of detail, consistency, and care to every project.

Let’s build something meaningful, together.

 Bengaluru, India
 www.instagram.com/tubestyle.blr/

Name: KÖK mobiliario

Todas las personas, y familias, son únicas, con sus inquietudes, preferencias y necesidades, por este motivo creemos que KÖK tiene un producto y una respuesta eficiente que pueda satisfacer las necesidades pretendidas y adaptadas a la economía de cada uno.

Te invitamos a conocer por qué KÖK es la mejor opción a la hora de realizar tu proyecto.

Name: Trendel SRL
Description:
Más de 40 años de trayectoria en la industria de la salud. Diseñamos,  fabricamos  y comercializamos sillones articulados para tratamientos médicos.

Descripción larga o resumen: En Trendel, nos dedicamos al diseño, fabricación y comercialización de sillones articulados para tratamientos médicos. 

Trabajamos todos los días para diferenciarnos del estilo tradicional de los equipos médicos que, a menudo, se asocian con experiencias poco placenteras. Ponemos un fuerte énfasis en el diseño de productos que prioricen la comodidad del paciente. Creemos firmemente que el bienestar del paciente es fundamental y trabajamos arduamente para ofrecer un entorno cómodo y acogedor durante los tratamientos médicos.

Nuestro valor diferencial radica en la comercialización exclusiva de sillones para la salud. Colaboramos estrechamente con profesionales médicos, clínicas y hospitales para ofrecer soluciones adaptadas a las necesidades específicas de cada entorno de atención médica.

En Trendel, pretendemos marcar la diferencia en la industria de la salud. Nuestros sillones articulados combinan funcionalidad, diseño y confort, brindando a los profesionales médicos y a los pacientes una opción única y agradable.

Uníte a nosotros en nuestro compromiso de proporcionar soluciones innovadoras que priorizan el confort y el bienestar de cada paciente. Juntos, podemos redefinir la forma en que los tratamientos médicos se realizan, mejorando la experiencia de los pacientes y elevando los estándares de atención médica.

Name: Barakat Industry
Description:
At Barakat for Industry, we specialize in creating and supplying superior quality furniture for institutional, office, and school environments. Our expertise isn't limited to manufacturing, as we believe in providing comprehensive solutions to our clients. We understand that every space has its unique character, which is why we also offer bespoke interior design services that seamlessly integrate with our product offerings.

With a keen eye for detail and a deep understanding of spatial aesthetics, our design team works closely with clients to bring their vision to life. We ensure our furniture not just fulfills functional needs but also contributes to creating an atmosphere that fosters productivity, creativity, and comfort.

From the initial design concept to the final installation, we manage every step with precision and professionalism. Whether it's a corporate office that needs a contemporary edge or a school area that requires a playful and conducive learning environment, we provide tailor-made solutions that align with the specific needs and aesthetic preferences of our clients.

We take pride in crafting custom pieces that are not just furniture, but essential elements of a cohesive, well-designed space. Partner with us and discover how we can transform your spaces with our unique blend of quality furniture and custom interior design services.

Name: Donatpan Interior Fit-Out and Furnishings
Description:
1994 yılında kurulmuş ve kaliteden ödün vermeden müşterilerine en iyiyi sunmaya çalışan Donatpan Mobilya, önümüzdeki yıllara da aynı hizmet anlayışı ile merhaba diyor. Bir çok kurum ve kişi referansları bulunan Donatpan Mobilya; tasarımlarıyla en iyiyi sunma yolunda emin adımlarla ilerlemektedir.

Donatpan Mobilya bugün yılların bilgi ve tecrübesinin birikimiyle, her geçen gün gelişen teknolojiyle üretimini, hizmetini ve vizyonunu küresel boyutlarda yenileyerek ve geliştirerek faaliyetlerini sürdürmektedir. Güvenilir, yenilikçi ve özgün çözümler geliştiren, pazarlayan, uygulayan ve destekleyen yapısı ile Türkiye’nin önde gelen mobilyacı firması olarak faaliyetlerini sürdürmeye devam edecektir.

Donatpan Mobilya ürünlerini kendisi temin eder ve seçeneklerini siz değerli müşterilerine sunar. Tecrübeli kadrosuyla müşteri ilişkilerini daima sıcak tutmayı hedefler. İlgilendiğiniz her hangi bir konuyla ilgili küçük de olsa bilgi almak için aradığınız takdirde, Donatpan Mobilya ailesinden tüm sorunlarınızla ilgilenecek ve sizi yönlendirebilecek bir müşteri temsilcimizle görüşebilirsiniz.

Name: Mono Design Mobilya
Description:
Mono Design Mobilya, sektöründe tasarım ürünlerin üretimi üzerine uzmanlığı ve gelişime açık vizyonu ile İç Mimar, Tasarımcı ve müşterilerinin tercihi olmaya devam ediyor. 

Mimari projeler için anahtar teslim çözümler üreten Mono Design, şimdiye kadar otel, okul, fabrika, spor kompleksi, konut kompleksleri, restoran ve mağaza gibi birçok proje talebini başarıyla uygulamıştır.

Mono Design ailesi olarak, 1984 yılında mütevazi bir atölyede başlayan yolculuğumuza, bugün itibariyle 3.000 m² kapalı alanda, 50’ye yakın personelimiz ile birlikte üretime gururla devam etmekteyiz.

Name: Aster Cucine Türkiye
Description:
İçimde neler hissettiğimi anlayabilir misin?
Biz, sevmediğimiz alanlarda kendimizi göstermek istemiyoruz.
Teknoloji, teknik, işlevsel mükemmellik, ergonomi, hareketler…
Bu alanları sevmiyoruz çünkü bizim için bunlar zaten olması gereken şeyler.
Mükemmellik DNA’mızda var, ama biz daha fazlasını hedefliyoruz.

Araştırma ve pazarlama, tüketiciyi rasyonel ve kararlı bir birey olarak anlamaya takıntılı görünüyor — mantıklı ve düşünülmüş seçimler yapabilen biri.
Ama Aster’de biz böyle düşünmüyoruz.

İçimde neler hissettiğimi anlayabilir misin?
İşte bu yüzden Aster, bugün sevgi ve saygının kusursuz birleşimidir.
İşte bu yüzden her koleksiyonumuz duygular uyandırabilir, kendi hikâyesini anlatabilir, hayatımızın ve geçmişimizin, bugünümüzün ve geleceğimizin bir parçası olabilir.

Keşfedecek çok şey var.
Yazar Maya Angelou’nun da söylediği gibi:
“İnsanlar ne söylediğinizi ve ne yaptığınızı unutabilir, ama onlara ne hissettirdiğinizi asla unutmazlar.”

Name: Comfort Oasis Furniture Limited
Description:
We specialize in custom made office and home furniture and fittings such as storage cabinets, chairs, tables, ward robes, kitchen units and ceilings.
On request we do home and work space renovations and supply imported furniture and other goods.

Name: Eme Ambientes
Description:
Somos especialistas em transformar espaços em soluções inteligentes e esteticamente impecáveis, impulsionando a organização, funcionalidade e o bem-estar. 

Oferecemos:

Marcenaria Corporativa: Projetos personalizados de móveis para escritórios, salas de reuniões, recepções e áreas comuns, criando ambientes profissionais e inspiradores que aumentam a produtividade e o engajamento dos colaboradores.

Marcenaria para Áreas Comuns de Prédios: Soluções completas para halls de entrada, áreas de lazer, academias, bicicletários e outros espaços, garantindo organização, funcionalidade e beleza estética, valorizando o patrimônio do condomínio.

Atendimento Personalizado: Uma equipe experiente de arquitetos, designers e marceneiros à disposição para entender suas necessidades e desenvolver projetos sob medida, atendendo a todos os seus requisitos.

Materiais de Alta Qualidade: Utilizamos materiais premium e duráveis, garantindo móveis robustos e com longa vida útil, que exigem pouca manutenção.

Acabamentos Impecáveis: Cuidamos de cada detalhe para entregar móveis com acabamentos impecáveis e design inovador, que valorizam o ambiente e a imagem da sua empresa ou condomínio.

Compromisso com a Sustentabilidade.
Adotamos práticas ecologicamente corretas em todo o processo de produção, desde a seleção de materiais até a destinação final dos resíduos.

Entre em contato conosco e descubra como podemos transformar seus espaços em ambientes inteligentes e funcionais que contribuem para o sucesso do seu negócio ou condomínio.

Name: Giraud Menuiserie
Description: Entreprise artisanale créée en 2004 specialisée dans la fabrication sur mesure de mobilier d'agencement .

Name: This End Up Furniture Co., Inc.
Description:
This End Up Furniture Company. was founded in Raleigh, North Carolina by two students from North Carolina State University. The Company and its furniture were an immediate success and widely accepted throughout North Carolina and surrounding states. The founders sold the Company to Melville Corporation in 1988. Under Melville, the Company grew to over 240 mall based stores nationwide. In 1998, Melville Corporation sold the company to Citicorp Venture Capital. By 2000, despite growing sales, the Company encountered financial problems that led to bankruptcy and the liquidation of its assets.

The new owner purchased the intellectual property in October of 2000 and established manufacturing operations in the spring of 2001. Since then, the new Company has grown into a 250,000 square foot manufacturing plant and offers substantially all furniture items offered by the original Company as well as several new lines of furniture.

Please call in advance to schedule a plant tour or stop by just to say hello!

Name: FORESPAN SA
Description: Forespan, S.A., es un reconocido fabricante de mobiliario. Forespan posee los medios mas avanzados, así como una amplia experiencia, adquirida a lo largo de sus casi 50 años de actividad, en fabricación de grandes series de mobiliario destinado a múltiples sectores, tanto en mercado nacional como internacional. En Forespan fabricamos todo tipo de mobiliario en serie para centros educativos, oficinas, hoteles, residencias, hospitales... siendo nuestra principal actividad la fabricación de mobiliario escolar a través de licitación pública, lo cual es una muestra de nuestra capacidad, al ser un sector muy exigente en cuanto a calidades y capacidad de producción.

Name: Kids' Station Outdoor
Description:
Kids’ Station designs and manufactures high-quality children’s play and activity products in the U.S.A. Our products are built with the highest standards of safety, durability, and functionality, creating engaging environments where children can play, learn, and grow with confidence.

We proudly serve schools, childcare centers, churches, and families through a network of authorized dealers, with products available for shipment across the 48 contiguous United States.

All Kids’ Station manufactured products are backed by a lifetime limited warranty, giving our customers long-term confidence in their investment. 

At Kids’ Station, we’re committed to delivering dependable, purpose-built play solutions designed to last.

Name: EMIR the trademark of Emmerich Holdings Ltd and Emmerich (Berlon) Ltd
Description:
For decades the EMIR trademark has been associated with British manufacturing of the highest quality, strength and durability. Emir cutting tables and jewellers' benches are sought after by designers, theatre companies and museums; and our workbenches are found in thousands of schools and higher education establishments. 
EMIR began life in 1932, quickly earning a reputation for the craftsmanship that went into its range of wooden planes and other quality hand tools.
The name has been associated with hand-tool manufacture since 1852, when manufacturing began in the town of Remscheid, Germany. The Bermondsey, London, workshop was established by Friedrich Wilhelm Emmerich.
In addition to tools, the Bermondsey Company manufactured a simple, general-purpose craft workbench and over the following 80 plus years, EMIR has manufactured thousands of workbenches for schools and colleges throughout the UK and for some 40 other countries.

Name: PROLAM
Description: PROLAM изработва кухненски плотове, маси, стъпала и подпрозоречни первази, които предефинират пространствата, за да ги превърнат в мечтаните места за живеене и работа, съчетаващи по безупречен начин индивидуалността, елегантността, естетиката и комфорта.

Name: iROKO
Description: iROKO Defines you, we understand furniture is more than just a functional item. We design furniture according to your space and requirements. We offer a wide range of customized office, home, and other institutional furniture you require. We are based in Dhaka. We also provide interior designs and consultations.

Name: atKOT
Description: @KOT is a concept that stands for innovation, sustainability and comfort in student housing. Find out how we are changing the standard and providing students with a home that exceeds their expectations.

Name: BedparkHome
Description:
Hem iş fikrimizin hem de yatak endüstrisindeki geçmişimizin uzun senelere dayanması logomuzdaki hayat ağacının köklerinde kendisini gösteriyor.  Hayat ağacının çok uzun yıllardır hemen hemen her düşünce sistemi, din ve akımda benimsenmiş olması, BEDPARK’in uluslar arası ve kültürler arası bir firma oluşunu gösteriyor.

Doğal, organik ve inovatif ürünlerde uzmanlaşmamız bizim hayat ağacımızın  gövdesinde uzun yıllar dünyayı koruma ve gelecek nesillere temiz bir dünya bırakma  felsefemizi temsil ediyor. Hayat ağacının dallarında, yapraklarında ve gölgesindeki  koşulsuz verme erdemi BEDPARK’in sosyal bir firma olma amacını çok güzel  gösteriyor. Ve ağaçların gökyüzünün uzanabileceği yere kadar özgür büyüme fırsatı , BEDPARK’in emek verdikçe büyüme ufkunu gökyüzü kadar genişletiyor.

Şimdi,  siz değerli müşterilerimiz ile kendi hayat ağaçlarımızı oluşturup koca bir orman olma vakti. Size özenle sunmaya çalıştığımız katalog ürünlerimizi beğeneceğinizi umuyor, sizlerle birlikte çalışmayı sabırsızlıkla bekliyoruz.

Name: Sof Furniture Private Limited
Description:
SOF Furniture Private Limited Is One of India’s Leading Furniture Manufacturer and Exporter Based in India. Our Manufacturing Unit is located in Rajkot, Gujarat (India) and the state-of-the-art factory spread over 5 acres of land in a developed industrial zone.  SOF is equipped with not only the latest technology and machinery but having futuristic flexibility parameters.
Our Product Design Team is Continuously using Innovative Designs and ideas for providing stylish and Elegant Designs with the changing trends to our customer expectations.
With Our Expertise of over 2 decades, we are manufacturing a wide range and variety of Office Furnitures, Hospital Furnitures, Institutional Furnitures and Home Furnitures. We also Provide the turnkey solutions. Our Production Process comprises of Various Quality Control Checkpoints from stage of raw material selection, material Inward till Each and every Crucial Manufacturing Process up to the stage of Packaging of the product.
We are Certified with ISO 9001: 2015 for the quality Management System & ISO 14001:2015 for the environmental Standards.
Our Products are available to our customers through our distributors and dealers’ network across India.

Name: SpaceE Furnitech
Description: SpaceE Furnitech (I) Pvt. Ltd. - Innovators in custom panel-based furniture, blending automation with craftsmanship for premium residential and commercial spaces. Committed to innovative design solutions, we cater to a B2B client base, partnering with design houses and conglomerates with modular furniture requirements, providing tailored solutions.

Name: Primigenius
Description:
O princípio da Primigenius é a concepção colectiva. Desde o início, a prática consiste nas virtudes da troca, cruzando ideias, esforço comum, conhecimento compartilhado e entusiasmo. 

Acreditamos numa arquitectura social envolvida. Esta abordagem é alimentada pelos inúmeros projectos elaborados ao longo dos últimos anos, e por uma atenção constante à qualidade dos produtos desenvolvidos.

Com amor, tudo o que fazemos!

Name: Kupsch Schwimmbadtechnik GmbH
Description:
Rein von der Definition her ist eine Oase ein Vegetationsfleck in der Wüste, üblicherweise an einer Wasserstelle gelegen.

Umgangssprachlich ist der Begriff das Synonym für einen Ort, an dem der Mensch Ruhe, Entspannung und Erfrischung findet.

Dafür müssen Sie nicht extra in die Wüste reisen, wir verwirklichen Ihre persönliche Oase in Ihrem Zuhause.

Name: Rajdhani Crafts Industries Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Rajdhani Crafts Industries Pvt. Ltd. is one of the fastest growing manufacturers of wooden furniture and handicraft items, with a vast range of furniture, wood flooring, fixtures, hardware, and accessories to spice up your surroundings. Rajdhani Crafts produces durable and well-crafted furniture ranges for its design-conscious customers.

Today, Rajdhani Crafts manufactured furniture is both exquisite and exclusive. Under our umbrella, we have the manpower of around 4,000 passionate designers, brilliant craftsmen, and master connoisseurs for the manufacturing and export of premium designer furniture.

Our highly skilled and dedicated team has over 50 years of experience in sourcing, purchasing, designing, and implementing cutting-edge technology, making us one of the best, most advanced, and most integrated manufacturing facilities, with a Pro-Tech Plant & Machinery setup for wood crafting. We are a one-stop solution for all your interior needs related to furniture and accessories for your living room, dining room, bedroom, kitchen, bathroom, office, etc.

INFRASTRUCTURE:
It is our vast infrastructure that has enabled us to be what we are today. We are proud of our gradual growth and presently, we own the following infrastructure:-
•	Numerous manufacturing units are established in India and Nepal.
•	Display floor area of 200,000 square meters.
•	Modern Automatic Machinery imported from Europe.
•	28 wood seasoning plants, processing a capacity of 6,000 cbm per month.
•	Production Capacity of more then 150 high cube containers per month.
•	The door's manufacturing capacity is 1,00,000 pcs per month.
•	We have our own packaging material manufacturing units.
•	We have around 4,000 skilled workers and supervisory staff.

QUALITY ASSURANCE:
We design and create high-quality furniture at very affordable prices - but not at the expense of our planet, or the people who work hard to make the products. Our specially-trained Quality Guardians make sure of it.

Name: Avery Furniture
Description:
PT. AVERY SENTOSA INDONESIA adalah perusahaan kena pajak (PKP) yang telah berdiri sejak tahun 2016  dan bergerak dibidang furnitur dengan brand Avery Furniture seperti kursi kantor, kursi manager, meja, lemari, dipan, serta berbagai furnitur lain untuk kantor, rumah sakit, hotel, penginapan, public spaces, dan lain-lain. Kami juga menerima custom furniture sesuai kebutuhan anda.

Produk dari Avery Furnitures telah tersebar di beberapa kota di seluruh indonesia dan akan terus berkembang menjadi perusahaan yang lebih baik. Kami selalu mengutamakan kepuasan pelanggan, inovasi, dan keunggulan dalam segala hal yang kami lakukan.

Dapatkan katalog dan penawaran menarik dengan menghubungi tim project Avery melalui email gallery.averyproject@gmail.com

Name: Abdul’s grand pride furnitures
Description: At Abdul Grand Pride Furniture, we are dedicated to crafting high-quality, affordable, and stylish furniture pieces tailored to the needs of modern living. Founded by a young student entrepreneur with a passion for design and innovation, our mission is to combine craftsmanship with creativity to deliver comfort, durability, and elegance. From classic designs to contemporary trends, we build furniture that transforms houses into homes.

Name: RO Design Co.
Description:
Welcome to RO Design Co, where we redefine the artistry of furniture design and production. With an unwavering commitment to quality craftsmanship and innovative design, we specialize in creating exquisite pieces that seamlessly blend functionality, aesthetics, and sustainability.

At RO Design, we believe that furniture should be more than just functional; it should reflect the personality and style of its owner. That's why our team of skilled artisans and designers meticulously handcraft each piece, ensuring unparalleled attention to detail and craftsmanship in every creation.

From contemporary minimalist designs to timeless classics, our diverse portfolio encompasses a wide range of styles to suit every taste and space. Whether you're furnishing a cozy living room, a modern office space, or a luxurious dining area, we have the perfect piece to elevate your environment.

In addition to our dedication to craftsmanship, we prioritize sustainability in every aspect of our production process. We source our materials responsibly, utilizing eco-friendly and ethically sourced wood, fabrics, and finishes whenever possible. By prioritizing sustainability, we aim to not only create beautiful furniture but also contribute to a healthier planet for future generations.

Customer satisfaction is at the heart of everything we do. Our team is committed to providing exceptional service, from the initial design consultation to delivery and beyond. We work closely with each client to understand their unique vision and requirements, ensuring that every piece we create exceeds expectations.

Experience the difference of artisanal craftsmanship and timeless design with RO Design. Elevate your space with furniture that tells a story and stands the test of time. Discover the perfect blend of form, function, and sustainability with us today.

Dâfne Furniture & ONUA Premium Pet Furniture are the brands of our company.

Name: Qingdao Chaoran Household Products Co., Ltd.
Description:
Qingdao Chaoran Household Products Co., Ltd is an expert in manufacturing and exporting furniture, including solid wood/bent plywood/Panel furniture for home/school/company usage, suitable for both adults and kids. Our product range includes solid wood furniture and bent plywood furniture and Panel Furniture. 
Customized products are acceptable. 
The head office is located in Qingdao city, only 20 minutes from the airport. Our factory is in Jiaozhou city, one hour's drive from the office, and one hour's drive to Qingdao Air-port.
Welcome to visit us!

Name: Aseres Fabrica Integral
Description: Fábrica integral de muebles enfocada en el equilibrio entre diseño, producción y logística. Tiene como objetivo brindar soluciones en el rubro de la arquitectura, el interiorismo y la construcción. Cuenta con diferentes equipos de trabajo: carpintería, lustres y laqueados, herrería, tapicería.

Name: Atelier Artizan
Description: Atelier Artizan is a Design House and Vertically Integrated USA manufacturer crafting handmade luxury outdoor furniture engineered to last generations.

Name: MDS Mobilya
Description:
MDS Mobilya, yaşamın bulunduğu her mekanı daha çağdaş hale getirmek için çevre dostu teknolojileri kullanarak ekonomik ve yüksek kaliteli malzemelerle çalışmaktadır. "Koşulsuz müşteri mutluluğu" ilkesini benimseyen firma, değişim ve yenilenme programıyla bu hedefe ulaşmayı amaçlamaktadır.

MDS Mobilya, güçlü yerel tedarik zinciri ve uluslararası satın alma gücü sayesinde yüzlerce markanın binlerce ürününü ticari ve kurumsal zanaatkar müşterileriyle buluşturmaktadır. Ayrıca uygun ödeme koşulları ve avantajlı alışveriş fırsatları sunarak müşterilerine kolaylık sağlamaktadır. Şirket, satış ve satış sonrası servis anlayışıyla da müşterilerinin memnuniyetini ön planda tutmaktadır. Güleryüzlü personeliyle birlikte, müşterilerin aradıkları her ürünü rahatlıkla bulabilecekleri alternatifler sunmaktadır.

MDS Mobilya, son teknolojiye sahip makina parkuru ve deneyimli ekibiyle yarı mamül üretim yapmaktadır. Bu sayede müşterilerinin tüm ihtiyaçlarına kolayca ulaşmalarını sağlamaktadır. Şirketimiz, müşteri odaklı yaklaşımıyla yenilikleri takip ederek sürekli olarak kendini geliştirmektedir.

Name: Mag Furniture
Description: MAG is a premier manufacturer and provider of high-end wooden solutions, dedicated to transforming residential and commercial spaces through exceptional craftsmanship and innovative design. With a focus on quality and durability, we specialize in delivering tailored woodwork that blends functionality with modern aesthetics.

Name: Menuiserie Ordonez générale SA
Description:
Fondée il y a 30 ans, notre société n’a cessé d’évoluer au fil des années, jusqu’à devenir une des entreprises leader dans le secteur de la menuiserie intérieure et extérieure pour toute la région Jura et Jura Bernois.

Grâce à notre personnel qualifié et notre expérience sur les projets de petites et de grandes envergures, nous sommes à même de mener à bien toutes les étapes pour que vos idées deviennent réalité.

Name: Phuc My Gia
Description:
Shouguang Sanyang Wood Industry Co., Ltd was established in 2002 in Shouguang City, Shandong Province, China, with four factories producing raw materials and finished wood products, with a total area of 250,000 m2. With more than 3,000 workers, Shouguang Sanyang factory is a leading unite in China's furniture export industry with sales of over 500 containers per month. Up to now, Sanyang - Phuc My Gia has present in 7 countries worlwide (including manufacturing factories and trading companies). 
In 2019, in order to develop scale, the company's Board of Directors opened three more manufacturing factories in Vietnam. Located in Tan Binh Industrial Park, Tan Binh commune, Tan Uyen Binh Duong. Including: Sanyang Vietnam Furniture Company Limited (Factory 1 & Factory 2), Goldenland Vietnam Furniture Company Limited. With a total area of three factories over 100,000 m2 and more than 4,000 employees. In a short time, the company's export sales have reached thousands of billions of VND (particular in 2022 , two factories Sanyang 1 and Sanyang 2 reached export sales of more than 3,500 billions of VND). At the end of 2022, with the direction of the company's Board of Directors, Phuc My Gia Co., Ltd. was established, with the goal of becoming a furniture development and trading unit for the Vietnamese domestic market, aiming to become one of the leading manufacturing, suppling, constructuring and installing units with Melamine Faced Chipboard solutions in the domestic market. With an extremely modern production line, experience and available resources, Phuc My Gia believes to bring a very lively, safe living space, guaranteed to bring satisfaction to customers.
Location: Thu Duc, Ho Chi Minh City

Name: The Holo Store
Description:
Welcome to The Holo Store!

At The Holo Store, we specialize in creating unique, high-quality products that bring joy and charm to your everyday life. From personalized gifts to premium kids' room décor, we offer a wide range of items designed to add warmth, creativity, and style to your space.

Our mission is to deliver beautifully crafted products that make your moments memorable, all while providing exceptional customer service and attention to detail. With a commitment to quality and innovation, The Holo Store is your destination for thoughtful, one-of-a-kind finds.

Name: MEZGEC d.o.o.
Description:
MEZGEC d.o.o. is a leading family-owned company with over 40 years of deep experience designing, developing, and manufacturing high-quality upholstered products. Founded in 1979 as a craft workshop, we have evolved and adapted to the contemporary market by shifting our focus to the development of innovative products and serial manufacturing. We heavily invest in digitalization, innovative materials, and sustainable practices to remain at the forefront of the industry.
We are experts in upholstery craftsmanship, employing cutting-edge technologies like industrial CNC cutting, 3D scanning, CAD modeling, and parametric design. Our pipelines include reverse engineering, 3D-to-2D conversion, and pattern digitalization, further ensuring top-tier quality and efficient manufacturing.
Our specialty areas include the recreational vehicle (RV), nautical, automotive, and sports industries and providing interior solutions for public institutions such as conference and sports halls, theaters, hotels, universities, and hospitals. 
We pride ourselves on our ability to provide solutions to many Slovenian and foreign companies supplying world markets. Despite the challenges in the Slovenian textile and wood industry, we have consistently proven our ability to excel in this field while keeping an eye on future trends.

Name: AM SMART LTD
Description:
AM Smart is a group of companies specializing in shopfitting solutions across Europe. 

We are really well organized. If we were not, we would not be able to handle projects in over 600 stores annually, across Europe. We operate in 12 countries, and our coordinators are fluent in 14 languages.

Today, we boast an agile network of subcontractors in China, Taiwan, Ukraine, and Turkey, where we produce components for all our major projects. Our partners are state-of-the-art and cost-optimized factories.

For smaller, shorter runs, including prototypes and jobs requiring swift turnaround times, we leverage our in-house carpentry and metalwork division, located near Gorzow Wielkopolski,  equipped with state-of-the-art CNC machines and run by a highly skilled and experienced production team.

Our network of local installation teams and coordinators allows us to swiftly identify opportunities and maintain flexibility in terms of design, scale, and lead times.

Our subsidiaries outside the European Union provide us with considerable flexibility in managing customs duties and offering payments in local currencies. 

AM Smart is a team of experienced professionals ensures short turnaround times and operating efficiency. Our own fleet of vehicles and proven installers guarantee quick and comprehensive project delivery on a turnkey basis.

At AM Smart, we value self-reliance and derive immense satisfaction from successfully solving problems. We continually strive to provide our customers with better, more durable solutions, expanding our service offerings and prioritizing product quality. Day after day we demonstrate that nothing is impossible.

Name: Rabi Mobilya
Description:
Rabi Mobilya: Yaşam alanlarına değer katan tasarımlar. Beyond Furniture.

Bu, Rabi Mobilya'nın tek ve resmi LinkedIn Kurumsal Hesabıdır. 

2016 yılında Konya’nın Selçuklu ilçesinde kurulan Rabi Mobilya, mobilya imalatı ve E-Ticaret alanında faaliyet gösteren lider markalardan biridir. Kuruluşundan itibaren istikrarlı bir büyüme gösteren şirket, bugün 10.000 m² üretim alanı ve 8.000 m² depolama alanı ile toplam 18.000 m²’lik bir tesiste faaliyetlerini sürdürmektedir.

Rabi Mobilya, modern üretim anlayışını temel alarak Akıllı Fabrika (Smart Factory) yaklaşımını benimsemiştir. Üretim süreçlerinde Endüstri 4.0 standartlarına uyum sağlayan şirket; makinelerde canlı verimlilik takibi, gerçek zamanlı üretim analizi ve robot destekli paketleme sistemleriyle operasyonel verimliliğini sürekli geliştirmektedir. Tüm ürünler, TSE EN 9000 ve ISO 9001 kalite standartlarına uygun şekilde üretilmektedir.

Şirket, mobilya sektöründe kalite, dayanıklılık ve fonksiyonelliği bir araya getiren ürün portföyüyle hem yurt içi hem de yurt dışı pazarda güçlü bir konuma sahiptir. Rabi Mobilya, Türkiye ve İngiltere başta olmak üzere Avrupa’nın birçok ülkesine E-Ticaret kanalları üzerinden doğrudan satış gerçekleştirmektedir.

Rabi Mobilya’nın misyonu, müşterilerine modern, estetik ve uzun ömürlü mobilyaları ulaşılabilir fiyat–kalite dengesiyle sunmak; vizyonu ise global pazarda sürdürülebilir bir marka olarak değer yaratan, yenilikçi ve teknoloji odaklı bir şirket olmaktır. Müşteri memnuniyeti, kalite ve sürekli iyileştirme gibi temel prensipler doğrultusunda faaliyetlerine devam etmektedir.

Name: Madeira's Design
Description:
Na Madeiras Design, projetamos e executamos soluções exclusivas, onde o design e a funcionalidade se encontram em cada detalhe. 

Com mais de 30 anos de experiência em soluções para cozinhas personalizadas, desenvolvemos também roupeiros, portas e artigos de mobiliário sobre medida.

Tire a sua ideia do papel. Peça o seu orçamento e receba uma proposta sob medida para o seu projeto.

Name: A-MIX
Description:
Долговечность мебели A-MIX - основной девиз нашей команды.
Как это достигается? Все просто.
Первое - команда, в которой опытные мастера со стажем работы от 10 до 22 лет в компании.
Второе - используется немецкая и австрийская фурнитура.


За 30 лет успешной работы, наша компания зарекомендовала себя как профессиональный изготовитель корпусной мебели.

Самое главное для нас и наших клиентов - качество. Мы используем материалы, комплектующие и фурнитуру от передовых производителей.

Name: barko
Description:
A Barko é uma marca portuguesa especializada no fabrico de mobiliário e gestão de obra, com mais de 20 anos de experiência acumulada em projetos nacionais e internacionais. Atuamos com uma abordagem chave-na-mão, criando soluções completas, personalizadas e com forte identidade estética e funcional.

Com uma equipa multidisciplinar e uma estrutura produtiva própria, a Barko assume cada projeto de forma integrada — da ideia à execução final — simplificando o processo para o cliente e garantindo qualidade em cada detalhe.

Name: ATELIERS BONHOURE
Description:
Les Ateliers Bonhoure ont une expérience de plus de sept ans dans l’ébénisterie et la menuiserie d’Art auprès de divers prescripteurs (institutions, communes, particuliers, …) intervenant à la fois dans la réalisation de projets mais aussi dans leur conception et leur suivi. 


L’entreprise s’oriente depuis 2020 vers la restauration de monuments historiques avec des premiers chantiers importants comme à la Chapelle Royale de Rodez en restauration de peinture sur bois puis à la Chapelle Sainte-Anne de Toulouse en 2022 pour la restauration des menuiseries et mobiliers bois tout comme à l’Eglise Notre-Dame-du-Taur depuis septembre 2023. Nous avons également restauré deux retables classés dont celui de Camurac (11) qui a été reposé en décembre 2023.

Name: Quest Living LLP

Name: Agencement Menuiserie Historique
Description:
AMH - Agencement Menuiserie Historique, tout est dans le titre. 

Une entreprise de menuisiers qui s'affaire dans toute l'Ille et Vilaine à agencer et restaurer votre patrimoine, que ce soit dans vos plus beaux châteaux, manoirs, maisons ou appartement. Notre terrain de jeux est la complexité tant dans la conception que dans la réalisation. 

Notre conception de l'agencement est qu'il faut mettre nos techniques et nos compétences aux services de votre créativité, et si vous en manquez, on sera vous accompagner en vous proposant les meilleurs matériaux pour votre projet. 

Pour la menuiserie en patrimoine, là nous sommes plutôt du genre traditionnaliste… nettement moins créatif. Faut dire que nos ancêtres nous ont largement prémâchés le travail sur les techniques d'usinage et d'assemblage. Alors nous façonnons dans la même tradition des bois indigène comme les chênes, châtaignés, hêtres, érables, robiniers…

Muutama keskisuomalainen yrittäjä ajatteli kuitenkin, että on sääli haaskata ammattitaitoisen henkilöstön pitkään kartuttama, suuri osaamispääoma, tehtaalla käyttövalmiina olevat erinomaiset koneet ja laitteet sekä keskeisellä paikalla oleva liiketila. Niinpä he päättivät yhdistää voimansa ja käynnistää toiminnan uudelleen.

Näin ollen laadukkaat ja ympäristöystävälliset sairaaloiden, päiväkotien, koulujen ja muiden julkisten tilojen kalusteet löytyvät jatkossakin tutulta paikalta – Erica Kaluste Oy:ltä.

Nuestra misión es trascender las expectativas de nuestros clientes a través de la combinación perfecta entre funcionalidad y estética en cada pieza que ofrecemos. Trabajamos con proveedores de renombre internacional y mantenemos rigurosos estándares de calidad para asegurarnos de que cada mueble que sale de nuestras instalaciones sea una verdadera obra maestra.

En Mueblería AKIRO, valoramos las relaciones a largo plazo y nos enorgullecemos de la confianza que nuestros clientes han depositado en nosotros a lo largo de los años. Estamos comprometidos con la innovación constante y el crecimiento, buscando siempre superar nuestros logros pasados y explorar nuevas oportunidades en el emocionante mundo del diseño y la distribución de muebles.

Únete a nuestra red en LinkedIn para estar al tanto de nuestras últimas novedades, proyectos emocionantes y para formar parte de nuestra comunidad de amantes del diseño y la decoración! Juntos, continuaremos creando espacios que inspiran, enriquecen y transforman vidas.

Name: Handahl Design
Description:
Af pædagoger - til pædagoger
Idéen til vores produkter opstod, fordi vi så og mærkede et behov for at gøre arbejdsmiljøet bedre for os selv og vores kollegaer. Ifølge Gigtforeningen har hele 70% af alle pædagoger haft smerter eller ubehag i ryggen eller lænden indenfor det seneste år - og vi tilhører selv denne statistik. Gigtforeningen har også lavet en undersøgelse der viser, at folk med rygsmerter eller rygsygdomme har 2,6 ekstra sygedage om året, så der er et stort behov for at gøre noget, for at undgå at vi som pædagogisk personale bliver nedslidte. Det er dette behov blandet med vores egen erfaring med nedslidte kroppe, der ligger til grund for vores påklædningsmøbler. Vi ønsker at skabe mere arbejdsglæde for vores kollegaer og være med til at mindske sygefraværet. 

God ergonomi
Først og fremmest er vores ergonomiske påklædningsmøbler med til at passe på det pædagogiske personales kroppe. Når børnene skal have tøj af og på, sikrer vores møbler korrekte arbejdsstillinger, så man undgår vrid i ryggen og nakken. Skulder og lænd bliver også skånet, da man med vores møbler kan sidde korrekt eller stå op.

En model til ethvert behov
Vi ved, at der er stor forskel på garderober. Derfor har vi også forskellige modeller, som passer til forskellige institutioner. Vi har store modeller til store garderober med mange børn, vi har modeller der kan hænges på en væg, nogle er fritstående og kan flyttes rundt, og så har vi vores sammenklappelige og foldbare modeller, som er særligt udviklet til dagplejere og institutioner med små garderober, hvor pladsen er trang. Derudover kan vores modeller vælges med enten 2 eller 3 trin. Modellerne med 2 trin er tiltænkt børnehavebørn, mens modeller med 3 trin er beregnet til vuggestuebørn.

Name: unWOOD
Description:
At unWOOD, our mission is bold: 
•	to build durable, strong products that withstand any climate
•	without cutting down natural forests 
•	using low carbon/carbon negative inputs and processes in doing so.
We believe durability is the foundation of sustainability. Products that last longer consume fewer resources, create less waste, and protect the planet.

What makes unWOOD unique lies in two breakthroughs:
Wood-like Strength, Without Wood
For the first time globally, we have engineered a material made from plastic waste whose flexural modulus is comparable to natural wood
Solving the Hardest Plastic Waste Problem
We use commingled (mixed) plastic waste—one of the most difficult and costly waste streams to recycle—and transform it into high-performance, long-life material.
Using our proprietary and patented) technology, we convert plastic waste into 𝐌𝐚𝐜𝐫𝐨-𝐌𝐨𝐥𝐞𝐜𝐮𝐥𝐚𝐫 𝐅𝐢𝐛𝐞𝐫 𝐌𝐚𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐱 (𝐌𝐌𝐅𝐌) materials that is water-resistant, termite-proof, weather-proof, and built for decades of use.

What we offer today:
• Outdoor furniture for public and private spaces
• Fencing and planters for landscaping
• Sustainable, durable school furniture
Coming soon: Workstations and pallets
Who we serve:
Hospitality (resorts, community spaces, amusement parks)
Government & contractors (public and tourist infrastructure)
MNCs & corporates (sustainability-first campuses)
CSR & NGOs (school infrastructure)
Architects & builders (creative solutions at scale)
From what we are doing to what we will also do - modular homes, decking, and façades, unWOOD is reimagining materials for a future.

Name: Planit
Description:
Siamo esperti nella lavorazione di Corian e altri materiali innovativi, offrendo soluzioni personalizzate per progetti residenziali e commerciali. Con oltre 30 anni di esperienza, uniamo maestria artigianale e innovazione, unendo la tradizione del sudtirolese con le più moderne tecnologie. Grazie alla nostra profonda conoscenza dei materiali, realizziamo prodotti su misura per cucine, bagni, rivestimenti e arredamenti, rispondendo perfettamente alle esigenze estetiche e funzionali dei nostri clienti.
Ogni progetto che realizziamo è pensato per garantire sostenibilità e qualità duratura, utilizzando materiali selezionati che combinano eleganza e funzionalità. I nostri prodotti sono progettati per adattarsi facilmente a ogni esigenza, mantenendo sempre un'elevata resistenza nel tempo.
Accompagniamo i nostri clienti in ogni fase del progetto, dalla progettazione alla realizzazione, offrendo un servizio che supera le aspettative. Grazie al nostro approccio personalizzato, siamo in grado di creare ambienti che non solo abbelliscono gli spazi, ma migliorano anche la funzionalità quotidiana.
La nostra abilità artigianale, radicata nella tradizione del sudtirolese, e l’uso di materiali innovativi ci permettono di distinguere il nostro lavoro sul mercato. Oltre a creare soluzioni personalizzate e di alta qualità, il nostro impegno per la sostenibilità è evidente nell’uso responsabile dei materiali e nella gestione dei rifiuti, che vengono riutilizzati in modo ecologico.
Se desideri scoprire come possiamo trasformare il tuo progetto, contattaci: saremo felici di trovare insieme la soluzione ideale, per ottenere risultati che vanno oltre le aspettative.

Description:
Ramberti group has been working on the Italian market and abroad for over sixty years. This long-lasting and constant contact with our customers has enriched our knowledge about the numerous and diverse needs presented by the workers in this sector.

Thanks to our multi-year experience we can now solve a wide range of problems raised by our large pool of customers. In order to satisfy the increasingly complex requests of the users, we had to diversify our products in various models. Through the collaboration with well-known designers and the use of technologically advanced tools, we are now adding many new products conceived for spas, wellness centers, thermal baths, public swimming pools and gyms to the ones specifically suited for the beach. In a market that is constantly looking for the best quality/price ratio, we deliberately chose to abandon the production of common items to dedicate all of our attention and care to excellence products, guaranteeing also an effective after-sales assistance.

Our company is structured with many different production sites, all equipped with the most advanced methods and constantly updated tools. The different industries that are a part of our group allow us to carefully control the whole supply chain of our products: from the yarn to the fabric, from the aluminum frames to the umbrella ribs, from the wooden products to the various kinds of accessories.

Name: Mobhu (Mobiliario Humano)
Description:
Decimos muy y muy convencid@s que los muebles de Mobhu no son solo muebles en los que apoyarse, sino muebles que verdaderamente apoyan el cambio. 

Así, con tres datos sencillos pero llenísimos de significado, es como medimos el impacto+ y real de cada uno de ellos:

 ¿Cuántos días de trabajo ha generado para personas con discapacidad? --> Fabricamos exclusivamente en centros ocupacionales de carpintería. Dinamizando su actividad, conseguimos mejorar claramente el bienestar emocional de sus equipos humanos. 

 ¿Cuántos m2 de bosque se han gestionado responsablemente para extraer la madera necesaria para la fabricación y cuántos kg de CO2 absorbe? --> Fabricamos solo con madera certificada FSC/PEFC procedente de bosques de proximidad. 

 ¿A cuántas personas ha conectado para lograr juntxs un propóstito compartido? --> Creemos y apostamos por las alianzas; trabajamos de la mano de nuestros clientes, empresas sensibles y comprometidas, cocreando con ellas las piezas que realmente necesitan. 

¿Eres una de ellas? Hablemos : )

Name: OFICINOX
Description:
Somos uma indústria de mobiliário sob medida em aço inox, que atua no mercado há mais de 15 anos. Durante esse tempo, nossa empresa cresceu de forma significativa, dominando todos os estados brasileiros e trabalhando com as maiores marcas do Brasil. A Oficinox hoje conta com mais de 40 funcionários, com sede em Guarulhos, São Paulo.

Estamos comprometidos em nos tornar a maior e principal escolha em todo o Brasil quando o assunto for aço inox, transformando simples espaços com a elegância, durabilidade, eficiência e sustentabilidade dos nossos produtos. Nossos profissionais são bem preparados para desenvolver e traduzir projetos dos mais simples aos mais complexos, para trazer ao seu ambiente um projeto totalmente adaptado ao seu espaço.

Ao longo de todos esses anos, sempre mantivemos o foco total em moldar a experiência de compra dos nossos consumidores da melhor forma possível, realizando diversos ajustes nos nossos métodos ao longo do tempo para melhoria, prezando sempre pela satisfação total dos nossos clientes. Também prezamos muito pela qualidade do nosso ambiente profissional, nos preocupando sempre com a saúde física e mental de nossos funcionários, mantendo tudo isso com uma política de respeito, ética, educação e oportunidade de crescimento.

A Oficinox se mantém próspera e em constante crescimento graças à qualidade dos nossos produtos e à nossa transparência. Quer conhecer mais sobre a gente? Nos acompanhe nas nossas redes sociais ou entre em contato.

Welcome to Gie&Ger Baldai!  We're a passionate furniture business focused on designing, crafting, and installing top-notch furniture solutions.

 What We Do: We specialize in creating custom furniture that suits your style and space perfectly. Our skilled team ensures every piece is made with the finest materials and attention to detail.

 Our Mission: Transforming spaces with functional and aesthetically pleasing furniture is our goal. We take pride in staying ahead in design and craftsmanship.

 Sustainability: We're committed to eco-friendly practices, minimizing our environmental footprint while creating outstanding furniture.

 Let's Connect: Whether you're an interior designer, architect, or homeowner, we're excited to collaborate and bring your furniture ideas to life. Reach out to us to discuss your next project!

#FurnitureDesign #CustomFurniture #InteriorDesign

Name: Stuario Design Lab
Description:
Somos especialistas en el diseño y fabricación de mobiliario personalizado. En la búsqueda de un balance perfecto entre el confort y la personalización, la misión de este Design Lab es conectar con la esencia de nuestros clientes. La integridad, el trabajo en equipo y la sensibilidad por el diseño son pilares que acompañan a nuestro equipo en el día a día.  

Celebramos el talento local y la mano de obra artesanal a través de la autenticidad de un mueble 100% colombiano y la influencia de las tendencias globales del diseño. Lo mejor de los dos mundos como fuentes de inspiración. 

Bienvenidos a nuestra historia de sensibilidad por el diseño. 

 Showroom: Calle 77#62-05

Name: Slide Works (IW) Ltd
Description:
Slide Works is an independent sliding door manufacturer with a wealth of knowledge and experience in the furniture manufacturing industry. 

We create superior made-to-measure sliding door systems for all interior spaces for the trade.

Name: Huonekalutehdas Laitala
Description:
Huonekalutehdas Laitala on tyylikalusteistaan tunnettu kolmannen polven perheyritys, joka valmistaa kalusteita jo yli 90 vuoden kokemuksella.

Tänä päivänä olemme erikoistuneet valmistamaan kalusteita projektikohteisiin sekä huonekaluja, niiden osia ja muita puutuotteita sopimusvalmistuksena yritysasiakkaille.

Materiaaleina käytämme massiivipuuta sekä erilaisia levymateriaaleja, joiden työstämiseen meiltä löytyy laadukas konekanta.

Osaava, laatuun ja tehokkuuteen sitoutunut henkilöstömme työstää materiaalit valmiiksi tuotteiksi. Yksi vahvuuksistamme onkin huonekalupuuseppiemme hyvä käsityöosaaminen.

Tilavat, isommatkin projektit mahdollistavat tuotantotilamme sijaitsevat Etelä-Pohjanmaalla, Kurikan Jurvassa.

Tehtaallamme on myös oma pintakäsittelyosasto.

Ota rohkeasti yhteyttä, jos etsit luotettavaa ja kokenutta valmistajaa!

Name: Prakrit Design
Description:
Discover the beauty and sustainability of handcrafted solid wood furniture at Prakrit. We are a design and furniture production firm based in Auroville, South India, founded by Danish Aurovilian Torkil Dantzer. Our journey began in the aftermath of Cyclone Thane, which struck Auroville - Puducherry region in December 2011. Inspired by the resilience and potential of the fallen trees, we embarked on a mission to transform them into timeless pieces of art.

 

At Prakrit, we take pride in being experts in solid wood furniture. Our team of skilled craftsmen cherishes the natural beauty of wood and brings it to life in every piece we create. We believe that furniture should not only be functional but also a reflection of your unique style and values. That's why we specialize in customized furniture, ensuring that each item we produce is a one-of-a-kind masterpiece tailored to your exact requirements.



What sets Prakrit apart is our unwavering dedication to craftsmanship. Each piece of furniture is meticulously crafted by our skilled artisans, who bring decades of experience and expertise to every detail. With a blend of traditional techniques and contemporary design, we strive to create furniture that transcends trends and stands the test of time. When you choose Prakrit, you're not just buying furniture – you're investing in heirloom-quality pieces that will be cherished for generations.

 

As one of the leading sellers of wooden furniture in Auroville, Tamil Nadu, we have gained immense expertise and trust from our customers. Whether you're looking for chairs, tables, sofas, or any other wooden furniture, Prakrit offers a wide range of options to suit your needs. We cater to both individual customers and bulk orders, ensuring that our commitment to quality is never compromised.

Name: Albaseating
Description: ALBA was founded in 1993 and has become one of the biggest manufacturers of office seating in the Czech Republic and Slovakia. We specialize in custom manufacturing and our product range includes office chairs, conference chairs, benches, design chairs and soft seating. Our five product lines also include a specialised range for use in healthcare, furniture for schools, chairs for 24/7 operation or children's growing chairs, always with a wide selection of materials and upholstery fabrics, components and optional accessories.

Name: StepUp Bed
Description: StepUp in its simplest form is a modular bed system designed to provide simplified access to the upper sleeping areas for all guests in high density living/sleeping quarters.

Name: Decor Zone Interiors
Description: We believe every space has story to tell. At Decor Zone Interiors, we craft designs that reflect your personality, lifestyle, and aspirations. From elegant home interiors to inspiring commercial spaces, we bring creativity and functionality together. Let’s turn your space into a masterpiece.

Name: Maderartek
Description:
En Maderartek transformamos ideas en muebles únicos. Somos especialistas en diseño y fabricación de muebles personalizados para hogares y proyectos comerciales. Nuestro enfoque combina innovación, calidad artesanal y funcionalidad para crear piezas exclusivas que se adaptan a cualquier estilo y necesidad.

Ofrecemos servicios de diseño a medida, restauración de muebles en madera, y una línea de productos disponibles para entrega inmediata. Ya sea que busques renovar tu hogar, equipar tu oficina o dar vida a un proyecto especial, en Maderartek hacemos realidad tu visión.

 Conéctate con nosotros para transformar tus espacios con diseño único y calidad superior!

Name: Lususdecor
Description:
A Lususdecor é uma empresa de mobiliário especializada em mobiliário personalizado e decoração, sediada em Rebordosa, Paredes, conta com mais de 15 anos de experiência, está vocacionada para a produção de produtos que aliam design à qualidade.
Com uma equipa dinâmica, criativa e multidisciplinar, designers, decoradores e funcionários, com mais de 30 anos de experiência, trabalham em harmonia para criar produtos únicos e fazer do seu espaço um local ainda mais especial.
Com uma área produtiva com mais de 1000m² produzimos todo o tipo de mobiliário, todos os nossos produtos são sujeitos a um rigoroso processo de qualidade desde o processo criativo ao seu fabrico.
As matérias-primas são criteriosamente selecionadas, todos os produtos são sujeitos a testes de usabilidade e resistência para que o produto final seja perfeito.
Desenhamos e construímos sonhos, tornamos os seus desejos realidade.

Name: LA TAPICERA
Description:
La Tapicera is a Spanish brand founded in 2009. Since the beginning of its activity, La Tapicera has been dedicated to the sale of fabrics and furniture upholstery.
After years of getting to know and researching the textile market, it is in 2015 when they start working with their own designs or adapting designs from some of the best avant-garde designers and illustrators, selling more than 40 designs.
They apply the original artist work, creating prints on supports for decoration, producing unique and personalised spaces through textile printing services, furniture tailoring, manufacturing new furniture, handcrafted re-upholstering and sale of finished products.
La Tapicera currently designs, produces and markets signature fabrics in different textile supports: 100% cotton, anti-stain velvets, waterproof resin-coated fabrics and wallpaper.

La Tapicera es una marca española fundada en 2009. Desde el inicio de su actividad en se dedica a la venta de telas y a la tapicería de mobiliario.
Tras años conociendo e investigando el mercado textil, es en 2015 cuando comienzan a trabajar con diseños propios o adaptando diseños de algunos de los mejores diseñadores e ilustradores de vanguardia, comercializado más de 40 diseños.
Aplican obra de autor, creando estampados en soportes para la decoración, produciendo espacios singulares y personalizados a través de los servicios de impresión textil, sastrería del mueble, fabricación de mueble nuevo, re-tapizado artesanal y venta de producto terminado.
Actualmente La Tapicera diseña, produce y comercializa telas de autor en distintos soportes textiles: 100% algodón, terciopelos anti-manchas, telas resinadas impermeables y papel de pared.

Name: LITUA
Description:
Providing Essential Furniture Solutions in Crisis Regions: At LITUA, we're proud to offer crisis regions smart modular furniture solutions that ensure versatility and sustainability in any situation. Beginning with optimized logistics in mind, our furniture features easy assembly and disassembly technology for space-saving storage and quick deployment. Each piece is designed and crafted from 100% environmentally friendly materials, such as Lithuanian birch, in compliance with ISO 14000 standards, reflecting our unwavering commitment to sustainability.

Our mission is to make a difference – LITUA was born out of a desire to support those affected by conflicts like the war in Ukraine. With over 4000 products already serving on the front lines, in bunkers, hideouts, schools, and kindergartens, we can make a tangible impact where it is needed the most. Join our call to supply essential furniture to people requiring aid, offering not just comfort and functionality, but also hope in the face of adversity. Welcome to LITUA.

Name: Ébénisterie AGR Design Inc.
Description: Depuis 1996, nous confectionnons des créations uniques pour une clientèle de prestige au Québec. Si vous souhaitez concrétiser un projet d’ébénisterie en partenariat avec une équipe attentive à vos attentes et soucieuse de votre entière satisfaction, vous êtes à la bonne adresse. Offrez-vous l’expérience d’une fabrication de meubles sur mesure par de véritables maîtres du bois. Située à Saint-Jean-sur-Richelieu dans un bâtiment centenaire de 20000 pi2, notre entreprise familiale se distingue par son service à la clientèle hors pair et son portfolio impressionnant d’œuvres exclusives, toutes réalisées avec un savoir-faire incomparable. Dans le secteur tant résidentiel que commercial, nos créations mêlant le bois et des matériaux nobles comme le marbre, le granite, le quartz, la porcelaine et l’ardoise incarnent l’intemporalité et le raffinement.

Name: Buildunos
Description:
Builduno’s was established in 2004 as a furniture manufacturing company. The brand is dealing with the national and international markets as a furniture manufacturer.

In the heart of the Pink City ( Jaipur ), Our company specialises in designing high-quality furniture. We design furniture according to your style. And, We believe every piece of furniture reflects you.

With experienced designers and artisans, we believe in creating unique furniture that lasts. Our motto is very simple “you think, we design”. This simply indicates that we are able to design products according to our customer's specifications. 
Builduno’s has an experience in manufacturing and exporting villa furniture, apartment furniture, banquet furniture, and hotel furniture. Our customized product includes Dining Tables, Dining Chairs, Sofa, Sofa Chairs, Arm Chairs, Coffee & Side Tables, Consoles, Chests, Beds, Desks, Bookcases, Wardrobes, and so on. 

For us Quality starts from materials: without qualitative materials, manufacturing qualitative products is, simply, impossible. That’s why Builduno’s carefully selects noble materials such as bronze, brass, wood, and steel and utilises leather and fabric of the highest quality. For the same reason, all the processes are carried out internally and constantly monitored and every detail is carefully checked. That’s how Quality is created.

Name: Mulberry Contract Furniture
Description:
Mulberry Contract Furniture is a UK-based specialist manufacturer and supplier of furniture for mental health, healthcare, supported living and challenging environments across the UK, Ireland and Europe.

We work with NHS Trusts, HSE partners and private care providers, and are the sole UK and European distributor for Norix Furniture, a global leader in behavioural-health and secure-environment furniture.
We work with NHS Trusts, private healthcare providers, local authorities and care groups across the UK, delivering safer, more durable and more therapeutic interiors for some of the most demanding settings.

Our product ranges include ligature-resistant bedroom furniture, roto-moulded seating and beds, upholstered lounge furniture, dining furniture, outdoor furniture and specialist wellness spaces — all designed to balance safety, strength, infection control and human-centred design.

From single ward upgrades to large-scale refurbishment programmes, we support projects from design and specification through to manufacture, delivery and installation, ensuring minimal disruption to live environments and fast, reliable lead times.

Whether it’s a CAMHS unit, an acute ward, supported living scheme or secure setting, Mulberry helps organisations create spaces that are safer, calmer and built to last.

Description:
Maderra LLC is a U.S.-based custom manufacturing company specializing in high-end architectural millwork, hidden doors, secret rooms, and space-transforming furniture solutions.
