Name: Maesta Design
Description:
Maesta Design, çalışma ve yaşam alanlarında mekan fark etmeksizin müşterilerin ihtiyaç ve beklentisini karşılamak adına kurulmuş bir yapıdır. 

Mobilya ve dekorasyon alanındaki 15 yıllık deneyimini bütüncül, akılcıl ve modern çözümler ile harmanlayan Maesta Design, alışılmışın dışına çıkan tasarım çözümleri ve hizmet kalitesiyle kusursuz projeler üretmektedir. Dinamik ve deneyimli kadrosu ile çıktığı yolda hayal edileni yenilikçi projelerle ve estetik dokunuşlarla birleştirmeyi hedeflemektedir.  

Dekorasyonla ilgili arzu edilen tüm talepleri gerçekleştiren Maesta Design, kurulum ve proje yönetimi için ihtiyaç olan hizmetlerin tamamını eksiksiz şekilde sunmaktadır. Elde ettiği başarıları devam ettirerek sayısız anahtar teslim projeye imzasını atmayı hedeflemektedir.

Name: FROA
Description:
Crafted for Life
Over the decades, behaviors of people have altered in many aspects, yet the demand for comfort in a living
environment and the delight of living in a welcoming well-designed atmosphere have not been changed.
Froa Collection is “Crafted for Life” and offers comfort, refined aesthetic and contemporary elegance in tune
with the living environment.
Collaboration with prestigious creative professionals and combining their individual distinctive designs in a
coherent way to form a harmonized contemporary and elegant collection is the essence of Froa Style.
While offering a range of finely crafted products that are congruent with each other perfectly,
the choices of color, fabric, leather, wood, metal, marble, glass and dimension make each product
exclusively designed for you.
Froa provides a timeless design rather than short-term enticing fashion trends, superior quality in
craftsmanship, the best materials, technical excellence, and the latest production technologies for
increasing the lifespan and absolute quality of each product. In essence, starting from the concept design
up to the last stitch, we are working for ensuring quality and sustainability. Froa is crafting for life and caring
about the world we live in.
Enjoy the welcoming comfort and style of Froa!

Located at Plot 1, Arch John Agabri Street, beside Happy Land Estate, Km 23 Lekki-Epe Expressway, Ajah, Lagos State, it boasts of a fullyequipped factory with state-of-the-art industrial machines, skilled professional man power and global afﬁliations. Thekan Services Company Limited has branches in Warri, Port-Harcort and a Sister Company, THEKAN SERVICES & SUPPLY COMPANY LLC registered in USA.

As an indigenous company, Thekan Services has accomplished statutory registrations and/or certiﬁcations required to operate speciﬁcally in the Oil & Gas, Telecommunication and Marine Industries. These include but not limited to:
Department of Petroleum Resources (DPR)·
Nigerian Local Content Development & Monitoring Board (NCDMB)·
Nigerian Petroleum Exchange (NIPEX)·
Nigerian Ports Authority (NPA) as Service Boats Operator·

Thekan Services continues to grow everY day thanks to the confidence our clients have in us. We cover many industries such as oil & gas, energy, business services, consumer products.

Name: Bonetto 1922
Description:
We are an Italian company well appreciated and recognised as a producer of high quality custom furniture that supports architects and clients on their project in the field of Luxury Retail and Private Villas.

Name: Yangzhou Xianming Tourist Products Co.,Ltd
Description:
Zhuzhijiang Bamboo Products Co., Ltd. is a professional wholesale bamboo toothbrush supplier, located in the picturesque city of Yangzhou, Jiangsu. The company has a modern factory of 6000 square meters and a daily output of 10000 bamboo toothbrushes. The company has advanced production equipment and exquisite technical processes, laying a solid foundation for the birth of high-quality products.

 

Its main product, bamboo toothbrush, is a perfect embodiment of the concept of green environmental protection. The toothbrush handle is made of natural high-quality bamboo, retaining the natural texture and fresh breath of bamboo. Each brush handle has been carefully polished, delicate, smooth, and comfortable to the touch. Name: Halex Meble
Description:
Nasza fabryka specjalizuje się w produkcji wysokiej jakości stołów i krzeseł, które łączą w sobie funkcjonalność, wygodę i elegancki design. Nasze produkty powstają z najlepszych jakościowo materiałów, takich jak drewno, metal, tkaniny i pianki, dzięki czemu zapewniają nie tylko atrakcyjny wygląd, ale także trwałość i wygodę użytkowania.

Nasze stoły i krzesła są idealne dla różnych przestrzeni-od domów i mieszkań po biura, kawiarnie i restauracje. Nasze produkty są projektowane z myślą o różnych potrzebach klientów, a nasza oferta obejmuje szeroką gamę stylów, rozmiarów i kolorów, aby dostosować się do indywidualnych preferencji.

Posiadamy również zaawansowane systemy kontroli jakości, aby zapewnić, że każdy produkt, który opuszcza naszą fabrykę, spełnia nasze wysokie standardy jakościowe. Cieszymy się zatem, że możemy zagwarantować naszym klientom, że zakupione przez nich produkty będą nie tylko piękne, ale także trwałe i bezpieczne.

Jako zespół, nasza fabryka angażuje się w ciągły rozwój i innowacje, aby nasze produkty były zawsze w zgodzie z najnowszymi trendami i potrzebami rynku. Wierzymy, że nasza pasja do produkcji stołów i krzeseł z pewnością przyciągnie klientów, którzy cenią sobie jakość, funkcjonalność i wygodę.

Hizmet sunduğumuz alanlarda, yeni mekanlara hayat katma fikri bizi ilk günkü gibi heyecanlandırıyor, tamamlanan her projede Nora ismi ile onurlanıyoruz.

İnsanı temel alan misyonumuzla, kalitenin ancak teknik ve insani kabiliyetler ile mümkün kılınacağına inanan Nora Dekorasyon, müşteri memnuniyetini olmazsa olmaz kabul etmiştir.

Uzun yıllar yurt içinde ve uluslararası düzeyde gerçekleştirdiğimiz projeler, bizlere Nora’mızı onurlandıracak bir marka kimliği oluşturma vizyonu sağlamıştır. Bu kapsamda her yeni projeye aynı ciddiyet ile hazırlanıyor, ilk günkü heyecanımıza bugünün deneyimlerini ekleyerek projelerinize en iyi çözüm ortağı olmak üzere çalışıyoruz.

Projelerimizde mükemmeliyeti deneyimlemek, hayalinizdeki mekânı Nora ile yaratmak için bize katılın!

Name: Saelens meubilering
Description:
Saelens: een interieurbedrijf met passie voor het vak

Al drie generaties lang maakt Saelens meubelen op maat in alle mogelijke stijlen. Ons gereedschap: de nieuwste technieken, computergestuurde machines en hoogwaardige, duurzame materialen. Onze troef: een ervaren team van gedreven vaklui die samen streven naar perfecte kwaliteit en een sublieme uitvoering.

Onze gedrevenheid

Als er één eigenschap is die bij ons familiebedrijf hoort, dan mag je dat gerust passie voor het vak noemen. De gedrevenheid die wij delen, laten we zichtbaar worden in ons streven naar perfectie. Zo bereiden we elk project grondig voor, tekenen we alle meubels opnieuw uit en gebruiken we onze jarenlange ervaring en technische kennis om kwalitatief hoogstaand werk af te leveren.

Onze specialiteiten

Voor ons is elk project maatwerk. Architecten en klanten kunnen bij ons rekenen op een nauwe samenwerking en overleg . We richten ons zowel naar de particuliere markt als naar de ondernemingen, zorgsector en lokale besturen. Een uitgebreid project op hoog niveau daar gaan we graag voor. Met een team van op elkaar afgestemde ervaren vaklui wordt het meubilair door ons gemaakt en geplaatst. Ons atelier is voorzien van een recent machinepark, fineerafdeling en een spuitcabine. Zo kunnen we elk meubel tot in de subtielste welving en het kleinste hoekje afwerken.

Name: FRANCE URBA
Description:
Depuis plus de trois décennies, FRANCE URBA incarne le savoir-faire français dans le domaine du mobilier urbain. Notre entreprise s'est engagée à façonner des espaces publics durables, sur mesure et respectueux de l'environnement.

Fièrement Français : Notre histoire et notre passion pour le design et la fabrication de mobilier urbain ont toujours été ancrées dans le terroir français. Notre engagement envers le savoir-faire artisanal et la qualité de fabrication est ce qui distingue FRANCE URBA de la concurrence. Chaque pièce que nous créons est une représentation de l'art et de la technologie française.

Durable par Nature : Notre engagement envers la durabilité est au cœur de notre mission. Nous utilisons des matériaux de haute qualité et des méthodes de production respectueuses de l'environnement pour garantir nos créations durant des générations. Cela signifie moins de déchets, moins d'entretien et un impact environnemental réduit.

Sur-Mesure à Votre Image : Chez FRANCE URBA, chaque projet est unique. Nous collaborons étroitement avec nos clients pour concevoir et fabriquer du mobilier sur mesure qui correspond parfaitement à leurs besoins et à leur vision. Votre créativité et vos idées sont notre source d'inspiration.
Au fil des ans, nous avons eu l'opportunité de travailler sur de nombreux projets prestigieux, contribuant à la beauté et à la fonctionnalité de nos espaces publics. Notre engagement envers le design de qualité et la responsabilité environnementale continue de guider chacune de nos créations.

Nous sommes FRANCE URBA, l'entreprise qui façonne l'avenir de nos villes en combinant le meilleur du savoir-faire français, de la durabilité, de la personnalisation et de l'écologie. Rejoignez nous dans notre quête pour créer des espaces urbains inspirants et respectueux de l'environnement

Name: Falegnameria Mattioli Arredamenti in Legno
Description: Falegnameria Mattioli, produttrice artigianale di mobili su misura di qualità, è presente sul mercato dal 1945, anno in cui Alfredo Mattioli avviò l'attività a Roma per poter esprimere le proprie capacità nella realizzazione artigianale dei suoi manufatti in legno. Seguì le sue orme il figlio Giovanni che, con le sue doti imprenditoriali, riuscì a proiettare la falegnameria in una visione più ampia, mantenendo l'anima artigianale che la contraddistingueva ampliò gli stabili ed investì tutto nella ricerca e l'innovazione dell'azienda, macchinari e strumenti all'avanguardia permisero alla falegnameria di continuare a crescere e a consolidare il proprio nome non solo nella regione laziale ma in tutta la nazione. Come da tradizione Giovanni venne seguito dal figlio, Mauro che insieme al padre contibuì alla crescita ma soprattutto al mantenimento della realtà creata, continuando a lavorare per garantire professionalità, qualità e rispetto per il cliente e per i propri dipendenti. Oggi Mauro, affiancato a sua volta dal figlio Giovanni, è pronto ad affrontare le nuove sfide richieste dal mercato, digitalizzazione, inclusione e sostenibilità sono e saranno i sinonimi che contraddistinguono l'Artigianato della Falegnameria Mattioli.

Description:
Wood Dekor was founded on 15th September 2009, in last Fifteen year we have grown remarkably fast, with 2 retail outlets in India (Jaipur& Factory retail outlet).

Wood Dekor has equipped with a State of Art Production Facility at Factories over 8000 sqm. under the direct supervision of the founders With Semi-automatic to fully Automatic Machines which amplify furniture production maintaining Quality and Quantity.

We build our handcrafted originals to the highest possiblestandards, emphasizing Solid Wood construction, hand carving and painted accents

We are bound to provide wooden furniture without harming the natural habitat of our mother Earth. And maintaining artwork and culture of handmade wooden furniture in India & Abroad.

At Global, we believe we have a responsibility to safeguard the environment while manufacturing and doing business. That is one of the reasons we focused on manufacturing high-quality products at a great price and in a sustainable manner. All the timber used in furniture manufacturing is sourced from legal and environment-friendly sources.

Being own furniture manufacturing unit’s transfer prices are competitive in Retailing and wholesaling both.

Our Experience of 15+ years in furniture, manufacturing makes us simplify and retain our design concept.
 
Wood Chemical Treatment is done by Vacuum Pressure Impregnation technology ensuring timber free from Borer, fungi, and termites. Treated planks are seasoned properly to minimize the moisture content of wood and avoid cracking and joint opening.

Our products are casually elegant, have a lasting quality, and are made with superior craftsmanship and always with the environment in mind. Inspired by current trends and made with superior and finest materials, our exclusive furniture creates an atmosphere of irresistible comfort, gracious hospitality, and perfect taste.

Name: HotSpa.pl
Description:
Nowa jakość, wydajność oraz chwila relaksu? Jest to możliwe dzięki bogatej ofercie naszej łódzkiej firmy – jednego z największych producentów w Polsce, mającego w swojej ofercie wanny z hydromasażem oraz jacuzzi ogrodowe. Jako dystrybutor od ponad 21 lat dostarczamy produkty zarówno do użytku prywatnego, jak i komercyjnego, a nasze propozycje dostępne są w 70 krajach na całym świecie.

Domowe SPA z naszymi produktami? To zdecydowanie najlepszy pomysł na odprężenie! Nieustannie wprowadzamy nowe technologie, by zapewnić, że jacuzzi zewnętrzne będzie cechować się nowoczesnością oraz wysoką funkcjonalnością. Jakość cechującą nasze wanny SPA potwierdzają otrzymane certyfikaty. Stawiamy również na przyjazność środowisku naturalnemu – do produkcji wykorzystujemy jedynie przetwarzalne materiały, a także spełniamy najwyższe standardy międzynarodowe w zakresie bezpieczeństwa oraz niezawodności.



Najlepszy pomysł na relaks po ciężkim dniu w pracy? Prywatne SPA, które można stworzyć, korzystając z bogatej oferty produktów naszej łódzkiej firmy. Zapewniające odprężenie wanny z hydromasażem stanowią luksus, z którego mogą Państwo w pełni korzystać na swoim tarasie lub w ogrodzie dzięki naszej ofercie. Dostępny mamy szeroki asortyment modeli – zapraszamy do kontaktu i wyboru najlepszej opcji. Ogromne doświadczenie i wiedza, jaką dysponuje nasz wykwalifikowany personel, pozwalają zapewnić, że pomożemy znaleźć idealne dla Państwa jacuzzi domowe.

Name: L'entrelacs
Description:

Name: Płuciennik.pl - Piękne meble, piękne wnętrze
Description:
Nasza firma to rodzinna stolarnia z Wielkopolski z tradycjami sięgającymi 1974 roku.

Przez ostatnie 30 lat z małej pracowni przekształciliśmy się w renomowanego producenta 
mebli na wymiar, działającego zarówno na terenie Polski, jak i Europy. 

Dzisiaj naszą firmę prowadzi trzech wspólników: 
Krzysztof Płuciennik - syn założyciela, Dominik Przybecki i Robert Przybecki, 
którzy dołączyli do firmy w 2020 roku.

Tworzymy meble o niepowtarzalnym charakterze przez co nasze aranżacje wnętrz, idealnie wpisują się w aktualne trendy i oczekiwania naszych klientów. Dzięki wieloletniemu doświadczeniu oraz indywidualnemu podejściu, jesteśmy w stanie spełnić nawet najbardziej wyszukane wymagania. 
Nasze prace charakteryzuje rzetelność, terminowość i najwyższa jakość wykonania.


Posiadamy również zaplecze kamieniarskie i ślusarskie oraz tapicerskie, dzięki czemu jesteśmy w stanie zaprojektować i wykonać nie tylko meble, ale także eleganckie elementy dekoracyjne i uzupełniające, takie jak blaty, parapety czy drzwi.

Name: Decomix
Description:
კომპანია Decomix 2022 წლიდან საქართველოს ბაზარზე აწვდის ინოვაციურ საინჟინრო მასალებს — აკრილისა და კვარცის ხელოვნურ ქვას.
ჩვენ ასევე ვთავაზობთ ქვისგან დამზადებულ მზა პროდუქტებს: სამზარეულოსა და კუნძულის ზედაპირებს, ბარისა და საინფორმაციო მაგიდებს, ნიჟარებს, ჟურნალის მაგიდებს და სხვა ორიგინალურ დიზაინერულ გადაწყვეტებს.
Decomix თანამშრომლობს მხოლოდ სანდო და მსოფლიო ბრენდებთან, როგორიცაა Lotte (Staron, Radianz, Cirrus) — სამხრეთ კორეიდან და Caesarstone — ისრაელიდან.
ჩვენ მუდმივად ვეძებთ ახალ პარტნიორებს, რათა მომხმარებლებს შევთავაზოთ მასალების კიდევ უფრო ფართო არჩევანი — ფერების, ტექსტურებისა და ფორმების მრავალფეროვნებით.
ჩვენ ვადევნებთ თვალს გლობალურ ბრენდებსა და ინტერიერის დიზაინის ტენდენციებს, რათა მუდმივად შემოგთავაზოთ ინოვაციური და თანამედროვე გადაწყვეტილებები.
თუ თქვენი პროექტისთვის ეძებთ იდეალურ ქვის ფერს ან გსურთ გაიგოთ მეტი მასალის თვისებებისა და შესაძლებლობების შესახებ — დაგვიკავშირდით, და ჩვენი მენეჯერები სიამოვნებით შემოგთავაზებენ ყველაზე შესაფერის ვარიანტებს.

Name: Factory Select
Description: When purchasing educational furniture and supplies you want the very best value for your dollar. At Factory Select, we deliver exceptional value in a number of ways. We deliver some of the best prices available on time tested brands like Jonti-Craft, The Children's Factory, Angeles Corp., Foundations and more! Our stringent product selection process insures that the brands and products we carry will be the best choice possible for our customers in terms of quality, value, and service. Factory Select has been serving our valued customers since 2006 and has accumulated a vast array of knowledge on the correct application of the products we represent. This knowledge gives us the tools needed to provide our customers with detailed product recommendations based on all the characteristics that make a successful purchase.

Name: E9 Design
Description:
E9 Design is a tech-driven, family run, Australian manufacturer founded in 2020, designing and building furniture in Sydney. We embed human-centred design and environmental responsibility into every step of our design and manufacturing process. 

We believe furniture plays a key role in helping us feel good in our homes and workspaces. So, we create comfortable, flexible, and inherently usable pieces that bring people together and truly suit the ways in which we want to live with them. 

We focus on flexibility and quality so your furniture can move with you through life. 

Our sofas feature 100% recyclable steel frames (with a lifetime warranty), the “Bounce” seating system, premium Global GreenTag certified foams, and replaceable components including removeable covers.

By sourcing durable, sustainable materials, taking an innovative approach to manufacture, and supporting end-of-life recycling, our customers can also feel good about purchasing a product that will not end up in landfill.

Name: Marcelina Furniture Studio
Description:
Marcelina Furniture Studio diseña y fabrica mobiliario de alto nivel en madera maciza, combinando artesanía, elegancia y personalización.
A través de su servicio pre-order, cada cliente elige la madera, los acabados, colores y texturas, creando piezas únicas que reflejan su estilo.
El estudio desarrolla proyectos residenciales y comerciales —desde hogares y oficinas hasta restaurantes y coffee shops— y complementa sus colecciones con lámparas y accesorios decorativos contemporáneos.
En Marcelina, el diseño es una forma de expresión: creamos espacios con alma, pensados para durar y sentirse como en casa.

Name: Supellex Home
Description:
En Supellex Home diseñamos muebles que trascienden tendencias. Creamos piezas que inspiran, acompañan y resisten el paso del tiempo.

Somos una empresa especializada en mobiliario a medida, con producción nacional y un fuerte enfoque en la calidad, la funcionalidad y la estética. Acompañamos a nuestros clientes en todo el proceso: desde la conceptualización de espacios hasta la entrega final de muebles únicos, hechos con precisión y propósito.

Con nuestras tres líneas de servicio —Shop the Collection, Expert Shopping, Diseño 360— ofrecemos soluciones integrales para proyectos de interiorismo, adaptándonos a las necesidades de cada cliente.

Desde nuestros showrooms, conectamos diseño, arte y experiencia, generando espacios que cuentan historias y reflejan formas de habitar más conscientes a través de sus muebles.

Name: Omma Group
Description:
En Omma, interpretamos tu proyecto de mobiliario especial y lo hacemos realidad. Creamos soluciones personalizadas y optimizamos tus espacios con una gran variedad de ideas. Ofrecemos formas, colores y texturas que se adaptan a tus ambientes educativos y culturales, corporativos, comerciales, residenciales y hoteleros, salud y bienestar.

Nuestro enfoque en el mobiliario personalizado y la carpintería arquitectónica nos permite brindar soluciones específicas y únicas a cada uno de nuestros clientes, desde pequeñas empresas hasta grandes corporaciones. Contamos con un equipo de expertos carpinteros y ebanistas que se aseguran de que cada pieza de mobiliario se fabrique con los más altos niveles de calidad y bajo los estándares de diseño requerido, usando los mejores materiales y técnicas para lograr un acabado perfecto. Además, nuestra experiencia en el sector nos permite ofrecer asesoramiento personalizado en cada proyecto, desde la fase de planificación hasta la implementación.


En Omma, nos encanta ofrecer soluciones de mobiliario y carpintería arquitectónica funcionales y atractivas para nuestros clientes. Contáctanos para ayudarte a transformar tus ambientes comerciales, institucionales o residenciales.

“Los muebles hechos a la medida son piezas únicas creadas para la arquitectura pensada, al encajarse en el espacio a la perfección, le aportan personalidad, lo hacen singular y único y pasan a convertirse, en cierta medida, en elementos de la arquitectura.” Arquitecta Interiorista Lara Pujol.

Name: Cinetico Turnkey Projects Contracting L.L.C
Description:
Cinetico is a leading lab solution provider for Educational Institutions, Research Centers, Industrial Quality Control Labs, Microbiology Labs, etc. We are a team with twenty plus years of expertise in executing Lab projects across India. Our expansion to the UAE means we can now offer our top-quality services to even more clients. Our motto is to help put forth both creative and innovative solutions to our client requirements. Cinetico is specialized in the execution of Lab Infrastructure such as laboratory furniture, central gas distribution system, fume hood, bio-safety cabinet, laminar air-flow, etc. We also provide custom fabricated stainless steel and powder-coated furniture. Cinetico is the preferred solution provider offering the finest quality products. We, along with our exclusive partnership with our business partners, ensure prompt delivery of high-quality products at an affordable price. This reliability has helped us garner the trust of our large clientele.

We at Cinetico, we understand that every laboratory has unique requirements, which is why we offer custom and innovative solutions to our clients. We provide a comprehensive range of services, from basic lab furniture to high-end R&D lab furniture solutions, to ensure that our clients have access to the products they need to meet their laboratory needs. We take pride in the quality of our solutions and ensure that all of our products meet the high standards required for installation in scientific laboratories.
As experienced professionals in lab infrastructure, we take a holistic approach to each project. We have experts who take care of various aspects of the projects including:

Lab Designing
Customization
Liaising with our Principal Partners
Execution
Commissioning

Name: bayt alabnws .  مصنع بيت الابنوس
Description:
إذا كنت تبحث عن أثاث عالي الجودة وتصاميم فريدة تلبي احتياجاتك، فإن بيت الأبنوس يقدم لك الحل المثالي. اتصل بنا اليوم لمناقشة مشروعك واحصل على أثاث متميز يضفي لمسة فريدة على المساحة الداخلية لمشروعك نحن نقدم منتجات ذات جودة عالية وتصاميم مبتكرة لتلبية احتياجات عملائنا في مختلف القطاعات.
تفخر الشركة بالاعتماد على كوادر وعمالة محلية مؤهلة وذات خبرة واسعة في تصميم وتصنيع الأثاث. فريقنا من الخبراء يجمع بين الخبرة العملية والمهارات المتقدمة لتحقيق أعلى مستويات الجودة والدقة في كل منتج نقدمه.نحن نهتم بأدق التفاصيل في عملية تصميم وتصنيع الأثاث، حيث يتم اختيار المواد الخام بعناية فائقة وتطبيق أعلى معايير الحرفية. نحن نستخدم أحدث التقنيات والأدوات لضمان تقديم منتج نهائي متين وجذاب يلبي توقعات واحتياجات العملاء.
بيت الأبنوس يعمل في تعاون وثيق مع العملاء لضمان تحقيق رؤيتهم وتلبية متطلباتهم. نحن نقدم خدمة شاملة تشمل المشورة في تصميم الأثاث واختيار المواد وتنفيذ المشروع وتركيب الأثاث. نحن نسعى جاهدين لتحقيق رضا العملاء وتقديم تجربة مميزة وراحة تامة.

Name: Tail
Description:
Tail est une entreprise spécialisé dans la conception de mobilier d'intérieur, aussi bien pour votre salon, votre cuisine ou encore votre bureau. 

Passionné également de skate, Tail donne une seconde vie à vos planche utilisées en les incorporant dans nos produits, et vous apporter des designs personnalisés et esthétiques.

Nous collaborons avec de nombreux shops fournisseurs de planches, comme par exemple WallStreet et ABS à Lyon, mais également avec de nombreux skateurs généreux qui croient en notre projet.

Name: Comodo Armenia
Description: We are an Armenian based soft furniture company. Just as the meaning of our brand name Comodo (In Spanish "comodo") suggests, we strive to offer comfort, relaxation, and convenience. Our mission is to make an impression of liability and quality. As the word itself converts a comfy atmosphere, the meaning and the message of the name are correlated. We take our main inspiration from people, nature, designers, and simply from the beauty around us. Our ultimate goal is to produce high-quality, comfortable, and at the same time, beautiful furniture. Comodo deals with any type of furniture, whether it's simple or whimsy. We try to transform into reality even the craziest desires of the designers. We believe there is no such thing as a bad design; it entirely depends on implementation!

Name: Grupo Smart
Description:
Conheça o Grupo Smart, seu parceiro completo em soluções de mobiliário corporativo e residencial. Com uma trajetória marcada pela excelência, somos especialistas em transformar espaços, unindo design inovador, funcionalidade e alta qualidade.

Nosso Compromisso
No Grupo Smart, o compromisso começa desde a concepção do projeto. Atuamos em todas as etapas:

Projeto: Desenvolvemos soluções personalizadas que refletem a identidade e as necessidades de cada cliente. Seja para um ambiente corporativo dinâmico ou um lar aconchegante, nossa equipe de designers transforma ideias em realidade.

Fabricação: Contamos com uma infraestrutura moderna e profissionais qualificados para garantir a produção de mobiliário com rigorosos padrões de qualidade. Utilizamos matérias-primas selecionadas, assegurando durabilidade e um acabamento impecável em cada peça.

Comercialização: Oferecemos uma vasta gama de produtos, desde estações de trabalho ergonômicas e mesas de reunião sofisticadas até guarda-roupas planejados e cozinhas funcionais. Nosso portfólio é pensado para atender aos mais variados estilos e demandas, sempre com excelente custo-benefício.

Mobiliário Corporativo
Para o ambiente corporativo, o Grupo Smart entende a importância de um espaço que inspire produtividade e bem-estar. Nossas soluções incluem:

Estações de trabalho: Ergonômicas e modulares, adaptam-se a diferentes layouts.

Salas de reunião: Mesas e cadeiras que promovem a colaboração e o profissionalismo.

Recepções: Mobiliário que causa uma primeira impressão impactante.

Mobiliário para diretoria e gerência: Peças executivas que transmitem requinte e autoridade.

Mobiliário Residencial
Transformamos sua casa em um verdadeiro lar, com mobiliário que une beleza e praticidade:

Quartos: Guarda-roupas planejados, camas e mesas de cabeceira que otimizam o espaço.

Salas: Estantes, painéis para TV e sofás que combinam conforto e estilo.

Cozinhas: Armários e bancadas que aliam funcionalidade à estética moderna.

Name: Mir İstanbul İç ve Dış Ticaret Limited Şirketi
Description:
Biz Mir İstanbul olarak, berber tezgahları, kuaför koltukları, makyaj koltukları ve daha fazlası gibi kuaför ve berber salonlarının ihtiyaçlarına yönelik özel tasarım mobilyalar üreten bir markayım. Modern tasarım anlayışı, geniş ürün yelpazemiz ve uygun fiyatlarımızla, işletmenizin dekorasyonunu en iyi şekilde tamamlamak için buradayız.

Mir İstanbul olarak kuaför koltuğu denince akla ilk gelen marka olmak için çalışıyoruz. En kaliteli kuaför koltuklarını en uygun fiyatlarla sunmayı hedefliyoruz. Ürünlerimiz arasında alışageldiğiniz klasik kuaför koltuklarının yanı sıra modern kuaför koltuğu modellerini de bulabilirsiniz.

Berber, kuaför ve güzellik salonları için en uygun kuaför tezgahları Mir İstanbul’da. Fonksiyonelliği ve estetiği bir araya getiren tasarımlarımızla işletmenizin ambiyansını yükseltiyoruz.

2023 yılında kurulan diğer bir markamız Mirobi, 10.000 m2 açık ve 4.000 m2 kapalı alanda kurulu fabrikasında, son teknolojiye sahip makina parkuru ve nitelikli personeliyle Avrupa standartlarında modüler mobilya üretimi yapmakta ve Dünya'nın çok sayıda ülkesine ihracatını gerçekleştirmektedir. Türkiye'de bulunduğu ürün gruplarını e-ticaret üzerinden satışını gerçekleştirmektedir. E-ticaret sektöründeki tecrübesiyle tüketici ihtiyaçlarını net olarak analiz etme imkânı bulmuş ve Dünya’nın tüm coğrafyalarında kullanılabilecek modüler mobilyalar tasarlayarak evrensel bir ürün yelpazesine ulaşmıştır.         
Mir İstanbul; üst düzey üretim kabiliyeti, yıllarca tüketiciyle doğrudan kurduğu diyaloglar sayesinde tüketici talep ve ihtiyaçlarını analiz yeteneği ve güçlü finansal yapısıyla; çalışanları, tedarikçileri ve müşterileriyle muazzam bir iş ilişkisi içerisindedir. Üretim ve satış sürecinin tüm aşamalarında eşitlik, şeffaflık, hesap verebilirlik, sorumluluk, çevreye duyarlılık kavramlarına göre hareket eder.

Name: METASM Suministros Médicos
Description:
Tu aliado confiable en equipamiento médico.

Organización 100% mexicana. Proveemos los mejores productos para el equipamiento médico hospitalario.

Fundada en 2012 en la Ciudad de México, consolidamos nuestra presencia en el mercado gracias a nuestros 11 años de experiencia en la fabricación y mantenimiento de mobiliario e instrumental médico. En este 2023, estamos comprometidos en ir más allá de la mera provisión de consumibles para el sector salud, definiendo uno de nuestros objetivos principales como ofrecer una gran diversidad de soluciones y suministros médicos a clientes, distribuidores, usuarios finales y públicos interesados en el equipamiento para el cuidado de la salud.

"Ir más allá de proporcionar consumibles para el sector salud" ...es la idea principal que rige esta nueva etapa, definiendo uno de nuestros objetivos principales: ofrecer gran diversidad de soluciones y suministros médicos a clientes, distribuidores, usuario final y públicos interesados en equipamiento para el cuidado de la salud.

MISIÓN

En METASM Suministros Médicos nos enfocamos en contribuir al cuidado de la salud de todas las personas ofreciendo una amplia diversidad de suministros médicos, desde materiales de curación hasta mobiliario y equipamiento médico en acero inoxidable. Nuestro objetivo es facilitar el acceso a productos y servicios de alta calidad y confiabilidad, tanto para particulares como para el sector salud del gobierno en México.

VISIÓN

Nuestra visión es ser la opción preferida por médicos, especialistas, personal de enfermería y operativos dedicados a la salud de los pacientes. Nos comprometemos a brindar asesoría e información oportuna al personal de compras de las organizaciones.

VALORES

Valores Sociales: Respeto, Honestidad, Integridad y Profesionalismo.

Valores Personales: Responsabilidad, Comprensión, Ética Profesional y Tolerancia.

Valores de Atención al Cliente: Accesibilidad, Confianza, Colaboración y Empatía.

Name: WOODSUN outdoor furniture
ALUMEX ALUMINUM OUTDOOR KITCHENS
Description:
Alumex מטבחי חוץ מציעה חווית בישול ואירוח של 360° בחלל החוץ, בהתאמה אישית ובפריסה ארצית.
Alumex, חברת בת של Formex (יצרנית חזיתות מעוצבות לארונות המטבח הגדולה בישראל), החלה את דרכה בשנת 2017, וכיום היא החברה המובילה בישראל בתכנון וייצור מטבחי חוץ מאלומיניום.
מדי שנה מיוצרים במפעל החברה שבגליל מאות מטבחי אלומיניום מותאמים אישית, ומותקנים בדירות ובבתים בכל רחבי הארץ – מקריית שמונה ועד אילת.
למה דווקא Alumex?

אתם במרכז
אנחנו מאמינים שמטבח חוץ מושלם מתחיל בליווי אישי, כבר מהפגישה הראשונה בסניף. לכן, חשוב לנו להבין אם מטבח החוץ מיועד רק לבישול או גם לאירוח, לאיזה חלל חוץ הוא מיועד, להכיר את ההעדפות והחלומות, לצד התקציב שעומד לרשותכם. תכנון מותאם אישית, זמינות גבוהה וליווי בכל שלב בתהליך, יאפשרו לנו לצור את מטבח החוץ האידיאלי עבורכם.

גמישות מקסימלית בתכנון ובעיצוב

הסוד למטבח חוץ מותאם אישית מתחיל בגמישות:

בתכנון ובייצור – אנחנו מייצרים מטבחים מודולריים, בכל גודל וצורה שתרצו.
בעיצוב – מגוון גוונים וטקסטורות למשטח העבודה, לחזיתות הארונות ולמסגרות הדלתות, מאפשרים לכם לעצב את מטבח החוץ בדיוק כפי שחלמתם.
במוצרים המשלימים – האבזור הנכון עבורכם, של החברות המובילות בתחום.
בעלות – בסוף, כולנו רוצים לדעת מה השורה התחתונה. הגדרתם תקציב? אנחנו נוודא שתעמדו בו.

פרקטיות
כשהמטבח מותאם אישית, אתם יכולים להיות בטוחים שהוא ישמש אתכם באופן אידיאלי, בהתאם לצרכי הבישול והאירוח שלכם.

איכות
שואלים אותנו – למה דווקא אלומיניום? ואנחנו עונים: כדי להבטיח מטבח חוץ בעל אורך חיים ארוך, עמיד בכל תנאי מזג האוויר, שישמור על מראה יוקרתי וילווה אתכם שנים קדימה.

מומחיות
ידע וניסיון בתכנון ובייצור מטבחי חוץ מאלומיניום הם שהופכים אותנו למומחים בתחום. לאורך השנים תכננו וייצרנו מטבחי חוץ עבור עשרות אלפי לקוחות מרוצים, תוך שימוש בטכנולוגיות ייצור מתקדמות.

 מטבח חוץ כבר מזמן הפך לחלק בלתי נפרד מהבית. מה אתכם?

Name: Dzūkijos baldų fabrikas | ZIN crafted furniture
Description:
Welcome to our family-owned furniture manufacturing business! 
With over three decades of experience in the industry, our founder, Zita Jakubynienė, began the company "Dzūkijos baldų fabrikas" ("Dzukijos furniture manufacture") by crafting an armchair that captivated her friends, prompting inquiries for their own pieces. 
Since then, we have become a well-regarded furniture manufacturer known for our high-quality bespoke pieces.

Our expertise in creating bespoke furniture extends to private individuals as well as commercial clients such as restaurants, hotels, and offices. We collaborate with designers and architects from around the world, and our work is regularly exhibited at international events.

Our portfolio includes a diverse range of furniture styles, from modern to luxurious, classic to exclusive, hard to soft. We use only the highest quality, environmentally friendly materials and have the necessary certifications to back up our claims. We have a wide range of fabrics, leather, and wood to choose from, allowing us to create unique pieces that perfectly match our clients' needs and preferences.

Through the years, our company has grown and expanded its operations internationally, hence in 2023, a new name has been introduced: ZIN Crafted Furniture. 
The name "ZIN" represents the first letters of our founder, Zita, and her children's names. Together, they have led the company to international success, and they are proud to sign with their names on the quality of the products company is making.

At ZIN Crafted Furniture, we continue to provide exceptional, bespoke furniture that is tailored to each client's needs, and we are excited for what the future holds.

Name: Menuiserie Indörz
Description:
Bienvenue chez Menuiserie Indörz, votre partenaire de confiance pour tous vos projets de menuiserie à Saint-Chamond, entre Saint-Étienne et Lyon. Fondée sur les solides fondations de la menuiserie Berne en juillet 2024, notre entreprise jeune et dynamique s'engage à offrir des solutions sur mesure tant pour les particuliers que pour les collectivités, écoles, promoteurs immobiliers et professionnels.

Spécialisés dans la menuiserie intérieure et extérieure, nous concevons et installons des blocs portes stratifiés ou prépeints, des fenêtres en bois, aluminium ou PVC, ainsi que des châssis vitrés simples ou doubles vitrages. Notre atelier de fabrication nous permet de créer du mobilier sur mesure en utilisant des matériaux de qualité tels que le bois massif, les panneaux dérivés du bois et le stratifié.

Nous nous distinguons par notre capacité à réaliser des projets ambitieux grâce à notre équipe qualifiée de 4 menuisiers passionnés. Utilisant des technologies de pointe telles qu'un centre d'usinage à commande numérique, nous garantissons des finitions impeccables et une précision artisanale pour chaque projet.

Soucieux de l'environnement, nous favorisons des pratiques durables en utilisant exclusivement des bois certifiés PEFC provenant de fournisseurs locaux de la région Rhône-Alpes. En parallèle, nous sommes en cours de certification RGE, renforçant ainsi notre engagement envers la qualité et l'efficacité énergétique.

Chez Menuiserie Indörz, nous croyons en l'alliance entre tradition et innovation pour transformer vos espaces en véritables œuvres d'art. Contactez-nous dès aujourd'hui pour discuter de votre prochain projet et découvrir comment nous pouvons concrétiser vos idées en réalité.

Description:

Name: AM SMART ITALY S.R.L.
Description:
AM Smart è un gruppo di aziende che operano nel settore delle attrezzature per negozi in tutta Europa. 

Siamo ben organizzati, il che ci permette di lavorare in oltre 600 negozi all'anno, in tutta Europa. Siamo presenti quotidianamente in 12 paesi e i nostri coordinatori parlano 14 lingue.

Disponiamo di un'efficiente rete di subappaltatori in Cina, Taiwan, Ucraina e Turchia, dove produciamo attrezzature per tutti i nostri grandi progetti. I nostri partner sono stabilimenti grandi e moderni che ottimizzano i costi.

Per le piccole serie, compresi i prototipi, nonché per quelle con tempi di consegna brevi, utilizziamo la nostra fabbrica situata vicino a Gorzów Wielkopolski, attrezzata con le più recenti macchine CNC e supervisionata da un team di produzione ben preparato ed esperto.

Una rete di gruppi locali di assemblaggio e coordinatori in ogni paese in cui operiamo ci consente di valutare rapidamente la fattibilità dell'implementazione di ciascun progetto e di fornire flessibilità sia in termini di portata delle operazioni che di scadenze.

Le nostre società affiliate situate in paesi al di fuori dell'Unione Europea ci consentono una grande flessibilità nel pagare le tasse doganali necessarie o nel regolare i conti con i clienti nelle valute locali.

AM Smart è un team di dipendenti esperti, tempi di produzione brevi, una propria base di trasporto, team di assemblatori collaudati e una garanzia di implementazione rapida e completa di ogni progetto.

Ogni giorno in AM Smart ci piace essere indipendenti e la risoluzione efficace dei problemi ci dà ulteriore soddisfazione. Pensando ai nostri clienti, cerchiamo soluzioni migliori e più durature, espandiamo la portata dei servizi offerti, ci preoccupiamo della qualità dei nostri prodotti e dimostriamo ogni giorno che l'impossibile non esiste.

Name: Moorgen Spain
Description:
MoorgeSpain:

Nuestros productos Smart Lock, se caracterizan por un diseño intuitivo y cómodo, con varios sistemas de reconocimiento de calidad en su funcionamiento.

Desde la clave PIN numérica, uso de tarjeta física para acceso, reconocimiento facial en 3D, reconocimiento dactilar venal de alta seguridad.

 Una app se conecta al sistema de la cerradura inteligente y gracias a ella se puede monitorizar y actuar sobre la misma. De manera que puede abrir, cerrar puertas, visualizar lo que ocurre en la entrada a su hogar. Todo ello convierte a nuestro sistema Moorgen, en la mejor opción para protección de su hogar.

La Cerradura Inteligente de Moorgen no es simplemente una cerradura digital común. Diseñada con tecnologías de vanguardia y un diseño ergonómico, la Cerradura Inteligente es el primer acceso seguro del hogar, oficina...

Moorgen es la empresa líder en hogares inteligentes en el mundo. Basada en la tecnología de algoritmos inteligentes de IA desarrollada internamente llamada MIA, Moorgen ha creado productos y sistemas para el hogar inteligentes simples, cómodos y humanizados.

Nuestra app, descargada tanto en Andoid, como en Ios, convierte al smartphone en un salvaguarda de su hogar, oficina o lugar de trabajo. Gracias a sus funciones, podrá interactuar con nuestra cerradura inteligente. 

Moorgen Spain, dispone de distintas Smart Locks o cerraduras inteligentes, que van desde la práctica y funcional T2, hasta las más avanzada T9. Modelos con reconocimiento dactilar venal de seguridad máxima y reconocimiento facial 3D.

La filosofía de Moorgen en toda la gama de sus productos, es innovar tanto en tecnología como en diseño. Por eso además de una gran ingeniería en seguridad para su hogar, un equipo de arquitectos de renombre mundial, han puesto sus innovadores diseños, para crear un producto único en el mercado de cerraduras inteligentes.

During this period, the company worked with many global brands; designed, produced, and installed over 100 000 sqm sales points in Turkey and around the world, and specialized in this industry with its experience and team.

Standart Tim, which has the know-how and skills to deal with a broad variety of materials, such as wood, acrylic, and metal, is now stepping into the retail world with their new Gaen brand. With Gaen, we aim to target the new worlds users taste with furniture and accessories that has a design value.

 

DESIGNS FOR LEISURE

Gaen presents its new collection as stand alone units, which blends in with time and space in various ways and has a character that is beyond its functions.
Our designs appeal to a wide time spectrum that avoids the repetitive details of industrial products that belongs to current trends.

We design our collection mostly in small volumes by taking into account the limited interior spaces that are imposed by urban lifestyle. We propose a new definition of luxury and give products a new design quality that will create an emotional bond with our customers.

•	Living Room: Sofas, coffee tables, side tables, TV stands, and bookshelves.
•	Dining Room: Dining tables, chairs, sideboards, and cabinets.
•	Bedroom: Beds, nightstands, dressers, and wardrobes.
•	Office: Desks, office chairs, bookshelves, and filing cabinets.

Customization:
We understand that each project is unique, which is why we offer custom furniture solutions. Whether you need a specific size, finish, or design, our team works closely with you to create pieces that perfectly fit your space and style.

Customer Commitment:

Name: Mod-Bit
Description:
What makes Mod-Bit a one stop shop for not only modular but also smart furnishing solutions is the much sought after combination of Beauty & Strength and Utility & Worthiness that our products represent.

The basic features one looks for while purchasing small or big furniture is that it should look beautiful and stay undamaged for as long as possible. Yes, we offer the same, so do a lot of others in market, too. So why should the buck stop here?

Often, when people complain of  less space in their apartments, we observed that it’s not so much the space problem, as the efficient use of it. People tend to fill their homes with furniture items that eat up more than extra & permanent space and then end scratching their scalp, wondering they should have thought twice before bringing in whatever they brought.

Our products serve the unique multi-utility purpose, with the provision of custom made furniture and furnishings solutions which makes them rid off the space issues you face in your day to day life.

Name: Al-Shark Diseño y Amoblamiento

Name: Foyers FIRE-MAX
Description:
Foyer Fire-Max est une entreprise québécoise fière de proposer des foyers extérieurs de qualité hors-pair. Tous nos produits sont fabriqués à Mirabel avec des matériaux robustes pour garantir une durabilité à toute épreuve, une résistance aux hautes températures, aux chocs et aux intempéries.

Nos foyers extérieurs sont conçus pour être aussi adaptables dans le confort de votre cour extérieure qu’aux environnements commerciaux, tels que les spas, les centres d’activités, les hôtels ou les campings.

Vous avez un projet de foyer personnalisé en tête? N'hésitez pas à nous contacter pour discuter de vos idées. Nous faisons également plusieurs articles sur mesure dont des bancs, des chaises, des tables et plus encore!

Name: Mulnem
Description:
Over Mulnem

Mulnem biedt betaalbare, circulaire en modulaire meubels die met je leven meegroeien. 

Ons doel? Duurzaam wonen toegankelijk maken voor iedereen. 
Wij ontwerpen meubels die je zelf kunt samenstellen, aanpassen en hergebruiken. 
Slimme oplossingen met oog voor de toekomst.

Onze missie is om verspilling in de meubelindustrie te verminderen en tegelijkertijd unieke, flexibele interieuroplossingen te bieden. 
Bij Mulnem geloven we in de kracht van circulariteit en gemeenschapsvorming. 

Daarom werken we niet alleen aan innovatieve meubels, maar ook aan het delen van kennis en het bouwen van een community rond duurzaam design.

Bedacht 2023 - Ontstaan 2024
Mulnem zal in 2025 verder bouwen aan ons online platform, waar je meer te weten komt over onze meubels, onze circulaire aanpak en hoe jij deel kunt uitmaken van deze beweging. 
Eveneens is er binnenkort een webshop beschikbaar.

Wat we doen:

Ontwerp en productie van modulaire meubels.
Retour- en hergebruikprogramma’s voor gebruikte meubels.
Communitybuilding en samenwerking met goede doelen.

 Volg ons voor updates! www.mulnem.eu

Adana başta olmak üzere tüm Türkiye çapında yapılan işlerle adından sıkça söz ettiren Aydoğan Ahşap ve Endüstriyel Reklamcılık 1980 yılından bu yana, mevcut durumda 4000 m² si kapalı, toplam 4500 m²’lik bir alanda tüm teknolojik olanakları kullanarak, profesyonel kimliği, mesleğinde uzmanlığı ve tecrübesiyle siz müşterilerimize kaliteli hizmet vermeyi ilke edinmiş deneyimli kadrosu ile açık hava reklamcılığının bütün öğelerini ürün portföyüne katmış olmanın haklı gururunu taşımaktadır.

Hızlı globalleşen ve rekabetin yoğun olduğu piyasalarda açıkhava reklamcılığın yarattığı olumlu fark, yadsınmaz bir gerçektir. Şirketimiz yarattığı bu fark ile birlikte pazarda sağlam, güvenilir olmayı da ilke edinmiş bulunmaktadır. Ayrıca dünyayı ve gelişen teknolojiyi de yakından takip eden şirketimiz, her zaman yenilikçi profilini ve güncellenen yüzünü de korumaktadır.

Name: Maren Chairs
Description:
Cu o experiență de peste 25 ani în domeniu, oferim calitate și #scaune ce sunt confortabile și care favorizează menținerea unei posturi sănătoase. Punem accent deosebit pe #ergonomie și oferim scaune reglabile, potrivite pentru orele lungi la birou, care nu pun la risc sănătatea clientului, ci oferă sprijin pentru corpul acestuia, pentru menținerea unei posturi corecte.
Suntem printre singurele firme din domeniu care oferă servicii de reparații și întreținere post garanție, deoarece colaborăm cu cei mai renumiți producători de scaune, de aceea deținem o gamă largă de piese de schimb originale. Pe lângă toate acestea, îmbinăm funcționalitatea cu un design aparte, ca să vă oferim o platformă care poate fi utilizată cu ușurință. Oferim scaune și mese atât pentru căminul propriu, dar și pentru școli, instituții, birouri, săli de conferințe și horeca.
Misiunea noastră este confortul dumneavoastră.
Tocmai de aceea vă invităm cu drag să aruncați o privire asupra ofertei noastre de scaune, piese de mobilier și accesorii moderne și să decideți asupra unui viitor mai bun, mai sănătos, mai comod, mai tihnit și de ce nu, mult mai modern. Corpurile noastre de mobilier vă permit să aduceți în permanență stiluri și idei noi, respectând tendințele actuale și educându-vă în mod constant cu privire la cele mai bune practici de design.

Name: Bahooth Group | Qassim Factory for Furniture
Description:
Established in 1336 AH - 1976 AD, Al-Bahouth Furniture has spent over four decades perfecting the art of furnishing. From humble beginnings importing select pieces, we’ve grown into a leading provider of comprehensive furniture solutions in Saudi Arabia. 

Our journey has seen us evolve through the phases of importing high-quality furniture from Europe, China and Turkey, to establishing our manufacturing capabilities locally under Qassim Furniture Factory brand. Today, we are proud to offer a blend of imported and locally crafted office, home, metal, medical, and hotel furniture, as well as project furnishing and computer equipment. 

Bahooth is dedicated to transforming spaces and elevating living standards through high-quality furniture design and craftsmanship. Our commitment to customization and local production sets us apart.

Name: Dumont
Description:
Established in 2010, Dumont is a family-owned and run company specializing in interior fit-outs and high-end furniture design and production.

With a strong carpentry background, we continue to pride ourselves on quality craftsmanship and meticulous attention to detail. It is from this ethos that we have come to design and develop made-to-measure woodwork and metalwork for interior spaces. Over the years, we have evolved and continued to improve our operations. We are now capable of handling end to end construction projects which includes but is not limited to metal fabrication, joinery, civil works, and general interior construction and finishing works.

We pride ourselves on achieving our clients' visions to the best of our ability and as such often go to the extent of prototyping and building bespoke furniture and fittings if necessary.

Name: PT. BAJA TIRTA SENTOSA
Description:
PT. Baja Tirta Sentosa is proud to be a leading distribution company specializing in furniture and building materials. With a focus on quality and innovation, we offer a variety of products to meet a variety of needs, including office furniture, educational furniture and residential furniture. Our offering is designed to combine functionality with aesthetic appeal, meeting the highest standards in design and durability.

In addition to furniture options, we provide a complete range of building materials, such as granite tiles, doors, sanitary ware and other premium products. Every item in our catalog is carefully selected to ensure quality and reliability, making us a trusted partner for projects of any scale. We collaborate with leading manufacturers and suppliers to provide the best solutions to our customers.

Supported by an extensive network of partners throughout Indonesia, PT. Baja Tirta Sentosa is dedicated to providing excellence. We prioritize efficiency, timeliness and superior quality in every aspect of our operations, ensuring customer satisfaction and fostering long-term relationships. Through our commitment to service and innovation, we aim to set new benchmarks in the distribution industry.

Name: Earth Corporation Viet Nam
Description:
Earth Group là một tập đoàn hàng đầu Nhật Bản về hóa chất. Được thành lập  tại Osaka (Namba) Nhật Bản bởi ông Hidezo Kimura, tập đoàn có hơn 4167 nhân viên trên toàn cầu và 9 công ty trực thuộc, hiện có mặt tại nhiều nước trên thế giới như: Nhật Bản, Trung Quốc, Thái Lan, Malaysia, Việt Nam.
Năm 2017, Earth Corporation Vietnam (ECV) được thành lập với mục đích mở rộng hoạt động của tập đoàn Earth trên toàn cầu. Công ty tập trung vào hoạt động sản xuất và phân phối các sản phẩm phòng chống côn trùng, tẩy rửa gia dụng và chăm sóc không gian.
Tiêu chí của ECV là luôn đồng hành cùng với sự phát triển của xã hội, thông qua việc cung cấp các sản phẩm chất lượng cao nhằm tạo ra sự thoải mái và an toàn về sức khỏe cho khách hàng.

Name: Tapiceria Oberon
Description:
Hola a todos los profesionales apasionados del diseño y la decoración! 

Esperamos que actualmente te encuentres rodeado de proyectos emocionantes. Queremos presentarte algo que seguramente iluminará tu día (y tus espacios!): nuestra flamante tapicería diseñada exclusivamente para profesionales como tú. 

¿Estás listo para dar vida a tus ideas? En Tapicería Oberon, estamos encantados de ofrecerte un servicio de tapicería que va más allá de las expectativas. Aquí te presentamos un adelanto de lo que traemos a la mesa:

1. Seriedad en cada puntada: Sabemos que tus proyectos son tu pasión, y nos tomamos tu éxito tan en serio como tú. Nuestro equipo dedicado está comprometido con la excelencia en cada detalle, asegurando que cada tapizado sea impecable y refleje tus visiones a la perfección.

2. Seguridad en cada elección: Entendemos la importancia de mantener tus muebles y elementos decorativos a salvo y en perfecto estado. Con nosotros, puedes confiar en que tus piezas están en manos seguras y experimentadas, utilizando los mejores materiales y técnicas para garantizar durabilidad y calidad.

3. Decoración que deja huella: Somos amantes del diseño y la belleza! Nuestro equipo no solo se enfoca en la tapicería en sí, sino en cómo esta se integra en el conjunto del diseño. Cada elección de tela, cada textura y cada color se seleccionan con la intención de realzar la estética de tus espacios de manera única y memorable.

4. Diseño que cuenta historias: Creemos que cada mueble tiene una historia que contar. Ya sea un sofá vintage o una silla contemporánea, nos encanta resaltar la personalidad de cada pieza a través de nuestro trabajo. 

En Tapicería Oberon, no solo creamos y transformamos muebles, sino que también transformamos ideas en realidad. Si estás buscando un socio confiable para llevar tus proyectos al siguiente nivel, estamos aquí para ayudarte!

Name: Letto Furniture Inc.
Description:
Transforming Hospitality Experiences Through Premium Contract Furniture Manufacturing

For over 20 years, Letto Furniture has been the trusted partner for luxury hotels, resorts, and commercial projects worldwide. Based in Bogotá, Colombia, we combine innovative design with superior manufacturing to create furniture that elevates guest experiences and reflects brand excellence.

 GLOBAL PRESENCE, LOCAL EXPERTISE
Our manufacturing facilities in Colombia serve prestigious clients across North America, Latin America, Asia, and Europe. We've earned our reputation as export leaders through consistent quality, competitive pricing, and seamless project execution.

 WHAT SETS US APART:
- Custom Contract Furniture Solutions (Case Goods, Upholstery, Outdoor Collections)
- End-to-End Project Management (Design to Installation)
- Door-to-Door Logistics & International Shipping
- Sustainable Manufacturing Practices
- Bilingual Operations (English/Spanish)

 TRUSTED BY INDUSTRY LEADERS:
From boutique hotels to international chains, we've furnished thousands of properties with furniture that combines durability, elegance, and functionality. Our portfolio spans luxury resorts, business hotels, and commercial spaces that demand excellence.

 OUR COMMITMENT:
We don't just manufacture furniture – we craft environments that tell stories, enhance comfort, and create lasting impressions. Every piece reflects our dedication to innovative design and superior quality that stands the test of time.

Contact us today for a consultation: https://www.lettofurniture.com/

Name: Gauss-Design
Description:
Le principe Gauss Design :

Ludiques et modulables à souhait, les cubes Gauss Design s'assemblent et se désassemblent avec une facilité déconcertante. Et ce grâce à un ingénieux système ne nécessitant aucun outil. Les ensembles ainsi créés seront à l'image de chacun.

Développé par Gauss Design, un astucieux système de fixation combinant deux technologies assure un positionnement parfait et sécurisé, mais jamais figé.

En fonction des envies et du moment, ils sauront facilement se métamorphoser. Seule votre imagination saura en fixer les limites. La définition du cube lui même n'est pas en reste: avec ou sans fond, de couleurs identiques ou différentes et toujours sans outils. Vous faites évoluer vos cubes en fonction de vos besoins.

Polyvalence et personnalisation n'auront jamais été aussi simples.

Name: ERMIS AS
Description:
Since our founding in 1954, Ermiş A.Ş. has been dedicated to serving the furniture industry with both heart and expertise. What began as a provider of wood-based materials has evolved into a leading supplier of RTA furniture, kitchen cabinets, bathroom solutions, and contract projects. We proudly support a diverse range of clients, including residential buildings, hotels, hospitals, schools, and DIY store chains. 

Our commitment to quality and efficiency is evident in our modern facility, which spans 10,000 sqm in the Izmir Pancar Organized Industrial Zone. Here, we combine tradition with innovation, using advanced tools and CAD/CAM software IMOS to craft exceptional products. We are also proud to be the Aegean region distributor for Egger panels and the Turkish distributor for Holz in Form panels.

We are proud to be a production partner for some of the most esteemed local brands in kitchen and bathroom furniture, providing high-quality, custom solutions. Our focus is on delivering personalized service and exceptional value to every client. We are excited to extend our expertise and offer our services to potential new partners who share our commitment to excellence and craftsmanship.

Name: Newline Limited Nairobi-Kenya
Description:
Newline has been established in Nairobi on 1998 with the objective of being one of the foremost furniture manufacture in the Kenyan with modular furniture concept.

Newline Limited is a Manufacturer of followings.

•	Office Furniture; Office Desks & Chairs, that range from Executive to Secretarial, Work Stations, Conference Chairs and Tables, Auditorium Seats, Reception Area furniture.
•	 Commercial Interior; Shop fit-outs, wall claddings, hospital, dormitories, guest houses, complete hotel furnishing, institution, school furnishing and almost any furniture manufacturing and assembling, including CNC works.
•	 Kitchen Cabinets, Bedroom Wardrobes & Bathroom Units are manufactured and assembled according to our customers’ needs, fully customized. Wide range of several brands of Electric Appliances from worldwide are also supplied. 
•	 Home Furniture; TV-Cabinets, units, wall units, Coffee Tables, Sofas, Sofa Beds, Bed, Bedside Cabinets, Shoe Racks, Dining Tables, Ottomans, Book Shelves, Dresser, Vanities, Ironing Tables, Baby Beds, etc. are some of home furniture items.
•	 House Products; Windows, Internal Doors, Laminated Floors and Aluminum Railing which can be used for stairwells, balconies, bathrooms, etc. 

THE BENEFITS (of being a manufacturer in Kenya)
•	Contribution to the economy of Kenya, by employing more than 100 local employees, and Contribution to the development of Kenya with the taxes paid.
•	As a European manufacturer in Kenya, the highest quality furniture is provided for customers. The furniture is manufactured that meets Kenyan Standards (KEBS) under European concept.
•	Manufacturing is done as customized to meet customers' needs and preferences, exactly.
•	Manufacturing locally gives gives shortest lead time.
•	Product selection, design and plan set up, sample products, production, transportation and assembly activities, after-sales services... are all done under the same roof. Experience the advantage of domestic production with European Quality.

Name: Madero Style
Description:
En Madero Style diseñamos y fabricamos muebles de interior a medida, fusionando estética, funcionalidad y calidad. Creamos soluciones personalizadas que se adaptan a las necesidades, estilos y espacios de cada cliente.

Trabajamos con materiales de alta calidad, cuidando cada detalle desde el diseño hasta la instalación final. Nuestros productos incluyen placares, vestidores, muebles de cocina, vanitorys, escritorios, bibliotecas, muebles de TV, recibidores y soluciones inteligentes para optimizar espacios.

Atendemos tanto a clientes particulares como a estudios de arquitectura, diseñadores de interiores y empresas constructoras, ofreciendo un servicio profesional, confiable y con atención personalizada.

Nuestro diferencial está en el compromiso con cada proyecto: escuchamos, asesoramos y acompañamos para que cada mueble refleje la identidad y funcionalidad que cada espacio merece.

Name: SCTB - Société Congolaise de Transformation de Bois
Description:
La SCTB est une société congolaise basé au Congo à Brazzaville et spécialisé dans la transformation du bois, de la planche brute à la création de divers produits finis, adaptés à des besoins variés.

Notre mission est de concevoir et produire des meubles uniques, durables et élégants qui allient artisanat traditionnel, innovation moderne et respect de l’environnement afin d’améliorer les espaces de vie et de travail de nos clients.

Nous valorisons le bois congolais en sublimant sa transformation, pour des créations aussi fonctionnelles qu’esthétiques tout en contribuant au développement économique et durable de la région.

Nous nous engageons à fabriquer des meubles durables en utilisant des matériaux éthiques, à protéger les forêts en choisissant du bois certifié, et à soutenir nos artisans et communautés locales.

Name: ELIO HOME
Description:
Founded in 1995, ELIO HOME is a leading Ukrainian manufacturer of premium furniture. The company has developed and integrated new technological know-how’s into production improving its own recognizable brand. ELIO HOME operates a factory spanning 7,000 square meters, staffed by 210 highly skilled employees. Quality control and attention to every detail form the fundamental principles of the company’s work. 

Our visiting card is the One Space Concept. It allows designers to operate with visual and geometric elements and forms widely to implement a project of any complexity. Designers customize factory furniture to fit the individual sizes and needs of each project by choosing from the company's catalog of product models, textures, colors, etc. while maintaining a single interior concept. Subtle aesthetics, natural tactility, and durability are incorporated into every detail of ELIO HOME furniture. 

ELIO HOME operates in three primary areas:

Custom projects. Enabling the implementation of ambitious design ideas for architectural & design bureaus worldwide.
Dealer network. Distributing an established line of platform products throughout Ukraine.
Corporate sales. Serving both domestic and international markets.

ELIO HOME offers a complete range of furniture and interior solutions: 

Interior doors and sliding partitions
Wall panels
Wardrobe systems
Chests of drawers
Showcases
Kitchen furniture
Bathroom furniture

The competitive advantages of ELIO HOME are:

Leading German equipment 
A wide range of natural materials: glass, stone, wood, metal, leather, and textiles.
Aesthetics and functionality of the furniture
Laser 3D measurements, allowing our clients all over the world to create virtual interior tours. 
					
ELIO HOME invites cooperation with residential real estate developers,   construction and repair companies, HoReCa segment entities, and design bureaus.

If you are looking for a unique interior design for your clients, don't hesitate to contact us!

Name: Himachali Industries
Description:
At Himachali Industrie, we focus on transforming recycled plastic sheets into high-quality, eco-friendly furniture, addressing the critical issue of plastic waste while promoting sustainable solutions. Our efforts target both B2B and B2C markets, emphasizing collaborations with municipal corporations and residential developments.
Our partnership with municipal bodies centers on providing sustainable furniture for public spaces, parks, and community centers, fostering inviting and environmentally responsible areas for residents. In the residential sector, our products enable homeowners to furnish their living spaces in a way that reflects a commitment to sustainability.
We are dedicated to reducing carbon footprints through our operations. By utilizing recycled materials, we decrease energy consumption and support a circular economy. Our belief is that sustainable products can be both high-quality and aesthetically pleasing. Thus, our furniture is designed to be durable, stylish, and suitable for various settings.
We actively pursue partnerships with parks and recreational facilities to assist in their transition to eco-friendly materials, providing innovative designs that cater to outdoor and indoor environments alike. This versatility ensures our offerings meet a wide range of functional needs while promoting sustainability.
Looking ahead, we aim to expand our reach and influence by forming additional partnerships and enhancing our product lineup to align with evolving consumer demands and environmental imperatives. By choosing our recycled plastic furniture, clients not only acquire functional products but also participate in an essential movement toward sustainability and responsible living.
Join us as we embrace eco-friendly initiatives and work toward a greener future. For more information about our products and potential collaboration opportunities, please reach out or visit our website.

Name: OHD - Office & Hotels Directs s.r.o.
Description:
Od roku 1996 pomáhame klientom a zákazníkom vytvárať estetické, príjemné a zdravé prostredie pre ich prácu, život, efektivitu a príjemný pocit z tvorenia. Prinášame na trh nové myšlienky a koncepty, ktoré zlepšujú pracovné podmienky, komunikáciu a interakciu medzi tímami.

Majiteľom a konateľom spoločnosti je Ing. Vladimír Rečlo, ktorý v roku 2003 zmenil formu a názov spoločnosti na Office Direct s.r.o.  Naďalej sa venovala predaju kancelárskeho nábytku svetovej jednotky vo výrobe nábytku spoločnosti Steelcase. Portfólio služieb v roku 2005 rozšírila o atypovú výrobu nábytku do hotelových zariadení, zmenila názov na Office & Hotels Direct, spol. s r.o. a rozšírila svoj tím.

K zdravému a funkčnému pracovnému prostrediu okrem kancelárskeho nábytku patrí aj zdravé sedenie a nejde len o ergonómiu, preto v roku 2006 sme v OHD začali predávať zdravé dynamické sedenie. Samotnú ergonómiu a zdravé prostredie ovplyvňujú aj ďalšie aspekty, ktoré postupne pribúdali a my sme tak mohli dodať klientovi komplexnú službu, vďaka ktorej sa bude lepšie cítiť, podávať vyššie výkony a odchádzať z práce zdravší.

V roku 2011 sme pripojili k  našej činnosti Osvetlenie, neskôr v roku 2012 – Akustiku a v roku 2016 – Zdravý vzduch, www.zdravycistyvzduch.sk. Našim poslaním je priniesť na trh inovatívne riešenia v oblasti interiérového dizajnu, optimalizovať a ozdraviť pracovný priestor čo prispeje k úspechu nášho klienta. Zdravý pracovný priestor, komfortné kancelárie ale aj  WorkCafé a neformálne zasadacie priestory prispejú k udržaniu skvelých a spokojných pracovníkov.

Prinášame riešenia od návrhu po realizáciu hotelových, administratívnych, konferenčných a reprezentatívnych interiérov. OHD Pracujte v pohodlí, je výhradný dovozca svetového lídra Steelcase na Slovensku. Okrem spoločnosti Steelcase, spolupracujeme s výrobcami nábytku ako sú: Coalesse, Narbutas, Gotessanss a iné. Aktívne sedenie aeris, zdravý vzduch ZoneAir3D, či osvetlenie Erco.
Location: Nové Mesto - Bratislava, Region of Bratislava

Name: Proyecto DMDR - Carpintería de Aprovechamiento
Description:
Proyecto DMDR es una iniciativa de economía circular que nace para preservar y potenciar la masa forestal local y reutilizar madera ya existente, a través de la carpintería de aprovechamiento. Cuando no dispongo de madera usada para realizar los proyectos, utilizo madera con certificado sostenible. Lo importante es dar una segunda vida a la madera ya existente y evitar que acabe en vertederos y se estropee y se desaproveche. Con el tiempo, el objetivo es crear y gestionar bosques locales para uso y disfrute comunitario y que sirvan de abastecimiento sostenible de madera.
Algunos de los ODS que potencia Proyecto DMDR son ODS12, ODS13, ODS8, ODS15, ODS11.

Name: Meubles Thouret
Description:
Une entreprise c'est avant tout une histoire, une équipe, une philosophie, un savoir faire et un désir de satisfaire. 
Meubles Thouret est né en 2000 et compte aujourd'hui 4 salariés et 2 apprentis. 
Notre activité principale est l'agencement intérieur. Nous sommes capables de réponde à toutes les demandes puisque nous travaillons sur mesure et tout est entièrement fabriqué dans notre atelier. 
En parallèle de cette activité, nous développons une gamme de mobilier en bois déchiré, un procédé unique de fabrication dont nous seuls avons le secret. Plus de 5 ans de recherche et d'expérimentation nous ont été nécessaires pour atteindre ce niveau de maîtrise du bois et de la résine. 
Le respect de la tradition et la maîtrise de matériaux nouveaux, voilà les maître mots qui anime notre entreprise familiale.

Name: AM SMART SP. Z O.O.
Description:
AM Smart to grupa firm działająca w branży sklepów na terenie całej Europy.

Jesteśmy dobrze zorganizowani, a to pozwala nam prowadzić prace w ponad 600 sklepach w ciągu roku, w całej Europie. Na co dzień jesteśmy obecni w 12 krajach, a nasi koordynatorzy rozmawiają w 14 językach.

Posiadamy sprawnie działającą sieć podwykonawców w Chinach, na Taiwanie, Ukrainie i w Turcji, gdzie produkujemy wyposażenie dla wszystkich dużych realizowanych przez nas projektów. Nasi partnerzy to duże, nowoczesne fabryki optymalizujące koszty.

Przy małych seriach, również prototypowych, a także tych z krótkim terminem realizacji korzystamy z własnej, zlokalizowanej w pobliżu Gorzowa Wielkopolskiego fabryki wyposażonej w najnowsze maszyny CNC i nadzorowanych przez doskonale przygotowany, doświadczony zespół produkcyjny.  

Sieć lokalnych ekip montażowych i koordynatorów w każdym kraju w którym działamy pozwalają nam na szybkie rozeznanie możliwości realizacji każdego projektu  i elastyczność zarówno w zakresie skali działania jak i terminów realizacji. 

Nasze spółki córki zlokalizowane w krajach poza Unią Europejską pozwalają nam na dużą elastyczność w zakresie regulowania niezbędnych opłat celnych, czy prowadzenia rozliczeń z klientem w lokalnych walutach. 

AM Smart to zespól doświadczonych pracowników, krótkie terminy produkcji, własna baza transportowa, sprawdzone zespoły montażystów i gwarancja szybkiej, oraz kompleksowej realizacji każdego projektu.

Na co dzień w AM Smart lubimy być samodzielni, a skuteczne rozwiazywanie problemów daje nam dodatkową satysfakcję. Z myślą o naszych klientach poszukujemy lepszych i trwalszych rozwiązań, poszerzamy zakres oferowanych usług, dbamy o jakość naszych produktów i każdego dnia udowadniamy, że niemożliwe nie istnieje.

• wózki kelnerskie, platformy transportowe, kosze

Stal nierdzewna doskonale sprawdza się w profesjonalnych kuchniach ze względu na jej wysoką odporność na działanie różnych środków chemicznych i organicznych, jak również czynników towarzyszących gotowaniu.

Niezwykle trwały materiał, a także spawana technologia wykonania gwarantują funkcjonalny produkt, który z powodzeniem będzie służył przez wiele lat, podnosząc efektywność pracy w kuchni.

Większość z produkowanych przez nas modeli można zamówić w niestandardowych wymiarach lub uwzględniających inne, indywidulane oczekiwania w zakresie wykończenia i wymiarowania.

Oferujemy najkrótsze w Polsce terminy realizacji zamówień oraz atrakcyjne i konkurencyjne
ceny, przy jednoczesnym zachowaniu wysokiej jakości wykonania i materiałów.

Działamy na rynku od ponad 20 lat zdobywając zaufanie klientów o ugruntowanej pozycji na rynku.

W naszym portfolio znajdziesz wiele zrealizowanych projektów, które ukazują naszą pasję, zaangażowanie i kreatywność.

Description:
TU MESITA es una marca peruana dedicada al diseño y fabricación de muebles modernos, funcionales y 100% personalizables. Nuestro propósito es transformar espacios con piezas únicas, pensadas para reflejar el estilo y las necesidades de cada persona.

En un mercado saturado de muebles genéricos, apostamos por la personalización total: tú eliges el color, tamaño, acabado y funcionalidades, y nosotros lo hacemos realidad. Desde escritorios y tocadores, hasta aparadores y espejos con diseño contemporáneo, cada mueble TU MESITA es una pieza con identidad.

Ofrecemos:
 Muebles a medida y hechos bajo pedido
 Asesoría en línea con nuestra arquitecta para diseñar tu mueble desde cero
 Entrega en Lima Metropolitana, armados y listos para usar
 Venta directa por WhatsApp y canales digitales

Trabajamos con materiales de alta calidad y diseño de tendencia, combinando estética y funcionalidad con una experiencia de compra cercana, humana y confiable.

Tú traes la idea, nosotros la diseñamos.
Bienvenido a una nueva forma de amoblar con personalidad.

Logística, Limpeza & Higienização e Pequenas Implantações, a Squadra Ufficio é a melhor parceria para o seu negócio.

Name: Interieurspuiterij Oreni
Description:
Spuitwerk voor de zakelijke markt
Professioneel spuitwerk voor interieurs, meubels en jachten – laat dat maar aan Interieurspuiterij Oreni over. Al ruim 25 jaar zijn wij dé spuiterij voor u als professionele gebruiker. Wij leveren maatwerk spuitwerk van woning- en winkelinrichting, betimmeringen van jachten en serieproducties. 

Denk hierbij aan bijvoorbeeld receptiebalies, lambrizeringen, plafonddelen en winkelschappen. Via interieurbouwers spuiten wij onder meer voor gerenommeerde hotelketens, jachtbouwers en meubelontwerpers. Wij werken vooral voor bedrijven in Noord-Holland, Zuid-Holland en Utrecht.

Spuitwerk voor particulieren
Ook particuliere gebruikers weten ons steeds vaker te vinden. Als u uw keuken wilt laten overspuiten bijvoorbeeld. Of uw eetkamerstoelen of andere meubels. Wij helpen u graag! 

Uw spuitwerk snel van deur tot deur
Het meeste spuitwerk is binnen twaalf werkdagen leverbaar. U kunt uw artikelen bij ons afleveren – maar wij kunnen u het vervoer ook uit handen nemen. Neem contact met ons op voor meer informatie of voor een offerte op maat.

Name: Trio Line Polska Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Jesteśmy Trio Line Polska sp. z o.o., jednym z największych europejskich producentów mebli, specjalizujemy się w tapicerowaniu i montażu wysokiej klasy towarów oraz w produkcji wysokiej jakości stelaży stalowych, w szczególności do krzeseł i foteli. Produkujemy meble dla najbardziej rozpoznawalnych europejskich marek - najbardziej kultowym z nich jest Egg Chair wyprodukowany dla Fritz Hansen.

Jesteśmy również częścią, założonego w 1883 roku, amerykańskiego przedsiębiorstwa meblowego Leggett & Platt Work Furniture. Dzięki globalnemu zasięgowi, który obejmuje międzynarodową produkcję, rozwój produktów, dystrybucję i sprzedaż, mamy strategiczną pozycję, aby wspierać producentów mebli tapicerowanych na całym świecie.

Combinamos conocimientos de carpintería y maquinaria CNC con para conseguir muebles de gran complejidad y calidad.
Nuestros servicios van desde el diseño en 3D, la preparación de materiales, el mecanizado CNC y el acabado de muebles.
Nos encontramos en un continuo proceso de repensar la fabricación digital 
--
Teks is an experience Digital Carpintery Company; that focuses on furniture projects in the areas of design, architecture, and art. From prototyping to high-volume jobs.
We combine CNC machinery with carpentry knowledge to achieve high-quality furniture.
Our services range from 3d designing, material preparation, CNC machining, and furniture finishing.
We are in a continuous process of rethinking digital manufacturing.

Description:
Bilgiye, Kaliteye, Ustalığa Güvenin
Sizi anlayalım kusursuz hizmet sunalım.
 
Türk Mobilya Tasarım Müşteri  beklentilerine ve  insan ergonomisine uygun estetik tasarımlar  yapmak ve bu tasarımları müşterilerin beğenisine sunmaktadır. Müşteri beklentilerine uygun ,özel ev mobilyaları, ofis mobilyaları, restaurantlar, oteller ve çeşitli mekanlar Proje ve Tasarımlar gerçekleştirmektedir. Kalite yönetimi ilkeleri doğrultusunda ürün kalitesini yükselterek müşteri memnuniyetini üst seviyede sağlamak bizim kalite politikamızdır.
 
Özel ev mobilyaları, ofis mobilyaları, restaurantlar, oteller,hastaneler ve çeşitli mekanlar modern, kullanışlı, iyi dizayn edilmiş verimi olumlu yönde çok iyi artırdığının bilincindedir. Bunun için de Türk Mobilya Tasarım firmalara, otel ve hastanelere, ofislere uygun model ve tasarımlar sunar, bu model ve tasarımlara uygun büro mobilyaları, özel ev mobilyaları otel ve hastaneler için gerekli aksesuarları temin ederek müşterilerinin güzel bir mekan için gerekli tüm  ihtiyaçlarını karşılar. Mobilya sektöründe seçkin marka ve modellerdeki ürünleri müşterilerine teklif olarak sunarak aldığı teklifleri zamanında ve  sözleşmeye uyarak gerçekleştirmekte hatta müşterilerinin beklentilerinin üzerinde doğru ve güzel işler çıkararak müşteri memnuniyetini  kazanmaktadır.
 
Müşterilerinin mekanlarını renklendirmekte, onlar için rahat , harekete geçirici, performans saglayıcı, onların değerlerine değer katıcı mobilyalar üretmektedir.Tek yapmanız gereken ”projeniz veya özel üretim” talebinizi, varsa örnek tasarımlar ve fotoğraflar ile birlikte, info@turkmobilyatasarim.com mail adresinden bize ulaştırmanız….

Name: Mehrez Kream
Description:
Mehrez Krema is an Egyptian company; founded by Dr. Khaled Mehrez and Dr. Hanan Krema, and dedicated to the design and manufacture of furniture and decoration elements that are marked by a unique flavour of tradition. The designs of Mehrez Krema adopt a variety of styles; namely the Ancient Egyptian, Islamic, Folkloric, Calligraphic, Ethnic, Neo Classic, Art Deco, and even Mythology. Mixing any of these styles with an aspect of modernity; we reach a formula of quality, practicality, and creativity, as well as cost-effectiveness.

At Mehrez Krema, we cooperate with our clients to fulfil their own ideas, needs, and personal preferences; which act as our guideline as we work. We create full ambiances with our own furniture designs, decorative items, wall claddings, doors, and dressings. Caring to complement our setups, Mehrez Krema also offers lighting items, home accessories, artworks, and sculptures. We selectively-choose all of our materials, textiles, furniture hardware, and lighting elements from all over the world. This is based on our thorough understanding of every market specialty and our long-term know-how of the means to acquire optimum quality while still maintaining cost-effectiveness.

By offering full furniture and furnishing solutions that suit nowadays’ living spaces while complying with the global trends; Mehrez Krema’s designs meet the needs of the community’s high class intellectuals; mostly newlyweds, who are aware of ongoing trends and seek the simplicity of modernity with the essence of tradition, art, and creativity in design.

Name: De Leeuw Interieurbouw
Description:
Welkom bij De Leeuw Interieurbouw, waar uw ruimte onze creatieve canvas vormt. Sinds onze oprichting in 1985 hebben wij ons als toonaangevende specialisten in full concept interieurprojecten ingezet om elk detail vanaf de conceptontwikkeling tot de uiteindelijke realisatie te beheersen. Onze expertise omvat een breed scala aan sectoren, waaronder levendige horecazaken, dynamische retailomgevingen, professionele kantoorinrichtingen en stijlvolle woningen.

Wij bieden sectorgerichte expertise waarmee we functionele en inspirerende ruimtes creëren, aangepast aan de behoeften van elk type bedrijf of woonruimte. Ons proces omvat een complete projectuitvoering; van de eerste schets tot de laatste afwerking regelen wij alles zodat uw project vlekkeloos verloopt. Ons moderne machinepark stelt ons in staat om met precisie en efficiëntie te werken, en we kiezen altijd voor hoogwaardige materialen en innovatieve technieken om de beste resultaten te garanderen.

Het hart van De Leeuw Interieurbouw is ons team van jonge, gedreven professionals. Elke dag zetten zij zich in om de dromen van onze klanten werkelijkheid te maken, met een onwankelbare passie voor elk project. We zijn niet alleen uw interieurbouwers; we zijn uw partners in het creëren en realiseren van unieke, persoonlijke ruimtes.
