Name: Delite Kom Limited
Description:
Delite Kom Ltd. is one of the leading furniture manufacturers in the country today. The company was founded by the promoters of Delite Safe Works (estb:1958).
Due to our rich industry experience of 60+ years in the market, we at Delite Kom, understand the diverse requirements of our clients. Our endeavour as a significant part of the furniture market is to deliver high-quality, progressive, and innovative design solutions for all furniture requirements under one roof.
The company has a very futuristic vision and a systematic approach to the workflow, starting right from the enquiry of an order to its delivery.
We provide a comprehensive range of office and home furniture, which consists of a varied collection of products. Our office furniture includes items like partition systems, tables, chairs, storage cabinets, almirahs, lockers, compactors, and lab furniture. On the other hand, our home furniture range includes beds, study tables, coffee tables, modular steel wardrobes, kitchens, steel shoe racks, and more. Our products are not only known for their durability and functionality but also, are developed keeping the style and modernity quotient in mind.
We are passionate about continuously improving our products and services to enhance the user experience. Our manufacturing plants are equipped with state-of-the-art technology and modern machinery. The commitment we bestow towards attention-to-detail is evident in all aspects of our furniture manufacturing processes. This has led us to achieve the highest quality standards in the sector, which are GRIHA, BIFMA, ISO 9001:2000, ISO 14001:2004, and ISO 18001 certification.

We have an extensive dealer network spread across India. Our products have a strong presence in Government Ministries and Departments, Public Sectors Undertakings, Banks, Insurance Companies, Educational Institutions, Hospitals, Multinational Companies, Private Sectors, and the Retail Sector. We are also registered with GEM, CPWD, PWD, Kendra etc.

Name: Temur Architecure
Description:
TEMUR ARCHITECTURE was founded in 2005 by Mr. Gurkan Temur in Istanbul Turkey. We as a team are a solution oriented and multi disciplinary architectural and interior design company with the principals; creativity, quality and perfection.

As a creative service company our mission is to go further and make innovations happen.

We have been creating projects to many companies in many different concepts with an experienced and creative team for both architectural and interior design.

TEMUR is a concept producing factory, with a happy team equals to happy customers philosophy. The ideas are realized with the best timing, cost and quality solutions and we exist as a part of the corporate existence of our customers throughout the project.

Our diverse approach is international and will be spreading wider through all over the world


PROFESSIONAL SERVICES
- Architectural Design (Master planning,  analysis, research, concept,  planning and layouts , 3D modelling and renderings)
- Interior Design (Analysis, research, strategy, concept design, space planning and layouts, selection of materials and finishes, selection of furniture, detailed custom furniture design, lighting design)
- Conceptual Architectural Design
- Project Management (Financial Consultancy, cost analysis and feasibility report)
- Exhibitions (Concept design, detailed design of the booth, selection of materials and finishes, lighting design, assistance during the setting)

Name: Grama Blend GmbH
Description:
Aus der wertvollen Ressource Naturstein fertigen wir wunderbar filigranes und elegantes Leichtbau-Interieur, auch kombiniert mit Massivstein, für den stilvollen und exklusiven Innenausbau von Gebäuden oder mobilen Objekten.

Modernste CNC-basierte Fertigungstechnologie sorgt für ein Höchstmaß an Präzision und Effizienz in der Fertigung. Die sorgfältige Veredlung in traditioneller Handarbeit gibt unseren Produkten die ganz besondere Note. Von Sulzbach-Rosenberg in der Oberpfalz aus in alle Welt bieten wir unseren anspruchsvollen Kunden eine lückenlose Rund-um-Betreuung – von der Planung über die Fertigung bis hin zur Vorkonfektionierung.

Wo immer Individualität und Eleganz durch den Einsatz hochwertigster Materialien ihren Ausdruck finden sollen, ist grama blend erste Wahl. Und das nun schon seit 1990.

We use the valuable resource of natural stone to produce wonderfully delicate and elegant lightweight interiors, also combined with solid stone, for the stylish and exclusive interior design of buildings or mobile objects.

State-of-the-art CNC-based production technology ensures maximum precision and efficiency in production. Careful finishing in traditional craftsmanship gives our products that very special touch. From Sulzbach-Rosenberg in the Upper Palatinate, we offer our discerning customers seamless all-round support all over the world - from planning and production to prefabrication.

Wherever individuality and elegance are to be expressed through the use of the highest quality materials, grama blend is the first choice. And has been since 1990.

Name: Zenith Porcelain
Description:
Zenith Porcelain is the World's New Countertop Bathroom Brand.

Zenith Porcelain aims to become a leader in the porcelain surface industry by capturing a significant market share through innovative production and service approaches. Our mission is to provide high-quality products and establish a comprehensive service network across Turkey to maximize customer satisfaction.

Zenith Porcelain is not limited to kitchen countertops and bathroom surfaces; we also focus on expanding the use of porcelain surfaces in the furniture industry. Our products are suitable for a wide range of applications, including furniture surfaces, kitchen cabinets, coffee tables, dining tables, and all visible wooden surfaces. This diverse product range brings the durability and aesthetic appeal of natural stone to living spaces.

By leveraging the power of being a manufacturer, we are committed to offering hygienic and long-lasting porcelain solutions to our customers. Our production capacity and technological infrastructure allow us to provide flexible products and services that meet all industry needs. This approach not only meets customer demands but also provides custom designs and solutions that help our clients stand out in the competitive market.

Zenith Porcelain strives to be the top choice for kitchen, bathroom, and furniture manufacturers across Turkey by offering high-quality materials, innovative designs, and professional installation services that combine aesthetics and functionality in living spaces.

Our vision is to lead the industry with these strategies and deliver top-quality services to our customers, securing a lasting leadership position in the market.

We will design and manufacture for you sinks, kitchen sinks, bathtubs,coffee tables, vases, planters, amphorae, columns, balustrades, pedestals, bowls, dining tables, statues and everything else you can imagine, all from various types of natural stone.

We deliver to the EU and beyond.
Contact us and let us know your wishes!

Name: Mobishield BV
Description:

Dankzij het vertrouwen en de steun van onze klanten konden we deze belangrijke stap zetten. Voor onze klanten verandert er weinig – sterker nog, ze profiteren van een nóg professioneler en krachtiger product én dienstverlening.

Ons assortiment, net zoals ons team, blijft bovendien flink groeien.
Bij Mobishield beschermen we niet langer alleen scootmobielen tegen het weer, diefstal en brand, maar bieden we nu ook oplossingen voor een breed scala aan andere vervoermiddelen, zoals bakfietsen, driewielers, duofietsen en meer.

Ons doel blijft onveranderd: alles doen om mensen, inclusief de hulpbehoevenden, zorgeloos op pad te sturen.
Met een groeiend aanbod en een sterk team kijken we uit naar de toekomst, waarin we samen met onze klanten nog vele mooie meters vooruit gaan maken.
Smart, Safe & Secure.
Team Mobishield

Made by hand
För 20 år sen startade Lars Carlsson och Niklas Hult företaget DuoBad. Idén var att mixa småländsk möbeltradition med exklusiv badrumsdesign. Båda hade redan ett långt förflutet i branschen med kunskaper kring både material, design och konstruktion.
Småländsk hantverkstradition har i århundrade varit en grogrund för en framgångsrik möbeltillverkning. Här har yrket och kunskapen om trä förts vidare mellan generationer. Ursprunget är en övertygelse om att trä som material är överlägset alla andra alternativ. Massiva möbler håller i evighet. Dessutom blir de ofta bara vackrare med åren. Våra egna serier är tillverkade  i hållbara material från svenska skogar av hantverkare som vet hur man få möbler att trivas i tuffa miljöer. Tack vare vår hantverksmässiga produktion så kan vi även erbjuda speciallösningar som höjer kundnyttan.

Name: CurveMinder
Description:
Canada's employment rate stands at 62.40%. Many
workers in Canada spend a lot of hours at their desks.
Students also spend many hours without moving on chairs.
Wrong sitting and sleeping habits can cause skeletal
damage to people. One of the most important problems in
the workplace (having a seated position for employees) is
the wrong position of employees. One of the most
important reasons for creating a false posture is the
unconscious movement of the person forward.
The office and student chair cannot be a completely
ergonomic product. But technological and ergonomic ideas
can be used to reduce skeletal problems.
The problem we want to solve is the problem of not
knowing the wrong and dangerous shape of their spine
while sitting.

Name: La Ebanistería
Description:
LA EBANISTERIA fue creada como taller en 1968 en Talavera de la Reina.  El nombre de la empresa fue originariamente el de su fundador Felipe Sánchez Vázquez, ebanista de espíritu emprendedor que pronto alcanzó renombre fabricando muebles a medida, desde exquisitas boisseries, con las más variadas maderas y chapas, hasta dormitorios de estilo moderno.  Cualquier proyecto era un reto.  

A mediados de los 80 y con la incorporación de la segunda generación el taller comienza a convertirse en una pequeña fábrica.  En el año 1995 se inaugura parte de lo que hoy es la fábrica actual, con unas instalaciones de 9.000 m2 donde conviven las mejores maquinarias de última tecnología y calificados maestros ebanistas.  Afortunadamente, todavía quedan muchas cosas que solo pueden ser hechas con la mano del hombre.

Name: Palomar Rowe Furniture Co.
Description:
Palomar Rowe Furniture Co. is a boutique custom furniture maker catering to commercial and residential projects, based in Brookvale on Sydney’s Northern Beaches.

Founded by Lyle Stedman and Hayley Miller, Palomar Rowe embodies an agelessness inspired by mid-century form, materials and craftsmanship; ‘back then’, designs were deliberate and thoughtful, the handiwork was respected and sought-after, and people wanted to buy well and collect substance as well as style.

Our mission is to source interesting materials and retro-inspired elements - not copies - to create furniture solutions that deliver modern functionality and style without replicating trends.

We can build almost anything for your commercial space: point-of-sale counters, clothing racks and boutique product displays for retail fit-outs; venue wine racks, tabletops, bars and counters; and boardroom tables, custom desks and shelving for the office. 

Our commercial work is fast, solid, well-made, and competitive. We’re also local, and that makes us nimble. We’ve met tight deadlines that others have passed up and we’re innovative thinkers, which means we’ll work tirelessly with you to find solutions for those tricky issues that inevitably arise. The best bit is, by choosing local for your build, you’re not only serving your community with great products and experiences, you’re also contributing to its growth.

When it comes to pieces for the home, our Residential custom builds are flavoured by how excited and determined we are to make something that looks, feels and functions like the family it belongs to. 

We know the options now for ‘affordable’ furniture are endless, but often the pieces families settle for are band-aid solutions - they don’t fit the long-term brief, so the survival rate in the home is low. Palomar Rowe is determined to help end this cycle! We listen and collaborate, then we get to work building pieces that stand the test of time (and family mayhem!).

Name: ELMAX
Description:
Elmax is a manufacturer of furniture for stores. We offer services based in particular on the production of shop and exhibition furniture (stands, displays, shop shelves), sometimes we also make furniture for HORECA. For years, we have been producing and painting from MDF, chipboard, veneer and solid wood. The vast majority of our orders are commissioned by the client, each project is different. We produce based on the technical drawings provided.

Elmax is a family company with a long tradition that dates back to 1999. Our first headquarters was located in Rumia, just outside Gdynia. However, due to the rapid increase in production needs, we were forced to move to a much larger area.

In 2007, we completed the construction of a production hall and an office in Reda at 10 Warzywnicza Street, where we operate continuously to this day.

Our company consists of several qualified employees who every day fulfill orders for the world's largest companies. We have advanced machinery thanks to which we are able to ensure safer, faster and even more accurate work.

Our machinery consists of modern numerically controlled machines. These are two machining centers (Homag and Masterwood) and a Herr-holz edge bander. Elmax can also boast of having an automatic warehouse for furniture boards connected to a saw. This improves the operation of the entire production line by eliminating the need to carry entire sheets of boards. We varnish large batches using a varnishing machine located in the second branch.

**About us:**  
KIS PRODUKT d.o.o. is a family-owned manufacturing and trading company, established in 1993. With many years of experience in the industry, we specialize in the production and trade of various types of furniture and products made from metal and wood.

**Our vision:**

Un prodotto capace di impedire che le porte si chiudano sbattendo e danneggiando le pareti o incastrando le dita. Un prodotto che consente di migliorare la ventilazione della casa senza dover tenere aperte la porta con il piede o con un oggetto pesante.

I nostri fermaporta di alta qualità sono la soluzione perfetta per tenere le porte aperte o chiuse quando necessario. Realizzati con materiali sostenibili, i nostri fermaporta sono progettati per resistere anche alle porte più pesanti e possono prevenire danni a pareti e pavimenti. Il fondo antiscivolo garantisce che i nostri fermaporta rimangano al loro posto e non si spostino, indipendentemente dalla superficie su cui vengono collocati. 


Il fermaporta Edgy è costruito per durare nel tempo e garantisce una presa sicura su qualsiasi superficie, compresi moquette, parquet, piastrelle e cemento.
 
    
Ma i nostri fermaporta non sono solo funzionali, sono anche eleganti! Con un'ampia gamma di colori e design, potete trovare il fermaporta perfetto per il vostro arredamento. Inoltre, i nostri fermaporta sono compatti e facili da riporre, in modo da poterli utilizzare ovunque sia necessario.

Name: Moroni Metales SPA
Description:
¿Puedes encontrar la pasión en lo desconocido? Nosotros lo hemos hecho, acá te contamos como lo logramos.
Nuestra empresa viene de una larga tradición familiar en la venta de acero inoxidable como materia prima. En la actualidad hay varias empresas vinculadas a la familia “Moroni” que hacen lo mismo. Yo, ingeniero en informática de profesión, por las vueltas que nos da la vida, tuve (casi obligadamente)que ingresar a este rubro. 
Tras un par de años haciendo lo mismo que el resto, empecé a pensar en que nos podría diferenciar del resto, haciéndome las preguntas que me imagino se hace todo el mundo. ¿Cómo me puedo diferenciar?, ¿Cómo le doy un verdadero valor agregado a mi trabajo?, ¿Qué debo hacer para distanciarme del resto?.

La respuesta siempre estuvo ahí, pero no la sabía reconocer, hasta que un día el destino puso en mi camino a un maestro soldador con grandes habilidades que le dio sentido a mi búsqueda, era la respuesta que andaba buscando. Desde ese momento supe que debía hacer y me embarqué en este mundo de la fabricación de estructuras metálicas. 

No ha sido fácil entrar a un mercado dominado por grandes empresas, pero nuestra fascinación por entregar productos de gran calidad nos esta abriendo un espacio que hemos sabido aprovechar. Sin darme cuenta y sin antes haberlo pensado, encontré mi pasión en algo totalmente desconocido para mí.
Conoce mas de nosotros y nuestros productos. No te arrepentirás de hacernos parte de tus proyectos.

Name: Elmax s.c. K. Zdrojewska, B. Zdrojewski
Description:
Elmax is a manufacturer of furniture for stores. We offer services based in particular on the production of shop and exhibition furniture (stands, displays, shop shelves), sometimes we also make furniture for HORECA. For years, we have been producing and painting from MDF, chipboard, veneer and solid wood. The vast majority of our orders are commissioned by the client, each project is different. We produce based on the technical drawings provided.

Elmax is a family company with a long tradition that dates back to 1999. Our first headquarters was located in Rumia, just outside Gdynia. However, due to the rapid increase in production needs, we were forced to move to a much larger area.

In 2007, we completed the construction of a production hall and an office in Reda at 10 Warzywnicza Street, where we operate continuously to this day.

Our company consists of several qualified employees who every day fulfill orders for the world's largest companies. We have advanced machinery thanks to which we are able to ensure safer, faster and even more accurate work.

Our machinery consists of modern numerically controlled machines. These are two machining centers (Homag and Masterwood) and a Herr-holz edge bander. Elmax can also boast of having an automatic warehouse for furniture boards connected to a saw. This improves the operation of the entire production line by eliminating the need to carry entire sheets of boards. We varnish large batches using a varnishing machine located in the second branch.

Name: Johanes Qualitat
Description:
Johanes Qualitat este o companie care activează în Cluj începând din anul 2006.
Vă oferă servicii premium dedicate afacerii Dvs. precum:

Consultanță – Procesul de consultanță vă asigură asistență și informații cu privire la etapele realizării proiectului, a soluțiilor tehnice și materialele potrivite acestuia. Gradul ridicat de pregătire al specialiștilor noștri și tehnologia de ultimă generație pe care o utilizăm asigură o calitate de excepție a produsului final oferit de echipa Johanes Qualitat.

Proiectare – Cu ajutorul proiectanților noștri și a programului de vizualizare 3D ideile dumneavoastră prind contur, obținându-se astfel o imagine foarte apropiată de realitatea proiectului final.

Debitare – Debitarea optimizată a plăcilor lemnoase de PAL, HDF, MDF, blaturi bucătărie și alte materiale similare, este realizată la cel mai înalt nivel de precizie și finețe. Această calitate este asigurat de utilajele de ultimă generație marca HOMAG. Datorită tehnologiei de care dispunem, debitarea se realizează cu precizie maximă și pierderi minime de material.

Aplicare cant ABS – Căntuirea vine în completarea plăcilor melaminate și se potrivește perfect din punct de vedere al decorului și a structurii suprafeței. Practic, procedeul de căntuire asigură finisarea și constituie un factor decisiv pentru durata de viață a mobilierului.

Prelucrare CNC –pentru PAL, MDF, HPL, PFL, și Blaturi de lucru precum și Găurirea în vederea montării balamalelor sau a altor accesorii precum glisiere și sisteme de sertare, sisteme de glisare și accesorii, mânere, cuiere, butoni etc.

Transport – Acest serviciu este pus la dispoziție prin mijloace proprii sau prin intermediul partenerilor noștri, în funcție de necesitățile clientului.

Folosind serviciile JHS vă punem la dispoziție mobilă la comandă pentru orice fel de spațiu.

Mobilă pentru casă:
– Mobilă pentru bucătărie.
– Mobilă pentru dormitoare
– Mobilă pentru living
– Mobilă pentru baie, hol sau alte anexe.

Name: ArTek - Ebénisterie
Description:
ArTek est le fruit de la collaboration de deux artisans passionnés.

Thomas PARISET ébéniste issu de la prestigieuse école Boulle s’est forgé une expérience chez différents artisans d’art partageant la même passion. Il décide d’entreprendre sa propre activité afin de pouvoir exprimer son goût pour un travail précis qui répond au plus près à la demande de ses clients.

Laurent SAORINE, d’abord spécialisé ingénierie du bâtiment, a travaillé sur de nombreux ouvrages uniques et sur mesure. Sa reconversion entamée en 2019 vers la menuiserie l’a amené à rencontrer les professionnels du milieu.

Ensemble ils créent en 2023 la société ArTek et développent un atelier sur la commune de Ballancourt Sur Essonne.

Véritables passionnés du bois, ils travaillent différentes essences, aussi bien indigènes qu’exotiques. Leurs différents parcours leurs permettent d’étendre leur savoir-faire à une large palette des métiers du bois :

Création sur mesure.
Restauration de meubles anciens
Agencement : bibliothèque, bureau, dressing, claustra
Menuiserie : intérieur et extérieur
Professionnels : Agencements de magasins, aménagements de plateaux de travail et de salles.
Ils mettent en avant la qualité de l’artisanat français en pratiquant une finition à la main avec les outils traditionnels, les différenciant ainsi des méthodes de l’industrialisation contemporaine. Ils sont à votre écoute pour répondre à vos projets personnalisés.

Name: Enmarcaciones Dósfer
Description:
Enmarcaciones Dósfer es una empresa familiar con décadas de experiencia en el sector de la decoración. Actualmente, la segunda generación de nuestra familia está al frente, manteniendo el compromiso de ofrecer soluciones de decoración de alta calidad y personalizadas. Lo que comenzó como un pequeño negocio de enmarcación ha crecido hasta convertirse en un referente en decoración vertical. Contamos con un amplio catálogo de miles de referencias que nos permite trabajar con grandes interioristas, tiendas de decoración, estudios de diseño, cadenas hoteleras, instituciones y museos.

En Dósfer, nos enorgullece diseñar e imprimir láminas personalizadas adaptadas a las necesidades de cada cliente. Ofrecemos cuadros en múltiples tamaños y estilos, y nos esforzamos por cumplir con las demandas de cada proyecto. Ya sea modificando nuestros diseños existentes o creando nuevos a medida, trabajamos para superar las expectativas de cada cliente. Utilizamos una variedad de materiales de impresión, como canvas, papel fotográfico y papel artesano, y empleamos tintas UV para asegurar la durabilidad. Además, contamos con un amplio catálogo de molduras y opciones de montaje para cualquier requisito estético o de seguridad.

En Dósfer, creemos en el poder del arte y la decoración vertical para transformar interiores de hoteles y otros espacios. Nuestro equipo, apasionado por el arte, combina diseño vanguardista y soluciones avanzadas para crear ambientes únicos, brindando una experiencia artística sin el alto coste de las obras originales.

Name: Polinnovate- Reutilização e Inovação, LDA
Description:
Após 3 anos de investigação, tentativas e busca de soluções, encontrámos finalmente o método para reutilizar este tipo de plástico que se acumula em aterros há décadas, incontáveis toneladas, e para o qual não existia ainda uma reciclagem possível.
Foi criado o POLISIN, uma nova matéria-prima, 100% portuguesa!
Rapidamente nos apercebemos que as características do composto obtido permitiria a fabricação de diversos produtos que poderão substituir a utilização de recursos naturais (madeiras, recursos minerais metálicos e não metálicos) reduzindo, também por esta via, o impacto negativo que a forma de vida do ser humano tem tido no nosso planeta.
Decidimos então que aplicaríamos os nossos esforços na criação de produtos socialmente úteis e que aportem novas mais-valias às comunidades.
Neste sentido, a Polinnovate desenvolveu alguns produtos dos quais muito se orgulha de os colocar no mercado por acreditar que podem marcar a diferença na qualidade de vida das populações locais.

Estamos a la vanguardia en el diseño de muebles, no dude en comunicarse con nosotros para comprobarlo.

Name: Netsan Furniture
Description:
It all started in 2013.

We planted the seed of big dreams in a small, 60 square meter workshop with a few people whose hearts filled with love and who knew the meaning of hard work very well.

Working with determination and patience, never forgetting the point we started off, we relied on our dreams and turned our faces to the future.

Our journey that started with furniture production in a small workshop led to the enlargement of our factory working space to thousands of square meters and manufacturing capacity expansion. Today, with hundreds of employees and a strong/growing dealer network throughout the country, we have taken and strengthened our place in the Turkish furniture industry by exporting to many countries.

We continue to add value to our business and our quality with the research and development activities we have implemented to maintain our quality standards.

Name: Fornirama
Description:
Fornirama est une entreprise familiale de troisième génération qui s'est taillé une place de choix sur le marché nord-américain depuis 1975 en fabriquant des meubles rembourrés haut de gamme. L'entreprise, qui est fièrement québécoise, mise sur des valeurs humaines, le respect et un esprit de famille. Fornirama emploie une cinquantaine de personnes, dont près de la moitié sont à leur service depuis plus de 25 ans, ce qui témoigne de leur engagement envers leurs employés. La devise de l'entreprise est d'ailleurs "Employés heureux = produit mieux fait".

La réputation de Fornirama repose sur un choix judicieux de matériaux de qualité supérieure et un service après-vente exceptionnel. Plus de 80% de la fabrication des produits est réalisée à la main par des artisans, des designers et des techniciens d'expérience qui assurent la constance et la qualité à chaque étape de la fabrication. L'usine de 80 000 pieds carrés, située à la même adresse depuis les débuts, permet de consolider toutes les étapes de fabrication sous un même toit, garantissant ainsi un résultat optimal. Fornirama offre une vaste gamme de produits exclusifs et de qualité exceptionnelle, fabriqués entièrement au Québec, sans sous-traitance.

Name: Agache
Description:
În anul 1994, visul a prins contur. Mariana și Mihai, amândoi Agache, au ieșit de pe băncile unor facultăți fără legătură cu tapițeria sau mobilierul și au început să lucreze la primul colțar pe care au vrut să-l construiască pentru ei. Odată finalizat, au cedat insistențelor unui prieten și i l-am vândut, cu gândul că își pot face oricând altul.
   Ce a urmat a fost de nedescris. A venit o explozie de comenzi din partea oamenilor care au auzit de atenția cu care cei doi realizau fiecare canapea. Un început copleșitor dar fericit, care prevestea un viitor plin de clienți fericiți. 
   Veștile bune circulă repede, iar în scurt timp am devenit unul dintre cei mai importanți producători de mobilier tapițat din România.
   După 28 de ani de activitate, cu o gamă mult mai variată de produse, firma a rămas tot o afacere de familie. O familie formată din peste 70 de oameni care muncesc zi de zi pentru a da contur ideilor voastre, cu drag, în România.

Name: Spectral Mobila
Description:
Spectral Mobila SA este unul dintre cei mai mari producatori de mobilier din PAL melaminat si MDF din zona Moldovei. Fabrica detinuta de companie este situata in apropierea municipiului Barlad si reprezinta una dintre cele mai mari investitii locale cu capital integral privat.

Gama de produse fabricata de Spectral Mobila SA este una completa si cuprinde piese de mobilier pentru dormitoare, sufragerii, bucatarii, holuri, birouri, bai si alte piese de mic mobilier.

Calitatea produselor fabricate de companie corespunde celor mai inalte exigente, fiind asigurata de un flux tehnologic automatizat care cuprinde circulare de taiat in pachet, masini automate de cantuit pe suprafete drepte sau curbe, centre de prelucrare cu comanda numerica sau prese vacuum cu membrana pentru infoliat piese din MDF.

Utilajele utilizate in fabricarea pieselor de mobilier sunt produse de unii din cei mai mari jucatori la nivel mondial din domeniu si datorita varstei medii de pana in 3 ani a utilajelor ce compun fluxul tehonologic, acestea dispun de cele mai noi tehnologii de fabricare a mobilei la ora actuala.

Spectral Mobila SA opereaza 36 de magazine proprii si in sistem de franciza sub brand-ul Spectral Mobila in Adjud, Bacau, Baia Mare, Barlad, Botosani, Braila, Brasov, Bucuresti, Buzau, Calafat, Calarasi, Campulung Moldovenesc, Cluj-Napoca, Focsani, Galati, Iasi, Intorsura Buzaului, Mangalia, Moreni, Oltenita, Pitesti, Ramnicu Sarat, Romna, Sacele, Sebes, Sfantu Gheorghe, Sibiu, Sighetu Marmatiei, Slatina, Slobozia, Suceava, Targu Frumos, Targu Jiu, Tecuci, Timisoara si Turda.

Incepand cu 2016 Spectral Mobila SA opereaza si un magazin online din care clientii pot achizitiona toata gama de produse fabricate de companie.

Name: Blackburn Custom Furniture
Description:
Period Furniture
Blackburn Furniture produces antique period furniture, reproduction furniture, contemporary handmade furniture, architectural millwork, and has over 20 years experience in woodturning.

Period Furniture:  Queen Anne, Chippendale, Federal, Biedermeier, Art Deco, and Mid Century Modern furniture.   The pieces show the diversity of period furniture and famous wood finishes that a very limited number of craftsman are capable of producing current day.  we pride ourselves on using authentic wood carving tools, techniques, and original 18th century furniture designs and more. 

You will notice details like dovetail connections and no hardware on many of our pieces.  Matt Blackburn has the ability to replicate furniture from photographs, use antique woodworking techniques and create unique turned wood table legs and much more.

A great example of woodturning and reproduction furniture can be found in our gallery where you will find barrel back chairs, Chippendale chairs, lowboys, Tiger Maple desks.  These commissions were to match period chairs exactly in form, color, and age.

At Blackburn Furniture every piece is custom. clients have control over the final finish including our contemporary handmade furniture.  Our clients are engaged in the process while their pieces is being crafted.

If you are looking for something in particular,  contact me to discuss your vision.  I’d love to hear from you.

Matthew Blackburn

Name: BRANI
Description:
Een brutaal, minimalistisch Nederlands design boordevol verrassingen. Het modulaire meubel heeft voor- en zijpanelen die links en rechts binnen en buiten het frame kunnen schuiven. Het circulaire ontwerp biedt niet alleen een uniek dynamisch design, maar ook een duurzame oplossing. Gerecyclede materialen krijgen een nieuw leven in de kast. Met de optie om panelen in te ruilen voor een andere kleur minimaliseren we materiaalverspilling. Goed voor het milieu, je behoudt het frame, geen gereedschap nodig en toch een nieuwe kast. Door de eindeloze mogelijkheden in personalisatie en vormgeving brengt BRANI je interieur tot leven. BRANI past tegen een wand, midden in een ruimte als designobject of als ruimte onderbreker. Weerspiegel je eigen karakter of dat van je bedrijf door de mogelijkheden van BRANI. 
BRANI in alles anders.

Name: RC Design Sp. z o. o.
Description:
Jesteśmy polskim producentem mebli klasy premium. Nasze usługi są w pełni kompleksowe - dzięki posiadaniu wykwalifikowanych pracowników jakimi są stolarze, ślusarze, operatorzy maszyn, konstruktorzy, technolodzy oraz menadżerowie nadzorujący cały proces produkcji. Na co dzień zajmujemy się profesjonalną obsługą w zakresie wyposażenia meblowego wielu luksusowych oraz wpływowych marek świata. Obsługujemy bardzo wymagające, nietypowe i ekskluzywne projekty. Z nami nie zatrzymasz się w miejscu, ponieważ dajemy szerokie możliwości rozwoju, sami bez przerwy się rozwijając. 
Naszym pracownikom dajemy możliwość uczęszczania w wielu ciekawych wyjazdach zagranicznych. Jeśli chcesz dołączyć do zgranego zespołu otwartych na świat ludzi - to właśnie Ciebie chcemy w naszej firmie!

Name: Woodever
Description:
We design, manufacture and deliver bespoke interiors for offices, hotels, restaurants and private homes. 

Our work has been recognised in the prestigious Office of the Year competition, and we help companies create inspiring environments where people genuinely enjoy working and spending time. What sets us apart is the combination of our own furniture production, decades of craftsmanship and a constant drive for innovation. We are able to guide our clients from concept to final installation, ensuring quality and precision at every stage. Our team is built on experience, and we pride ourselves on a personal approach and reliable delivery. 

Woodever builds on the heritage of DŘEVODÍLO, a renowned furniture maker founded in 1945 in the Czech Republic. Today, we continue this legacy with modern digital processes and sustainable thinking, expanding into European markets while staying true to the craft.

Name: Haustek
Description:
Somos una empresa apasionada dedicada a la fabricación de muebles de calidad, mobiliario elegante y cocinas residenciales que transforman espacios en hogares acogedores.

Con artesanía excepcional y atención al detalle, creamos piezas únicas que reflejan el estilo y las necesidades de nuestros clientes.

Desde diseños modernos hasta clásicos atemporales, en cada mueble, dejamos nuestra marca de calidad y compromiso.

Tu hogar merece lo mejor, y en nuestra empresa, nos aseguramos de que cada pieza cuente una historia de confort y estilo.

Name: Multiflex
Description:
Multiflex was founded in 1989 by brothers Ashok and Anand Quadros. In 1995, we shifted to panel processing to keep up with demand for efficient manufacturing. By 2000, we set up MultiFlex, a fully automated CNC factory that’s now central to what we do.

We focus on dry-fit furniture, crafting practical and stylish pieces for homes, offices, and hotels. Our setup includes multiple processing lines for speed and precision, plus a dedicated line for finishes and painting.

Quality drives us. We use top-notch materials, and our team works closely with clients to get every detail right. Sustainability matters too, so we source responsibly and cut waste with smart manufacturing.

We serve all kinds of industries, from hospitality to residential, with furniture that fits the space and purpose. Looking ahead, we’re all about staying innovative and helping clients bring their ideas to life.

Name: FiliG
Description:
Desde nuestros inicios, hemos crecido y evolucionado, siempre guiados por los principios de calidad, excelente servicio al cliente y un profundo amor por lo que hacemos. Nuestra familia de diseñadores, artesanos y apasionados de los muebles está comprometido a hacer de FILIG un lugar donde encontrará no solo productos, sino también experiencias que resuenan con su estilo de vida. 

Ya sea proyectos particulares, oficinas o empresas constructoras, nuestro proceso integral garantiza la máxima calidad en cada etapa, desde la asesoría inicial hasta la instalación final. 
Pasen, vean, consulten por su proyecto a medida. Instalamos en todo el pais.

Name: StarWood Woodworks
Description:
StarWood has been crafting exclusive designer products from HPL, natural wood, epoxy resin, and polymers since 2017. The brand has become an undisputed market leader thanks to its unique custom-made creations.

Our mission is to give products soul and unique character that highlight interiors and create a cozy atmosphere. For our exclusive pieces, we use dried wood, storm-damaged trees, or other materials overlooked by others. Every year, we plant young trees in Ukraine to restore nature’s balance. We strive to preserve the planet’s natural resources by giving a second life to trees others discard.

Our range includes round, rectangular, and oval models, some with extendable options for extra space. A variety of colors and textures allows you to select the perfect fit to complement any interior. These tables are an ideal choice for those seeking both style and durability.

Equipped with advanced machinery and production capacity, we tackle the most complex tasks. We use only the best materials from trusted suppliers. We create furniture in diverse designs and do not limit ourselves creatively.

We offer mutually beneficial cooperation for selling our products in your country. Our prices reflect the guaranteed high quality, which you can explore on our website https://starwood.ua/en/

Dealers benefit from attractive terms: wholesale discounts, personalized offers, and fast delivery, ensuring steady growth of the partner network. Our collaborators receive a full set of marketing tools — from samples to promotional materials — that enhance brand recognition and boost sales.

Create comfort and style with us that inspires! Contact us via the website or directly to start fruitful cooperation.

Name: Scion Modular
Description:
Scion Modular is an interior and furniture manufacturing company based in Koregaon Bhima, Pune, established in 2021 by partners Suraj Jedhe, Rajeshwar Jedhe, and Priyal Sasane. We specialize in designing and manufacturing high-quality modular furniture for homes, offices, and kitchens. Our mission is to deliver high-quality, versatile modular furniture that combines design, functionality, and reliability. We aim to meet diverse customer needs by offering tailored solutions and exceptional service across all sectors. Guided by our vision to become the leading provider of modular furniture, we are committed to creating functional and visually appealing spaces for all.

At Scion Modular, our key strengths include in-house design and manufacturing capabilities, extensive customization options to meet specific client requirements, and a strong focus on ergonomic designs. We leverage semi-automated machinery to ensure consistent product quality and are dedicated to timely delivery and customer satisfaction. With a passion for craftsmanship and innovation, Scion Modular continues to be a trusted partner for smart, stylish, and functional interiors.

Conta com uma equipa de designers, decoradores e marceneiros que trabalham arduamente para criar espaços infantis únicos e exclusivos com qualidade e design.

A FlyBaby é uma marca registada que produz peças exclusivas com conceito evolutivo – produtos que crescem com as crianças, fazendo parte da história da família, criando memórias duradouras.

Os nossos materiais são provenientes de florestas sustentáveis e primamos o design nórdico e moderno.

Desde 2011 que a nossa prioridade é satisfazer as necessidad

Name: Runa
Description:
En un entorno cada vez más dinámico y cambiante, las cosas que nos rodean tienden a cumplir un rol práctico y momentáneo, limitando el aspecto estético a una cualidad sensible a las tendencias.

RUNA realmente cree en el poder del diseño para mejorar nuestra calidad de vida, mediante objetos que, además de atender una solicitud funcional, satisfagan la condición inherente del ser humano por buscar la belleza. Desde esta premisa, su trabajo se ha enfocado en inquirir una ruta propia mediante la investigación constante en torno a la técnica y la materialidad, plasmando en sus piezas una cuidadosa responsabilidad por la calidad y durabilidad.

Su diseño se inspira por una línea de vanguardia sobria y sintética, procurando un equilibrio entre materia y forma, logrando productos integrales y auténticos.
A través de la exploración material y plástica, informado a su vez con la tradición y el oficio, busca suscitar sensaciones que trasciendan lo meramente visual hacia una experiencia sensorial, donde la luz y el tacto confieran al diseño una capa temporal y consciente. 

RUNA es un estudio de diseño y arquitectura, con fábrica y oficina ubicadas en Santiago de Chile, fundado por los arquitectos Diego Rivera y Javier Insunza. Desarrolla y fabrica objetos, proyectos de interiorismo y mobiliario en todas sus escalas.

Name: FEIZY LATAM
Description:
En FEIZY LATAM trabajamos con una idea muy clara: los tapetes no son un accesorio, son una decisión de diseño.

Somos una empresa B2B especializada en tapetes de diseño, enfocada en colaborar con interioristas, arquitectos, desarrolladores y proyectos hospitality en toda América Latina. Acompañamos proyectos residenciales y comerciales desde la etapa conceptual hasta la selección final del tapete ideal.

Nuestro portafolio reúne tapetes hechos a mano y a máquina, cuidadosamente seleccionados y fabricados en India y Turquía, con una amplia variedad de materiales, construcciones y estilos. Esto nos permite adaptarnos tanto a proyectos de alto diseño como a necesidades técnicas específicas: tráfico, durabilidad, mantenimiento y estética.

Más que vender tapetes, en FEIZY LATAM entendemos el lenguaje del diseño. Escuchamos el concepto del proyecto, el mood, la paleta, el uso del espacio y el presupuesto, para proponer soluciones que hagan sentido visual, funcional y comercialmente.

Trabajamos como aliados de proyecto, ofreciendo:
- Curaduría experta
- Opciones personalizadas
- Soporte cercano y profesional
- Soluciones pensadas para interiorismo, arquitectura y contract

Si buscas un proveedor que entienda tus proyectos, respete tu visión y sume valor real al resultado final, en FEIZY LATAM hablamos tu mismo idioma.
Location: San Pedro Garza García, Nuevo León

Ao longo dos anos, neste percurso tentamos acompanhar sempre a digitalização, novos mercados  e novas tendências e sentimos que os nossos clientes depositam confiança no nosso trabalho.

Name: Arttechno Mobilya ve Dekorasyon
Description:
35 Yıldan buyana sektörde yer alan firmamız, 1989 yılında şirketleşmiş ve çalışmalarına Özer Metal Mobilya Dekorasyon San. Ve Tic. Ltd. Şti. ve Özer Ahşap Mobilya Dekorasyon San. Ve Tic. Ltd. Şti. Olarak iki ayrı firma üzerinden devam etmekteyiz.
2003 Yılında ARTTECHNO adı altında markalaşarak üretim ve yönetimde toplam kaliteyi benimsemiş ve sektördeki konumunu korumuştur. 
Metal ve Ahşap ürünleri imalatı ile Döşeme işlerinin tamamını kendi bünyesinde uzman ekibi ile çözen firmamız, kapasite ve kaliteli üretim anlayışı ile müşteri memnuniyetinin oluşmasını sağlamıştır.
Seri ve özel üretimlerde öncülerden olan firmamız, her türlü ofis, ev, otel vb. mekanların dekorasyon ihtiyacını projelendirecek ve uygulamasını gerçekleştirecek ürün malzeme ve teknik kapasiteye sahiptir.
35 Yıllık deneyimimizi paylaşmak ve işlerinizde çözüm ortağınız olmak için bir kahvemizi içmeye bekleriz.
Özer Metal Mobilya Dekorasyon San ve Tic. Ltd. Şti.
Özer Ahşap Mobilya Dekorasyon San. Ve Tic. Ltd. Şti.

Name: Wise Owl Concepts
Description:
Wise Owl Concepts is a luxury design and fabrication studio specializing in high-end custom furniture, architectural installations, and bespoke metalwork for residential, commercial, and hospitality spaces. Known for our meticulous craftsmanship and artistic vision, we work with top-tier clients including homeowners, interior designers, architects, developers, and business owners to create statement pieces that elevate every environment.

Founded on the belief that furniture should be both functional and expressive, we produce one-of-a-kind pieces that become the focal point of the spaces they inhabit. Our offerings include custom dining tables, conference tables, pivot doors, exterior entry doors, luxury range hoods, architectural staircases, and sculptural metal design elements. Every piece is handcrafted from the finest materials, including exotic woods, brass, copper, bronze, stainless steel, blackened steel, and custom-patinated metals—delivering a seamless blend of timeless design and modern refinement.

At Wise Owl Concepts, we don’t believe in off-the-shelf solutions. Each project is tailored to the client's unique vision and space, resulting in bespoke creations that exude sophistication, originality, and enduring value. Whether it’s designing a custom conference table for a corporate headquarters, an architectural staircase for a luxury home, or an artistic metal sculpture for a boutique hotel, our goal is always the same: to create work that commands attention, tells a story, and lasts for generations.

Our process is collaborative, innovative, and rooted in precision. With design, fabrication, and installation capabilities nationwide, we are trusted by discerning clients seeking pieces that reflect identity, style, and purpose. If you're looking for elevated craftsmanship and design excellence, Wise Owl Concepts is the studio of choice.

Name: Copav
Description:
More than 3 decades ago, Copav began its history in the manufacture of outdoor furniture.

It was idealized and founded by Leonardo Pavoni, who since the beginning of his career was fueled by a love of creation and an entrepreneurial spirit. He found his destiny in art made with his own hands.

During the company's development and consolidation process, the team grew and gained another generation of the family. However, the concept of the brand is based on the same values of its origin.

Production methods have been improving with technological evolution, but the technique remains unique in its essence.

Copav furniture is manufactured, personalized and developed in the uniqueness of the artisanal process, with the main purpose of excellence and quality imprinted in every detail.

Now, with more than 30 years of expertise and exclusive showrooms in Araraquara and Ribeirão Preto, the brand creates and develops pieces for the most versatile and surprising environments, valuing the complete assistance and the particularity in the service of each client.

Name: Furniché
Description:
Furniché, a brand of Kaashtkaari products pvt. Ltd was established in the year 2019 and has been providing with elegant office spaces and home furniture products since. The name has been derived from the sanskrit word “kaasht” which means wood and “kaari” which means worker / working. Essentially the word stands for wood working and is dedicated to all our workers who put in more than 100% to make sure that the customers are satisfied and get the best in class workmanship on offer. The company has a huge manufacturing facility with machines which are german and austrian, making sure that all furniture has unmatched precision and finishing. All hardware used for manufacturing are branded and thus does away with the need of regular replacement.
The company is being backed by a promoter which has 50+ years of experience in furniture manufacturing. The company offers customized solutions within the modular range of furniture which are quick to manufacture, easy to install and very pocket friendly. The company also offers turnkey interior solutions for people who may be looking at furnishing a new flat, office or a room with wide variety of options to choose from. The company has also got the iso 9001:2015, iso 14001:2015, iso 45001:2018 and the bifma certificate for quality management systems, environmental management systems &
Occupational health and safety management system respectively.
The company provides a wide array of options which includes pre laminated particle board (plpb) furniture, mdf furniture,
Hdhmr furniture or even plywood based furniture. The products on offers include bedroom furniture, tv units, office partitions, office tables, modular kitchens, book shelves and many more. So if you are looking for any kind of household or Office furniture a visit to the store offering Furniché is a must.

Name: Manufaktura mebli Karpinski Koza

W latach 70. do roku 2000 naszymi topowymi produktami były dębowe, rzeźbione meblościanki, witryny. Podążając za rozwojem technologicznym, jakością, dostępnością coraz to nowych materiałów oraz nowymi stylami w naszej ofercie znajdą się meble w stylu art-deco, glamour, hampton, meble w stylu nowojorskim, angielskim i wiele innych. Wszystkie meble tworzymy na indywidualne zamówienie, często pod projekt. Naszymi klientami są indywidualni inwestorzy, projektanci oraz jednostki komercyjne i państwowe. 

Wchodząc we współprace z każdym z klientów podążamy pewną drogą. Zaczynając od prezentacji naszych bazowych kolekcji i realizacji po sprostanie wymaganiom naszych klientów i wykonanie projektu, często wizualizacji z aranżacją wnętrza.

Nasza oferta bogata jest w meble na wymiar do 
kuchni, salonu, jadalni, sypialni, garderoby, gabinetu, biura, pokoju młodzieżowego.

Name: G-Legotillverkning AB
Description:
Vi har sedan 1999 bedrivit snickeriverksamhet och har under åren utvecklat och fördjupat  vårt samarbete med våra kunder som tex. arkitekter, beställare och konstruktörer.

  

Vi har tillverkning och lagerkapacitet i vår egen fabrik på 9000 m2 i Skagersvik utanför Gullspång, nu under namnet G-Legotillverkning AB.

 Den1 januari 2018 förvärvade vi Planglasteknik i Saltsjö Boo. Det innebär att vi även kan kombinera vår kunskap kring inredningslösningar med Planglastekniks unika produkt och kan även producera kompletta lösningar med säkerhetsglas.

Vi har lång erfarenhet från inredningsprojekt till bl a butiker, kontor och offentlig miljö där vi kan hålla i hela projektet från idé och planering till helt inflyttningsklart.

Detta innefattar bl.a. ritningsarbete, inköp av tex. kontorsmöbler i de fall vi inte tillverkar dom själva samt montagearbete från golv till tak. Vi har goda samarbetspartners leverantörer avseende glas, metall, möbler, textilier och mattor/golvmaterial.

Name: YILDIRIMLAR MOBİLYA
Description:
Yıldırımlar Mobilya olarak iş hayatına başladığımız günden beri istenilen ölçü, tasarım ve ekonomik şartlar ile hizmet vermekteyiz. Başlıca ilgi alanlarımızı sıralayacak olursak Mutfak dolapları, Banyo dolapları, Gardroplar, Portmantolar, Vestiyer ve TV Üniteleri, Ofis Mobilyaları, Kapı çeşitleri, Yüklük ve Ayakkabılık modellerine kadar her türlü mobilya isteğe göre tasarım isteğe göre uygulama ve montaj hizmetlerini vermekteyiz. 

Sektöründe yer alan diğer rakiplerinden ayıran en büyük özelliğimiz ise öncü, kaliteli ve güvenilir adı altında sunulan ivedi termin hizmetidir. Bu hizmet sayesinde alınan müşteri memnuniyetleri bizleri mutlu etmektedir. Öncelik unsurlarımızdan olan kalite ve güven ile birlikte çizim tasarımı ve ücretsiz keşif hizmetlerimizle müşterilerimize yardımcı olmaktayız.
         
 Müşterilerimize sunduğumuz ve sunacağımız bu hizmetler için ciddi yüksek ücretler ödemeden ekonomik fiyatlar ile hizmet verebilmekteyiz.  İhtiyacınız olan her türlü bilgi birikimi sizlere en uygun şekilde sunabilecek olan Yıldırımlar Mobilya Vizyonu ve Misyonu gereği hareket ederek müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı bir çalışma sergilemektedir.

Description:
Recoloca nace el año 2017, entregando soluciones en la organización de espacios de casas y oficinas. En el proceso de consolidación, fuimos integrando, como respuesta a las necesidades de nuestros clientes, distintas líneas de servicios, especializándonos en proyectos completos de remodelación, decoración y muebles.

 

Somos una empresa de servicio, donde nuestro gran capital y valor, son el compromiso y las relaciones que generamos con los clientes, lo que nos hace comprometernos con el mejor resultado, en tiempo y forma.

 

Actualmente, Recoloca, se ha centrado en dos grandes líneas de negocio:
_ la fabricación de muebles y
_ el desarrollo de proyectos de diseño y arquitectura, que se implementan en conjunto con el cliente.

Sandra Ochoa Relacionadora publica y Daniela Pitto Ingeniero Comercial, primero amigas y socias.

Buscamos la forma de emprender donde teníamos las habilidades, y desde siempre nos unió el placer por los espacios con sentido y funcionales, donde cada cosa tiene su lugar definido y creado para él.

La armonía y calidez, se puede lograr en todos los espacios que habitamos, esa es nuestra visión.

Name: AM SMART RS D.O.O.
Description:
AM Smart je grupa kompanija specijalizovanih za rešenja opremanja prodavnica širom Evrope. 

Veoma smo dobro organizovani. Da nismo, ne bismo bili u mogućnosti da rukovodimo projektima u preko 600 prodavnica godišnje širom Evrope. Poslujemo u 12 zemalja, a naši koordinatori tečno govore 14 jezika.

Danas se možemo pohvaliti agilnom mrežom podizvođača u Kini, Tajvanu, Ukrajini i Turskoj, gde proizvodimo komponente za sve naše glavne projekte. Naši partneri su fabrike najsavremenije tehnologije i optimizovane po pitanju troškova.

Za manje, kraće serije, uključujući prototipove i poslove koji zahtevaju brzu isporuku, koristimo naše interno odeljenje za stolarske i metalne radove, koje je locirano u blizini Gorzow Wielkopolski (Poljska) opremljeno savremenim CNC mašinama i vođeno visoko kvalifikovanim i iskusnim proizvodnim timom.

Naša mreža lokalnih timova za instalaciju i koordinatora omogućava nam brzo prepoznavanje prilika i održavanje fleksibilnosti u pogledu dizajna, obima i vremena isporuke.

Naše podružnice van Evropske unije pružaju nam značajnu fleksibilnost u upravljanju carinama i ponudi plaćanja u lokalnim valutama.

AM Smart je tim iskusnih profesionalaca koji osigurava kratke vremenske rokove i efikasnost poslovanja. Naša sopstveni vozni park i provereni instalateri garantuju brzu i sveobuhvatnu isporuku projekata po principu „ključ u ruke”.

U AM Smart-u cenimo samostalnost i dobijamo naizmerno zadovoljstvo iz uspešnog rešavanja problema. Neprestano se trudimo da našim kupcima pružimo što bolja i trajnija rešenja, proširujući našu ponudu usluga i davajući prioritet kvalitetu proizvoda. Dan za danom dokazujemo da ništa nije nemoguće.

Name: Klarskov møbler
Description:
Vi er en dansk nichevirksomhed, der designer, producerer og sælger pædagogiske møbler med fokus på funktionalitet, ergonomi, leg og mere miljøvenlige møbler med Svanemærket og sikkerhed primært rettet mod institutionsmarkedet. 

Vores sortiment omfatter pædagogiske institutionsmøbler såsom ergonomiske arbejdsstole, taburetter, stole, højstol, bænke, borde, reoler og rumdelere. 

Møblerne er designet til at fremme trivslen gennem funktionalitet, ergonomi, leg med lang holdbarhed, som støtter og følger både voksne og børn i deres arbejde og udvikling.

Mange af produkterne er svanemærkede hvilket betyder, at de er mere miljøvenlige møbler uden skadelige kemi i lak og lim, samt er sikkerhedstestede og fremstillet af certificeret træ fra bæredygtig skovdrift. 

Møblerne produceres lokalt på Fyn og familiefirmaet ledes i dag af Tine Klarskov, designer og CEO, efter sin far Hans Klarskov, pædagog, designer og iværksætter, som stiftede Klarskov møbler i 1990.

Name: Artsan Ofis Mobilyaları
Description:
Firmamız 1996 yılından itibaren modern ve fonksiyonel ofis mobilyaları ve ev dekorasyonu alanında hizmet vermektedir. Artsan Ofis Mobilyaları, sektörün ihtiyaçlarına hızlı, sağlıklı ve uygun fiyatlarda karşılık vermeyi prensip edinmiştir.
Bugün kendi sektörümüzde lider firmalar arasındayken ileride müşterilerimize daha güzeli sunmak daha kapsamlı, daha kaliteli çalışmalara imza atmak ilk hedefimizdir. Müşteri memnuniyeti için her gün daha da büyümek, bünyemize daha fazlasını katmak müşterilerimizi de bizi de mutlu ediyor.

Firmamız, kurulduğu yıldan beri temiz, dürüst, azimli çalışanlarıyla kendini kanıtlamış olup kaliteli müşteri potansiyeline sahiptir.

Kaliteyi yaşamak ve devam ettirmek için sizin de adresiniz ArtSan Ofis Mobilyaları olsun.

Description:
At Vemi Lux doo, we are passionate about turning your vision of the perfect living space into reality. With a commitment to quality, craftsmanship, and innovation, we specialize in creating custom-made furniture from high-quality MDF and chipboard for kitchens and living rooms.

 Our Commitment:

Name: PrioKitchen-SE
Description:
Vi erbjuder högkvalitativa kök till företag, bostäder och kommersiella fastigheter till marknadens bästa priser. Med över 20 års erfarenhet och över 10 000 nöjda hushåll kan du lita på vår expertis och pålitlighet.

Vi tillverkar över 200 kök varje månad i vår egen fabrik, vilket ger oss fullständig kontroll över tillverkningsprocessen och möjlighet att erbjuda överraskande låga priser utan att kompromissa med kvaliteten. Alla våra köksstommar kommer färdigmonterade, vilket sparar tid och möjliggör en smidig installation.

Fördelarna med att välja oss inkluderar snabba leveranser inom 4-5 veckor och möjligheten att hantera extra beställningar och anpassa oss efter dina behov.

Vi är stolta över våra positiva referenser från tidigare byggprojekt, vilket har byggt upp vårt rykte som pålitliga och professionella aktörer inom branschen.

Vårt sortiment av köksluckor är noggrant utformat för att passa våra kunders önskemål, och alla våra produkter genomgår en grundlig kvalitetskontroll för att säkerställa höga standarder.

Vi anpassar oss efter dina specifika mått och önskemål för att ge dig det perfekta köket som passar dina behov och stil.

Vi har framgångsrikt genomfört över 600 köksprojekt, inklusive nyproduktion och renoveringar i olika områden.

Välj oss för ditt köksprojekt och få marknadens bästa priser, högkvalitativa kök, snabba leveranser och en pålitlig partner som strävar efter att överträffa dina förväntningar. Kontakta oss idag för att diskutera dina köksdrömmar och låt oss skapa det perfekta köket för dig.

Name: Petra Muebles
Description:
Muebles de lujo a medida para proyectos de alto nivel

En Petra Muebles, colaboramos con arquitectos, diseñadores de interiores y desarrolladores inmobiliarios en la creación de mobiliario exclusivo a medida para proyectos premium. Nuestra especialidad es diseñar y fabricar piezas únicas que combinan funcionalidad, calidad y estética, elevando cada espacio con acabados de primer nivel.

 ¿Cómo trabajamos?
 Diseñamos soluciones personalizadas adaptadas a la visión de cada proyecto.
 Utilizamos materiales premium para garantizar exclusividad y durabilidad.
 Trabajamos en conjunto con profesionales para integrar el mobiliario de manera eficiente en el diseño arquitectónico.
 Cumplimos con altos estándares de precisión y calidad en cada entrega.

 Nuestra experiencia
 Hemos trabajado en más de 500 proyectos en zonas exclusivas de Buenos Aires.
 Fabricamos mobiliario para viviendas de lujo, oficinas y hoteles de alta gama.
 Contamos con un equipo especializado en el desarrollo de muebles a medida para el segmento premium.

Si sos arquitecto, diseñador o desarrollador y buscás un socio estratégico en muebles de lujo, nos encantaría conectar y ser parte de tu próximo proyecto.

Name: Zwymiarowani - Na każdy wymiar
Description:
Zwymiarowani to producent mebli na zamówienie, który łączy nowoczesny design, precyzję wykonania i kompleksową obsługę klienta. 
Tworzymy meble do całych domów i mieszkań.
Realizujemy projekty „od A do Z” – od koncepcji i wizualizacji 3D, przez produkcję, aż po profesjonalny montaż, co gwarantuje spójność i najwyższą jakość każdej realizacji.

Nasze projekty wyróżniają się nowoczesną i elegancką estetyką, trwałością oraz dbałością o detale. Wykorzystujemy starannie dobrane materiały i sprawdzone rozwiązania, aby tworzyć wnętrza dopasowane do indywidualnych potrzeb naszych klientów.

Dzięki doświadczeniu naszego zespołu realizujemy zarówno standardowe, jak i najbardziej wymagające projekty – zapewniając pełną satysfakcję, niezależnie od skali i stopnia skomplikowania zlecenia.

Zapraszamy do kontaktu!

Name: Radmana-Furniture
Description:
رادمانا | RADMANA
Design for Focus

رادمانا برندی پیشرو در حوزه مبلمان و تجهیزات آموزشی است که با درک عمیق از نیازهای آموزشی امروز، به طراحی و ارائه راهکارهایی نوین برای فضاهای یادگیری میپردازد. ما معتقدیم تحول در آموزش، از تحول در محیط آموزشی آغاز میشود.

با توجه به متدهای جدید آموزشی مانند یادگیری فعال، پروژهمحور و مشارکتی، رادمانا مبلمانی طراحی میکند که امکانات لازم برای فعالیتهای پویا، کار گروهی، تمرکز فردی و یادگیری منعطف را فراهم کند. هر محصول ما بر اساس اصول ارگونومی، تکنولوژی روز و استانداردهای آموزشی مدرن طراحی میشود تا فضای یادگیری، کارآمد، جذاب و الهامبخش باشد.

حوزههای فعالیت رادمانا:

طراحی مبلمان مدارس، دانشگاهها و مراکز آموزشی نوین

ایجاد فضاهای منعطف برای کلاسهای پویا و کارگاههای آموزشی

ارائه راهکارهای تخصصی برای یادگیری فعال (Active Learning)

تولید مبلمان استاندارد با قابلیت تغییر و شخصیسازی

Name: Wellco Seating BV
Description:
Met als ultieme doel ‘’het welzijn van mensen verhogen’’, ontwikkelen, produceren en verkopen de mensen van Wellco relax- sta-op en zorgstoelen onder de merknaam Fitform. Daarbij staan ergonomie, maatwerk & comfort hoog in het vaandel. In een ambachtelijke productie omgeving worden dagelijks vele fauteuils en individuele zitoplossingen vervaardigd voor mensen die meer eisen stellen aan zitten. 

Wellco maakt gebruik van alle recente kennis op gebied van ergonomie, techniek en welzijn in haar innovatie. Onderzoek van gerenommeerde instellingen wordt gecombineerd met eigen kennis en onderzoek. Zo slaagt Wellco erin producten te bieden die alleen aan de hoogste standaarden voldoen. 

Wellco is vooral actief in Europa, waarbij de nadruk ligt op de thuismarkt Nederland, Duitsland, Skandinavië en België. Fitform-fauteuils vinden hun weg naar de eindgebruiker via verschillende kanalen zoals meubelzaken en zorgwinkels. 

Wellco Seating BV is de maakorganisatie van Wellco.

Name: STRONGROOM DESIGN
Description:
Strongroom Design is a premium European furniture brand specializing in industrial, loft-style design. We create handcrafted furniture that combines raw steel, solid oak, and unique finishes to bring bold character and timeless aesthetics into modern interiors.

Our mission is to celebrate the beauty of raw materials and the skill of traditional craftsmanship. Every piece is thoughtfully designed and made in Europe with precision, attention to detail, and artistic expression. From media consoles and shelving units to custom-designed furniture, Strongroom Design is built for those who appreciate authenticity, quality, and minimalist style.

We cater to interior designers, architects, and individual customers who are looking for unique pieces that make a statement. Whether furnishing a New York loft, a modern home, or a boutique commercial space, our furniture adds soul and strength to any room.

We believe in slow design, sustainability, and the value of long-lasting materials. Our collections are small-batch, carefully curated, and crafted to last for generations — not seasons.

Strongroom Design is more than furniture. It’s an experience of form, function, and material integrity. Discover the intersection of industrial aesthetics and artisanal excellence.

Welcome to Strongroom Design.

Name: Drewtur
Description:
Drewtur Sp. z o.o., z siedzibą w Słodkowie k. Turku, to nowoczesne przedsiębiorstwo specjalizujące się w obróbce i uszlachetnianiu elementów z drewna oraz materiałów drewnopochodnych. Dzięki zaawansowanemu parkowi maszynowemu, obejmującemu 16 centrów obróbczych CNC, oraz zespołowi ponad 450 wykwalifikowanych pracowników, firma realizuje zarówno seryjne, jak i indywidualne zamówienia dla klientów z Polski i zagranicy.

Nasze specjalizacje:

    Komponenty dla przemysłu kolejowego i motoryzacyjnego: Produkcja elementów z drewna, sklejki, laminatów, metalu i tworzyw sztucznych, spełniających najwyższe standardy jakości.

    Meble i akcesoria meblowe: Tworzenie gotowych mebli oraz ich elementów zgodnie z dokumentacją klienta.

Nasze atuty:

Doświadczenie: Działalność od 1978 roku, z sukcesami na rynkach krajowym i międzynarodowym.

Jakość: Certyfikaty ISO 9001 (od 2005 r.) oraz EN 17460, potwierdzające najwyższe standardy produkcji.

Elastyczność: Realizacja zamówień na podstawie dokumentacji klienta lub opracowanej przez nas, z możliwością dostosowania do indywidualnych potrzeb.

Infrastruktura: Nowoczesne hale produkcyjne o łącznej powierzchni 22 000 m², wyposażone w zaawansowane technologie obróbki drewna.

Name: Eurl Escrive
Description:
Escrive Menuiserie,
menuisier et agenceur à Albi depuis près de 60 ans
Menuiserie sur-mesure, agencement intérieur, mobilier sur-mesure, cuisine haut de gamme
Bienvenue chez Escrive menuiserie, votre expert en menuiserie à Albi. Nous vous offrons une gamme complète de services, allant de la fabrication d’agencement intérieur sur-mesure en passant par la rénovation ou le remplacement de menuiseries extérieures. Avec près de 60 ans d’expérience en tant qu’artisans menuisiers dans le Tarn à Albi, notre engagement envers la qualité et l’artisanat se reflète dans chaque projet que nous entreprenons
Menuiseries extérieures
De la rénovation de fenêtres et portes traditionnelles en bois à la conception de fenêtres et portes modernes en bois, Alu ou PVC, nous nous engageons à fournir des produits hauts de gamme qui préservent l’authenticité tout en offrant une esthétique moderne et des performances énergétiques optimales. Habitués à travailler avec des menuiseries anciennes et traditionnelles notre expérience vous permet de profiter de l’authenticité de ces menuiseries et de finitions haut de gamme.
Menuiseries intérieures
Découvrez notre savoir-faire dans la création de portes intérieures uniques et d’escaliers sur-mesure, ajoutant une touche distinctive à votre intérieur. Chaque intérieur est unique et a son propre style : traditionnel, moderne ou design, nous fabriquons les menuiseries intérieures qui s’alignent avec vos vies. Nos parquets traditionnels apportent une chaleur naturelle à chaque espace, témoignant du charme intemporel du bois. Sublimez vos intérieurs en faisant appel à un artisan menuisier à AlbI
Spécialiste de l’agencement sur-mesure de votre intérieur à Albi
Agencement

Mobilier sur-mesure

Description: Charles Alan Furniture is a custom contract furniture manufacturer in Fort Worth, TX, specializing in American-made pieces for commercial, healthcare, and hospitality sectors. Name: Motiondesk Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Od momentu, gdy po raz pierwszy projekt pojawił się na desce kreślarskiej, naszą wizją zawsze było stworzenie czegoś więcej niż tylko biurka regulowanego. Każde biurko Motiondesk jest spersonalizowane i przygotowane z myślą o potrzebach użytkownika. Wszystkie nasze biurka są robione ręcznie na zamówienie, przygotowujemy biurka o dowolnym kształcie i wymiarze.

Za pośrednictwem naszego e-commerce’u i showroomu oferujemy inteligentne, regulowane biurka do pracy w pozycji siedzącej/stojącej oraz ergonomiczne akcesoria. Oferujemy również gotowe, kompleksowe rozwiązania dla firm, które chcą wyposażyć swoje biura w stylowe produkty, które optymalizują zdrowie i produktywność pracowników.

Naszą misją jest promocja zdrowego trybu życia i wsparcie firm w decyzji zastąpienia biurek tradycyjnych, biurkami regulowanymi elektrycznie. Sprzedajemy ich coraz więcej, także na rynkach UE, co napawa nas dumą. Jesteśmy producentem rozpoznawalnym, cenionym w kraju i za granicą, który od lat buduje reputację marki Motiondesk na bezkompromisowej jakości i oferowaniu Klientom możliwości personalizacji zamawianych biurek.

Tworząc nasze biurka, pragniemy mieć swój wkład w naturalne dążenie ludzi do poprawy warunków życia. Nasze biurka elektryczne z funkcją regulowania wysokości blatu pozwalają na dostosowanie powierzchni roboczej do wzrostu użytkownika oraz na zmianę i korygowanie pozycji ciała podczas pracy. 

Dostarczamy rozwiązania, które pozwalają tworzyć kreatywne i ergonomiczne przestrzenie w miejscach pracy jak i w domach. W naszej pracy podążamy za najnowszymi trendami oraz rozwiązaniami technologicznymi. 

Na pierwszym miejscu stawiamy zadowolenie Klienta z naszego produktu oraz całego procesu zakupów. Stawiamy naszych Klientów w centrum wszystkiego co robimy, upewniając się, że proces zakupowy jest prosty, produkt dokonały, a posprzedażowe wsparcie Klienta jest na najwyższym poziomie…


… a naszą satysfakcją są ciągle powracający Klienci, zarówno indywidualni jak i biznesowi.

Name: RF Group
Description:
Nato da una felice intuizione di Mario Ramanzin, l'RF Group è, da oltre cinquant'anni, un punto di riferimento nel mercato dell'artigianato.

Siamo specializzati nella realizzazione e nella fornitura di arredi per alberghi, negozi, uffici e abitazioni, oltre che di restauro e manutenzione degli stessi.

Name: Clark and Prince Ltd
Description:
At Clark & Prince, we design and manufacture bespoke furniture and joinery solutions for commercial and domestic environments across the South East of England. With over 25 years of experience, we are trusted by businesses, developers, and private clients to deliver projects where quality, precision, and reliability are essential.

Our expertise covers a broad range of sectors, including:

Corporate offices – boardroom tables, workstations, reception desks, and collaborative spaces

Hospitality and retail – bespoke fittings, bar units, display solutions, and tailored furnishings

Residential developments – custom kitchens, wardrobes, and integrated storage designed to specification

Every project is built around the client’s needs. We work in partnership with architects, interior designers, and contractors to ensure each piece is delivered on time, on budget, and to the highest standard. From initial consultation to installation, we manage the process with a focus on clear communication and seamless delivery.

What sets Clark & Prince apart is our combination of traditional craftsmanship with modern production methods. We select premium materials, apply rigorous attention to detail, and maintain a strong commitment to durability and finish. The result is furniture that not only meets functional requirements but enhances the spaces in which it is placed.

 Based just south of Luton, we provide services throughout the South East.
 Contact us to discuss how Clark & Prince can support your next project.

Uzman ekibimizle birlikte, modern teknoloji ve kaliteli malzemeler kullanarak hayallerinizi gerçeğe dönüştürmeyi hedefliyoruz.

Tasarımlarımız, mekanlarınıza hem şıklık hem de fonksiyonellik kazandırırken, size özgü çözümlerle benzersiz bir deneyim yaşatır. Proje yönetiminden üretime, teslimattan montaja kadar tüm süreçlerde profesyonel bir yaklaşım sunuyoruz.

Name: Franccino Campinas
Description:

A marca é reconhecida por móveis outdoor e nos últimos anos também com a linha indoor, assinados por quem dita tendências no Brasil, produzidos com precisão, tecnologia de ponta e consciência sustentável — para projetos que valorizam o alto padrão em todos os detalhes.

Name: AM SMART B-H D.O.O.
Description:
AM Smart je grupa kompanija specijaliziranih za rješenja opremanja prodavnica širom Evrope. 

Veoma smo dobro organizirani. Da nismo, ne bismo bili u mogućnosti da upravljamo projektima u preko 600 prodavnica godišnje, širom Evrope. Poslujemo u 12 zemalja, a naši koordinatori govore tečno 14 jezika.

Danas se ponosimo agilnom mrežom podizvođača u Kini, Tajvanu, Ukrajini i Turskoj, gdje proizvodimo komponente za sve naše glavne projekte. Naši partneri su fabrike najsavremenije tehnologije i optimizovanih troškova.

Za manje, kraće serije, uključujući prototipove i poslove koji zahtijevaju brze rokove izrade, koristimo našu internu diviziju za stolarske i metalne radove, smještenu u blizini Gorzowa Wielkopolskog (Poljska), opremljenu najsavremenijim CNC mašinama i vođenu visoko kvalifikovanim i iskusnim produkcijskim timom.

Naša mreža lokalnih instalacionih timova i koordinatora omogućava nam brzo prepoznavanje prilika i održavanje fleksibilnosti u pogledu dizajna, obima i rokova.

Naše podružnice izvan Evropske unije pružaju nam značajnu fleksibilnost u upravljanju carinama i ponudi plaćanja u lokalnim valutama.

AM Smart je tim iskusnih profesionalaca koji obezbjeđuje kratke rokove izrade i operativnu efikasnost. Naš vlastiti vozni park i provjereni instalateri garantiraju brzu i sveobuhvatnu isporuku projekta po principu “ključ u ruke”.

U AM Smart-u cijenimo samostalnost i imamo ogromno zadovoljstvo iz uspješnog rješavanja problema. Kontinuirano nastojimo pružiti našim klijentima bolja, trajnija rješenja, proširujući ponudu usluga i dajući prioritet kvalitetu proizvoda. Iz dana u dan pokazujemo da ništa nije nemoguće.

Name: Die Schönheit des Schlafes
Description:
Die Firma Beauty Sleep GmbH aus Deutschland ist der autorisierter und offizieller Partner und Vertreter der Marke und exklusiver Produkte von MEDI PUR. Zusammen mit dem Sortiment orthopädisch exklusiver medizinischer Matratzen, Matratzenauflagen und Kissen der Marke MEDI PUR bieten wir allen Menschen mit chronischen Gesundheitsproblemen und insbesondere gesunden Menschen eine anspruchsvolle und effiziente Hilfe und Schutz, damit sie gesund bleiben. 

Die Produkte der exklusive MEDI PUR-Linie bieten präventive Hilfe und Schutz und helfen nachweislich bei schmerzhaften Wirbelsäulensyndromen, Ischias, Bandscheibenvorfall, Lendenwirbelsäule, geschwächter Durchblutung und schwachen Knochen. 

Die Kombination aus extrem hoher Qualität, Langlebigkeit und Innovation wurde von 10 renommierten EU-Instituten, darunter HALMED (Kroatische Agentur für Arzneimittel und Medizinprodukte) und EUDAMED (Europäische Agentur für Arzneimittel und Medizinprodukte), anerkannt, gewürdigt und mit Bestnoten bewertet, wo die MEDI PUR-Produkte im Medizinprodukteregister als MEDIZINPRODUKT – KLASSE I eingetragen sind.

Name: Avita group
Description:
With over a decade of expertise in designing, manufacturing, and importing furniture, fittings, machinery, and related equipment for diverse commercial settings, we began our journey in 2014 under the brand Altavita. During this time, we built our reputation by officially distributing high-end architectural furniture from leading European brands, including:  

*Tubes, Frattini, Zucchetti, Spazioquadro, Mengucci, Doca, Artelinea, Laminam, Azzura, Damianolatini, and Bernazzoli.*  

In response to new restrictions on luxury imports, we rebranded as Avita Ideh-Pardaz in 2019 and pivoted to domestic production. Today, in our 7,000 m² facility—equipped with cutting-edge technology and supported by a team of 120 skilled professionals—we focus on five core product groups, serving major projects both in Iran and internationally.  

By blending technical precision with artistic vision, we prioritize customization as our key competitive edge. Our mission is to understand our clients’ needs and work closely with consultants to continuously enhance the end-user experience.

Name: Mango School Furniture India
Description:
At Mango School Furniture, we believe that well-designed environments shape better learning experiences. Established in 1995, we are one of India’s leading manufacturers of high-quality institutional furniture, catering to schools, colleges, libraries, and learning spaces across the country.

With a presence in over 6,000 institutions across 23 states, our product range includes ergonomic classroom desks, modular tables, book stands, floor seating, puppet theaters, carpets, and wall-mounted toys — all designed with safety, comfort, and functionality in mind.

Our furniture is crafted using CRC structures, E1 grade wood, and eco-friendly materials, with a commitment to durability, child safety, and global design standards. Recognized as the “Best Classroom Furniture Provider” by the Global Education Awards 2023, we continue to innovate and inspire through design that supports learning.

Whether you're building a kindergarten or upgrading a university campus, Mango delivers thoughtfully designed furniture that grows with your institution.

 Based in India |  Serving educational spaces nationwide
 www.mangoschoolfurniture.com

Name: Eldem Furniture
Description:
Eldem Mobilya, modern yaşam alanlarınıza şıklık ve konfor katan yenilikçi tasarımlarıyla sektörde fark yaratan bir markadır. Şirketimiz, müşteri memnuniyetini en üst düzeyde tutarak, estetik ve fonksiyonelliği bir araya getiren geniş bir ürün yelpazesi sunmaktadır.

Misyonumuz, yaşam alanlarınızı güzelleştirirken kalite, dayanıklılık ve sürdürülebilirliği ön planda tutmaktır. Bu doğrultuda, her ürünümüzün tasarım aşamasından üretimine kadar olan süreçte en kaliteli malzemeleri kullanıyor ve üstün işçilikle hayat bulmasını sağlıyoruz. Eldem Mobilya, modern çizgilere sahip koltuk takımları, yemek odası takımları, yatak odası takımları ve çeşitli ev aksesuarları ile evlerinize değer katmayı amaçlamaktadır.

Eldem Mobilya olarak, sadece mobilya üretmekle kalmıyor, aynı zamanda müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına en uygun çözümleri sunarak, onların yaşam kalitesini artırmayı hedefliyoruz. Bu hedefimize ulaşmak için, AR-GE çalışmalarımıza büyük önem veriyor ve sektördeki yenilikleri yakından takip ediyoruz. Bu sayede, her geçen gün ürün yelpazemizi genişleterek, müşterilerimizin beklentilerini karşılamaya devam ediyoruz.

Çevreye duyarlılık ve sürdürülebilirlik ilkeleri doğrultusunda, üretim süreçlerimizi çevre dostu yöntemlerle gerçekleştiriyoruz. Geri dönüşümlü malzemeler kullanarak, doğaya olan etkilerimizi en aza indirmeyi amaçlıyoruz. Aynı zamanda, sosyal sorumluluk projelerine de katkıda bulunarak, topluma ve çevreye duyarlı bir marka olmanın gururunu taşıyoruz.

Eldem Mobilya, siz değerli müşterilerimizin güveni ve memnuniyeti sayesinde, her geçen gün daha da büyüyen bir aile olmanın mutluluğunu yaşamaktadır. Sizleri, mağazalarımızda ve online platformlarımızda ağırlamaktan büyük onur duyarız. Hayalinizdeki yaşam alanlarını birlikte yaratmak için buradayız.

Name: Old Mill Road Tables Co
Description:
At Old Mill Road Tables, we specialize in crafting high-quality, custom furniture tailored for interior designers and their clients. With years of expertise in woodworking and a deep understanding of design aesthetics, we bring visions to life—creating statement pieces that blend functionality with timeless craftsmanship.

We collaborate closely with designers to ensure that every detail aligns with their creative direction, offering expert guidance in materials, finishes, and construction. Our process is seamless, reliable, and designed to elevate any space with custom-built solutions.

Based in Bridgeport, CT, we serve clients across New York, Connecticut, and the Hamptons. Whether it’s a bespoke dining table, a refined office desk, or a unique statement piece, we turn concepts into reality.

 Let’s connect and create something extraordinary together.
