Name: DIZZA HOME FURNITURE
Description:
With experience in furniture manufacturing dating back to the 1970s DİZZAHOME,has adopted the principle of becoming a recognized brand and expanding globally. Continuing its activities with a new production facility, DİZZAHOME, has focused on growth since its establishment, quickly evolving and maintaining its brand investments as an innovative company.

With strong business partnerships and a specialized team, DİZZAHOME aims to be present in numerous prestigious locations worldwide; today, it is preparing to become one of the leading companies in the furniture industry with over 100 sales points domestically and internationally.

Understanding the desires and demands of newlyweds, those renewing their homes, and those in need, DİZZAHOME, strives to help create the living spaces they envision. DİZZAHOME,not only fulfills people's furniture needs but also promises to bring style and harmony into living spaces through its designs.

From materials to fabrics, colors to designs, DİZZAHOMEproducts offer people the freedom to have the combinations they want in their living spaces. Its designs, shaped by years of experience and expertise, are presented to customers with various fabric and color options. With its pioneering innovations, DİZZAHOME,stands out in the industry, taking steps to foster unity and collaboration and drawing attention to its emphasis on design and designers.

Name: Maderarte MX

Description:
En Grupo Reynaud, nos apasiona la atención al detalle y nos esforzamos por brindar una comunicación positiva que refleje nuestro compromiso con la calidad y la atención al cliente. 

Como fabricantes especializados en muebles, cortinas, persianas y toldos, nos dedicamos a materializar sus visiones y crear espacios únicos y acogedores, colaborando estrechamente con diseñadores, arquitectos e interioristas. También estamos aquí para transformar los espacios de particulares, llevando la elegancia y funcionalidad a cada hogar. 

En Grupo Reynaud, creamos no solo muebles, sino experiencias que perduran en la memoria. Haz de tu proyecto algo extraordinario con nosotros!

Name: Meubles Séraphin
Description:
Depuis tout petit, je suis intéressé par les travaux manuels et c'était un vrai bonheur de traîner dans les ateliers de mon grand-père soudeur et de mon oncle menuisier, de les assister dans leurs réalisations et d'en apprendre toujours plus. J'ai finalement opté pour une carrière plus intellectuelle puisque je travaille comme informaticien la semaine, mais le travail manuel manquait à mon épanouissement. Passionné par le travail du bois et de la matière, j'ai suivi un cursus de formation de plusieurs années en ébénisterie que j'ai complété par une formation en soudure.
Je travaille désormais comme indépendant complémentaire en tant que créateur de meubles sur-mesure. Ce que j'aime particulièrement, c'est de suivre et créer un projet de A à Z : de l'écoute des besoins du client, en passant par la proposition de solutions sur-mesure, jusqu'à la réalisation du meuble ou placard fonctionnel et esthétique qui s'intègrera parfaitement dans son intérieur.
Je travaille tout type de bois (bois massif comme le chêne et le sapin, panneaux mélaminés ou plaqués avec du bois massif) ou de mélange bois/métal. J'affectionne une esthétique assez épurée et efficace qui vient au service de la fonctionnalité du meuble.

Name: Trend Contract Furnishings
Description:
At our company, we have always believed that upholstery is not just a trade but a form of artistry. Our skilled artisans are the painters of this canvas, sculpting every curve, and stitch with precision and passion.  It is a craft that transcends mere fabric and foam.

As we continue our journey in the world of furniture design and upholstery, we hold dear the values of respect, appreciation, and a dedication to excellence. Upholstery is not just an art—it's an expression of our company's soul, and it's a privilege to share it with you.

Upholstery is not a destination; it is a journey. From the moment we select the fabric or leather to the final stitch, each step is an exercise in precision and patience. It is a journey that respects the past while embracing the future of design. It is a journey that is mindful of sustainability and environmental responsibility, ensuring that our artistry leaves a minimal footprint on the world we cherish.

We work closely with both our designing and manufacturing team to develop a pest repeller that will protect your home from a pest invasion.

We have noticed an increase in pest activities throughout the years. We have always struggled with a pest problem, after trying a large variety of products to get rid of pests, it has always been a hassle from “what to do with the pest one you find it dead in the trap?” to “products are ineffective”.
This is why we took matters to our own hands and started researching and developing a pest repellent that worked perfectly for us. After perfecting the product for our own use and seeing results from our own eyes, we want to introduce our product to people.

تعتبر النجارة من الخدمات الأساسية التي يحتاجها الجميع في المنازل، المكاتب، والمنشآت التجارية. فالنجارة تشمل تركيب وصيانة المطابخ، الأثاث، والأبواب، وكذلك الأعمال الخشبية المتخصصة. ولضمان الجودة والمتانة، من المهم الاعتماد على نجار محترف. في مدن الدمام، الخبر، القطيف، والظهران، توفر شركة فرسانك خدمات النجارة بأعلى مستوى من الاحترافية.

خدمات فرسانك في النجارة
شركة فرسانك تقدم حلولاً متكاملة في النجارة، من تركيب الأثاث والمطابخ إلى إصلاح الأبواب. فريق النجارين المدربين لدى فرسانك يضمن تنفيذ جميع المهام بدقة وفعالية. سواء كنت تحتاج لتركيب مطبخ جديد أو إصلاح أثاث، فإن فرسانك هي الخيار الأمثل.

مميزات نجار فرسانك
جودة عالية: استخدام أفضل المواد لضمان المتانة والجودة.
الدقة والاحترافية: فريق يمتلك خبرة واسعة في جميع أنواع النجارة.
الالتزام بالمواعيد: تقديم الخدمات في الوقت المحدد لضمان راحة العملاء.

Mekânları sadece donatmak değil, onları daha yaşanabilir, daha estetik ve daha özgün kılmak için çalışıyoruz.

•Tasarım, mühendislik ve üretimi bir araya getirerek;
• Konutlardan ticari projelere, 
• Mobilyadan duvar kaplamalarına kadar uzanan geniş bir yelpazede
anahtar teslim çözümler sunuyoruz.

Her projede amacımız;
• Kaliteyi sürdürülebilir kılmak,
• Fonksiyonelliği estetikle birleştirmek,
• Global ölçekte düşünen ama yerel detaylara önem veren tasarımlar üretmek.

Coco Furniture, geleceğin tasarım anlayışını bugünden inşa etmeyi hedefleyen, inovatif bir mimari vizyon ile ilerler.
Sadece ürün değil, değer üretiriz.

“Tasarım bizim dilimiz. Üretim ise imzamız.”

Name: Mirella Meubel
Description:
Wij leveren hoogwaardige oplossingen voor horeca, kantoren, winkels en projectinrichting. Van horecabanken en maatwerkzitmeubilair tot complete interieuroplossingen — alles wordt met vakmanschap, precisie en moderne technologie in eigen fabriek in Vlaardingen gerealiseerd.

Onze kracht ligt in het combineren van esthetisch design met technische maakbaarheid. Dankzij onze ervaring, CNC-gestuurde productie (o.a. HOMAG, iMOS en woodWOP) en een flexibel team kunnen wij snel schakelen en vrijwel elk ontwerp realiseren, in kleine of grote oplages.

Wij denken actief mee met interieurarchitecten, ontwerpers en ondernemers en zijn gewend om mee te bouwen aan unieke concepten en totaalprojecten. Kwaliteit, duurzaamheid en afwerking staan bij ons altijd centraal.

Name: Sierra Bedding
Description:
Sierra Home modern hayatı şekillendirmek, yeniliklerin öncüsü olmak ve müşterilerinin hayatını daha da konforlu ve kaliteli hale getirmek için 20 yılın üzerindeki sektör deneyimi ile çalışmalarını sürdürmektedir.Müşterileri ile birlikte çalışanları, çözüm ortakları, paydaşları, faaliyet gösterdiği sektör ve en önemlisi de ülkesi için büyümek, istihdam sağlamak ve her daim ilave katma değerler üretmek Sierra Home markasının temel öncelikleri ve prensipleridir.

Sierra Home markasının başarısının arkasında; modanın yakın takipçisi olmak, çalışanlarının işine duyduğu heyecan, müşteri memnuniyetine verdiği önem, kaliteli ve ergonomik ürün yelpazesi, arge ve teknoloji yatırımlarındaki süreklilik, dinamik ve nitelikli insan kaynağı ve bütün bunları stratejik ve finansal anlamda destekleyen etkin bir yönetim anlayışı yer almaktadır.

Sierra Home Dünya ölçeğinde değişimin ve modanın belirleyicilerinden birisi olma yolunda sahip olduğu geniş müşteri ve iletişim ağını, nitelikli ar-ge,insan kaynağını, bilgi ve iş birliği imkanlarını en iyi şekilde ve etkin olarak kullanmaktadır. Bunlara ilave olarak insanların hayatını kolaylaştıran ve daha da konforlu hale getiren inovatif projeler ortaya koyarak, küresel bir oyuncu olma vizyonuyla, ülke ekonomisine faydalı olacağına inandığı yatırım fırsatlarını özenle değerlendirmeye ve hayata geçirmeye devam etmektedir.

Name: SHAYNE FURNITURE GROUP
Description:
Shayne Furniture Group is a leading ODM manufacturer specializing in premium indoor furniture for the world’s top-tier retail brands. Since 1999, we have been committed to high-quality furniture production and global export, with a mission to serve the top 10% of high-income households worldwide.

Headquartered in Asia, our main production bases are located in Hangzhou, China and Bavet, Cambodia, covering a total of 480,000 sqm and supported by a team of over 2,600 employees. As of 2023, Shayne operates 26 specialized furniture factories, with an annual capacity of over 4,500 containers (40HQ), enabling us to handle a wide range of product categories and order volumes.

We proudly supply custom indoor furniture to premium retailers across the United States, Europe, Australia, and the Middle East. Our clients include some of the world’s most recognized home brands who rely on our precise craftsmanship, stable supply chain, and responsive service.

Our capabilities include:

Custom design & prototyping

Flexible order volumes (from 1 piece to full containers)

Inventory planning & order management

Full quality control system

Global logistics with door-to-door delivery

What sets us apart is our ability to support diverse, made-to-order programs without compromising on quality, speed, or cost control. Whether you are scaling a product line or launching a new retail concept, Shayne provides value-added manufacturing solutions tailored to your market needs.

We don't just make furniture — we empower brands.

Description:
En CUATRO CEDROS MUEBLES, nos especializamos en diseñar y fabricar muebles personalizados para proyectos personalizados y exclusivos. Con más de 15 años de experiencia en el rubro, hemos demostrado nuestra capacidad para llevar a cabo proyectos complejos y exigentes.



Ofrecemos una línea de proyectos hogareños, diseñados para mejorar la funcionalidad y el estilo de tus espacios. Desde la creación de espacios de almacenamiento personalizados hasta la diseño de áreas de descanso y relajación, nuestros proyectos hogareños están diseñados para hacer que tu hogar sea un lugar más cómodo y acogedor.



Además, Nuestra empresa participa activamente en el mercado de la construcción, ofreciendo soluciones integrales y personalizadas para nuestros clientes. Nuestro equipo de expertos en diseño y fabricación trabaja en estrecha colaboración con nuestros clientes para entender sus necesidades y preferencias, y crear soluciones que se adapten a sus requerimientos.



Ofrecemos una amplia variedad de servicios, incluyendo:



- Diseño y fabricación de muebles personalizados

- Proyectos integrales para viviendas familiares y complejos de viviendas

- Soluciones de diseño y fabricación para espacios comerciales

- Participación en la construcción de viviendas y proyectos de arquitectura y construcción

- Proyectos hogareños personalizados



En CUATRO CEDROS MUEBLES, nos comprometemos a ofrecer la más alta calidad en nuestros productos y servicios, y a trabajar en estrecha colaboración con nuestros clientes para asegurarnos de que sus proyectos se completen a tiempo y dentro del presupuesto.

Name: PRO-MEBEL Błaszak Przemysław
Description:
W branży meblowej już od 2001 roku.
W naszej pracy staramy się łączyć doświadczenie z wciąż rozwijającą się technologią produkcji mebli. Pracujemy na bazie najlepszych materiałów wyposażamy nasze meble w najnowocześniejsze rozwiązania technologiczne . Dysponujemy własną linią produkcyjną, wyposażoną w zaawansowany technologicznie park maszynowy.
Na podstawie oczekiwań klienta opracowywana jest komputerowa wizualizacja w fotoprzestrzeni.
Podsumowaniem projektu jest wycena, następnie podpisanie umowy oraz przekazanie go do realizacji. Naszą ofertę uzupełnia możliwość zakupu w studio sprzętu AGD oraz dobór blatów z kamienia naturalnego, konglomeratu kwarcowego, spieków.

Zapraszamy do skorzystania z naszych usług oraz odwiedzenia nas w studio, gdzie mogą Państwo zasięgnąć szczegółowych informacji na temat wszelkich zagadnień związanych zarówno z meblami, jak i ich wyposażeniem.

Name: DONG PHUONG FURNITURE CO., LTD
Description:
Dịch vụ gia công CNC tại Đông Phương Furniture mang lại cho khách hàng những lợi ích và giá trị là không thể bàn cãi dựa trên những dự án gia công CNC mà Đông Phương Furniture đã triển khai cho khách hàng.

Đông Phương Furniture sở hữu số lượng máy gia công CNC lớn nhất ở thị trường miền Nam(trên 50 máy CNC). Đi cùng là những giải pháp công nghệ CNC hiện đại và tiên tiến nhất nhằm đáp ứng được nhu cầu của khách hàng và những đơn hàng số lượng lớn. Việc sở hữu nhiều máy CNC giúp Đông Phương Furniture có thể gia công trên đa dạng nguyên vật liệu từ gỗ, nhựa, mica, tấm xi măng, nhôm, sắt……

Từ đó tạo nên sự đa dạng về lựa chọn cho khách hàng. Về chất lượng của từng sản phẩm do Đông Phương Furniture tạo ra thì không cần bàn cãi về độ chính xác và hoàn hảo. Sở hữu công nghệ và dàn máy chất lượng cao khiến cho sản phẩm tạo ra luôn có sự đồng nhất và chính xác tốt nhất.

Name: Bothy.Studio
Description: Intentionally simple furniture for the life you actually live. Furniture designed and made in Nelson, BC, Canada. B2B and B2C

Name: URBAE
Description:
En URBAE diseñamos y fabricamos mobiliario urbano en hormigón arquitectónico. Nuestra gama de productos incluye bancos, jardineras, papeleras, mesas y otros elementos pensados para mejorar la funcionalidad y estética de los espacios públicos.

Trabajamos con materiales de proximidad, apostando por la sostenibilidad, la durabilidad y el diseño contemporáneo. Colaboramos con administraciones, arquitectos y paisajistas para ofrecer soluciones estándar o a medida, adaptadas a cada proyecto

Name: Outdoor Dining Seats
Description:
Success leaves clues, and in a city where every square foot counts, the smartest restaurant owners are maximizing their outdoor spaces. Outdoor Dining Seats is redefining what’s possible in NYC’s hospitality industry by delivering high-performance, revenue-driven outdoor dining structures that don’t just comply with regulations—they create an unstoppable advantage for restaurants.

We specialize in NYC DOT-compliant dining structures, automatic rooftop pergolas, and high-end galvanized steel designs built for profitability, longevity, and seamless compliance. Our turnkey solutions give restaurants the ability to increase seating, revenue, and guest satisfaction with structures that are built to last and engineered to perform.

If you’re ready to step up, scale up, and own your outdoor space, we’ll show you how.

Name: MTSIS
Description:
En MTSIS, somos especialistas en la creación de espacios expositivos únicos y atractivos. Con más de 20 años de experiencia en el sector, hemos desarrollado un sistema de mobiliario que se ha ido perfeccionando y evolucionando para satisfacer las necesidades de museos, oficinas y puntos de información.

Nuestro catálogo incluye vitrinas para museos, paneles de exposición y mesas de oficina, todos diseñados con la máxima atención al detalle y la calidad. Además, somos los creadores de Koala, un sistema patentado de señalización y comunicación ideal para museos y exposiciones.

Pero en MTSIS, no solo vendemos mobiliario. Nuestro objetivo es ser un socio estratégico para nuestros clientes, ayudándoles a crear espacios que cuenten historias, inspiren a los visitantes y destaquen por su diseño y funcionalidad.

Si estás buscando soluciones de mobiliario para tu museo, oficina o espacio expositivo, no dudes en contactarnos. Estaremos encantados de ayudarte a encontrar la solución perfecta para tus necesidades.

Name: Krea Sistem Yapı Furniture
Description:
Krea Sistem İnşaat Sanayi ve Ticaret Ltd. Şti., 2012 yılındaki kuruluşundan bu yana, mobilya üretimi alanında hizmet vermeye kendini adamıştır.
Şirket, toplamda 2.400 metrekarelik bir alana yayılan son teknoloji bir tesiste faaliyet göstermektedir. Bu geniş alanın 2.000 metrekaresi titizlikle üretim faaliyetlerine ayrılmış olup, her bir mobilya parçasının en yüksek standartlarda üretilmesi sağlanmaktadır.
Ayrıca, 400 metrekarelik bir alan cilalama atölyesi olarak ayrılmıştır. Burada her bir ürün kusursuz bir şekilde tamamlanarak, Krea Sistem’in kalite ve mükemmellik taahhüdünü yansıtmaktadır.

Name: LuthierZ
Description:
LuthierZ by Cristian C. is a Romanian initiative started by 20yr old entrepreneur Cristian Cazanaru.

The goal of the company is to create the most interesting furniture pieces for any space, but with a twist: all the designs include repurposed musical instruments.

LuthierZ offers both premade objects and custom-on-demand pieces.
If none of the premade products suit your needs, or you just want a 1of1 piece, sign up for a custom project and LuthierZ will give 100% to solve your needs in a fine, stylish way.

Name: Grupo MBM Nicaragua
Description:
Después de más de 30 años, en Grupo MBM somos gente trabajando en empresas pioneras y líderes en la manufactura de espuma flexible, colchones, maquinado industrial, agricultura y bienes raíces para crear un mañana mejor.
 
Estamos enfocados en el bienestar de los colaboradores, el progreso de las comunidades, la protección del medio ambiente y la transparencia en la comercialización de nuestros productos. 

Esta trayectoria refleja la unidad de una familia que a través de tres generaciones de éxitos y compromiso, desarrolla negocios y marcas de prestigio que contribuyen al progreso de Nicaragua.

Name: De StaalZaak
Description:
Met veel plezier en creativiteit werken wij vanuit de
oude melkfabriek in Jubbega aan onze projecten.

Wij werken zowel voor particuliere opdrachtgevers als voor bedrijven zoals interieurbouwers en architecten. Het ontwerp wordt meestal aangeleverd door onze opdrachtgever, maar wij denken graag met jullie mee in het ontwerp.

Wij maken alles in eigen beheer. Onze werkplaats is volledig ingericht voor het verwerken van Staal en licht constructiewerk.

Wij plaatsen onze eigen gemaakte werkstukken. Of het nu een losse deur is of een enorme pui, wij zorgen dat het naar alle tevreden wordt opgeleverd.

Name: Mobilya Craft
Description: Get answers to your questions, gain design confidence and a customised design plan for you to implement at your own pace.

Name: One Lift
Description:
OneLift è una società giovane, ma con radici profonde.
Nasce oggi, ma porta con sé anni di esperienza nel settore dell’accessibilità e del sollevamento.

Name: Aygo School Design
Description:
Established in 2001, AYGO has specialized in the education sector, focusing on a wide range of products such as kindergarten furniture, rehabilitation tools, special education products, and furniture for elementary and high schools. Our parent company, Ercan Mob. Ltd, operating under the AY-GO brand, aims for continuous improvement by offering the latest models and competitive prices in the kindergarten market with its self-produced wooden products.
As AYGO Educational Products, we continue to export the products we manufacture in Turkey to the United Kingdom and the European market. Through our subsidiary company, EYTAP London Ltd., based in the United Kingdom, we collaborate more extensively with our partners in Europe, contributing to education across the continent. Additionally, our London-based education consultancy firm, AYGOSTUDY, provides international education consultancy services.
With 23 years of industry experience and thousands of satisfied customers, our company is steadfast in its commitment to continuous innovation and development, maintaining its position as a pioneer in the education products market.

Name: TEKNEDIL
Description: commercializzazione di protezioni murali e alla commercializzazione ed installazione di automatismi per porte, raggiungendo alti standard di qualità su tutti i suoi prodotti.

Name: Orebo Savværk & Møbelsnedkeri
Description:
Orebo blev grundlagt i 1890 af murermester Johannes Rebien, der havde en forkærlighed for træarbejde. Lige efter århundredeskiftet blev et savværk og en skaftefabrik etableret.
Siden er der sket rigtig meget. 
Med eget savværk og drejeri har vi nu en maskinpark til alle former for træbearbejdning. Vi har desuden en afdeling med møbelsnedkere og en omfattende finer produktion til plademøbler som garderober og køkkener.
I dag leverer vi alt fra avanceret individuel indretning til færdige møbler af meget høj kvalitet.

Name: GP Studio BV
Description: GP Studio is a furniture manufacturer specializing in creating modern and functional solutions in the field of architecture and design. We adapt to the individual needs of our clients. The GP Studio team consists of experienced designers, a factory and professional assemblers who approach each project with passion, taking care of the smallest details. By combining creativity with a practical approach, GP Studio implements projects that combine aesthetics with functionality, meeting the expectations of even the most demanding clients.

Name: Voledo Meble
ZN Enterprise
Description:
Welcome to ZN Enterprise - Your Destination for Exceptional Furniture and Interior Solutions!

About Us:
At ZN Enterprise, we are passionate about creating inspiring and functional spaces that reflect your unique style and meet your practical needs. As a leading furniture and interior-based company, we specialize in crafting bespoke solutions that transform your vision into reality.

What Sets Us Apart:

Unparalleled Craftsmanship: Our team of skilled artisans and designers are dedicated to delivering top-notch craftsmanship. Every piece of furniture and every interior design project we undertake is a testament to our commitment to excellence.

Customization Expertise: We understand that every space is different, and every client has their own preferences. That's why we offer a wide range of customization options to ensure your furniture and interior designs are tailor-made to suit your taste and requirements.

Quality and Sustainability: We take pride in using the finest materials and sustainable practices in our creations. Our commitment to quality ensures that your investment in our products and services is one that will stand the test of time.

Innovative Design: Our talented team of designers stays at the forefront of design trends and innovations, ensuring that your space is not only beautiful but also functional and up-to-date.

Services:

Custom Furniture: From luxurious bedroom sets to functional office solutions, our custom furniture is designed to enhance your living and working spaces.

Interior Design: Whether it's a residential, commercial, or hospitality project, our interior design services breathe life into your ideas and create harmonious environments.

Consultation: Our expert team is here to guide you through every step of the process, from conceptualization to installation.

Join us on LinkedIn to stay updated on our latest projects, design inspirations, and industry insights.

Name: Baytemur Mobilya
Description:
Mobilya ve İç Dekorasyon
info@baytemurmobilya.com

Name: UniqueWood
Description:
Na UniqueWood, transformamos madeira em peças únicas. 

Combinamos a tradição artesanal com tecnologia moderna, para produzir soluções de interiores, à medida sempre com foco na qualidade, detalhe e sustentabilidade.

Desde o design à execução, cada projeto reflete a paixão pela madeira e o compromisso em criar espaços com identidade.

Name: CALEO SIA
Description: Furniture manufacturing company in Latvia. We make different types of furniture and furniture parts from a wide range of materials. We work with all board materials and solid wood, as well as provide varnishing, painting and oiling of furniture and furniture parts

Description: Production of parametric furniture for shopping and business centers, airports, urban spaces, hotels and other public and private places.

Name: Comfort-Pur
Description: Wyposażenie hotelu "pod klucz" – produkowane na Twoje zamówienie. Jesteśmy polskim producentem mebli tapicerowanych i tekstyliów. Oferujemy kompleksowe wyposażenie pokoi i stref wspólnych, łącząc solidne, drewniane konstrukcje z elastycznością tapicerni. Wszystko, co potrzebujesz, by otworzyć, wyremontować i wyposażyć hotel — od projektu po gotowy produkt na wymiar.

Name: BE SMART
Description: BE SMART è un brand nato per tutti i coloro che ricercano una soluzione di ARREDO PER L'INFANZIA esclusiva e sicura; tutti i nostri componenti d'arredo sono interamente realizzati nel nostro stabilimento di Bologna nel rispetto dell’ambiente e della sicurezza, diversificando ogni progetto con materiali di alto pregio con un rivestimento esclusivo Made in Italy creato appositamente per il GIOCO DEL BAMBINO.

Name: Arca ergo-salud
Description: Mejoramos la calidad de vida de las personas a través de la creación de muebles ergonómicos innovadores. Nuestros hábitos están cambiando a gran velocidad, por eso, nosotros estamos cambiando la industria del mobiliario con el fin de lograr que los muebles se adaptaen al ser humano y no viceversa. De esta forma buscamos darles las herramientas necesarias a las personas para prevenir problemas a nivel físico y mental. Esperamos reducir el porcentaje de población hipercifótica en el futuro cercano.

Name: Keerthi Group
Description:
Keerthi Group: Pioneering the Steel Furniture Industry in Kerala since 1989

Established in the year 1989, Keerthi Group has emerged as a leading company and a true pioneer in the steel furniture industry in Kerala, India. With decades of experience and expertise, Keerthi Group has cemented its reputation as a trusted manufacturer and wholesaler of all kinds of furniture, catering to a diverse range of clientele.

Since its inception, we has been committed to delivering high-quality furniture solutions that combine durability, functionality, and aesthetic appeal. The company specializes in steel furniture, offering an extensive range of products including steel chairs, tables, desks, cabinets, racks, and more. Their furniture is meticulously crafted using premium materials, state-of-the-art manufacturing techniques, and stringent quality control measures, ensuring long-lasting performance and customer satisfaction.

One of our key strengths is vast distribution network, which spans across South India. The company has established strong partnerships with retail outlets, making it a trusted supplier to numerous businesses in the region. Whether it's furnishing commercial spaces, educational institutions, hospitality establishments, or residential settings, we offer a comprehensive range of furniture solutions to meet diverse requirements.

In addition to its success in the retail sector, We has also garnered recognition as a reliable supplier to various government institutions. The company's commitment to quality, timely delivery, and competitive pricing has earned them prestigious contracts and long-standing partnerships with government agencies, further solidifying their position in the market.

Name: Grupo Alvarado
Description: Somos una empresa costarricense con más de 40 años de experiencia en la fabricación y distribución de mobiliario de alta calidad para hogar, oficina e instituciones. Contamos con el stock más grande de Costa Rica, ofreciendo una amplia gama de productos

Name: Quinn Peaks
Description:
Founded in 2003, Quinn Peaks is dedicated to offering uniquely designed, elegant, and durable furniture that never compromises on functionality. Our passion for superior craftsmanship and exceptional customer service has solidified our position as a market leader over the past decade. We proudly serve both local and international clients, delivering exceptional products that meet the highest standards.

At Quinn Peaks, we believe in honesty and integrity, always putting the customer’s needs first. This commitment drives us to create furniture that is not only aesthetically pleasing but also practical and long-lasting.

Our team shares a unified passion and energy, constantly striving to create a sense of uniqueness for each client we serve. The company has been awarded the prestigious Made in Kenya Brand Mark, recognizing our products for their authenticity, quality, and craftsmanship.

We are also deeply committed to minimizing our environmental impact. By using sustainable raw materials whenever possible and employing eco-friendly finishes free of volatile organic compounds (VOCs), we contribute to preserving and adding value to renewable African resources.

Quinn Peaks values people above all else. Respecting human rights is central to our operations, and we are committed to empowering our staff and craftsmen by upskilling them and providing an equitable platform for showcasing their talent. We strive to foster a safe, healthy, and respectful working environment that improves livelihoods and contributes to the socio-economic development of our country.

Name: Craftalia Consulting
Description: Craftalia Consulting è l'azienda che si occupa di fornire ad aziende estere produttrori di mobili, architetti e builder prodotti premium di aziende italiane. Con oltre 10 anni di esperienza nel settore, Craftalia fornisce supporto nella gestione dei progetti selezionando il miglior prodotto possibile per il progetto richiesto e fornendo assistenza per tutta la gestione della fase post vendita con i clienti esteri.

Name: Simply Green
Description:
At Simply Green, we are passionate about protecting the environment and encouraging women to get involved in the recycling industry. Our goal is to produce high-quality furniture using upcycled materials, such as plastic, wood, metal, and textiles. We believe that by giving new life to old materials, we can create beautiful and sustainable pieces that will last for years to come.
Our team is dedicated to ensuring that every piece of furniture we produce is not only eco-friendly but also stylish and functional. We work closely with our clients to understand their needs and preferences, and we pride ourselves on delivering exceptional customer service.

Name: Other House Design
Description: Other House Design develops furniture made with recycled weatherproof materials and novel manufacturing techniques.

Name: NOYAN LUX
Description:
Noyan Lux | Carpintería de alta calidad en Barcelona

En Noyan Lux, combinamos la tradición artesanal con la innovación para crear muebles únicos en madera maciza, melamina, enchapados y resina epóxica. Nuestro maestro carpintero, con experiencia traída desde Armenia, supervisa cada detalle para garantizar acabados impecables y diseños personalizados.

Nos especializamos en mobiliario a medida para hogares, comercios y oficinas, fusionando materiales de alta calidad con técnicas modernas y un toque artesanal. Desde mesas elegantes hasta proyectos personalizados, damos vida a tus ideas con precisión y pasión.

Ofrecemos diseños únicos y personalizados, la mejor relación calidad-precio, asesoramiento experto y transporte con montaje incluido.

Si buscas muebles con carácter, calidad y una historia detrás, visita nuestra web o contáctanos.

www.noyanluxmadera.com | Barcelona, España

Name: Muebles Roma
Description:
En Muebles Roma fabricamos camas funcionales, colchones, sofás y muebles inteligentes pensados para optimizar espacios y elevar la experiencia de descanso en los hogares chilenos.
Ubicados en Paine y con fabricación nacional, diseñamos soluciones que combinan confort, estilo y funcionalidad. Nuestra especialidad: las camas baúl, una línea funcional que permite guardar desde ropa de cama hasta objetos personales sin perder diseño ni comodidad.

Contamos con:

 Colchones de alta gama con tecnología de soporte avanzado
 Sofás modulares y elegantes que se adaptan a cualquier espacio
 Camas funcionales con almacenamiento integrado
 Bases tapizadas y estructuras resistentes
 Atención personalizada para ventas al detalle y al por mayor

Trabajamos tanto con clientes B2C como B2B (hoteles, constructoras, inmobiliarias, residencias), entregando productos duraderos, con garantía y fabricación propia.

Además, promovemos activamente la integración laboral a través de un equipo diverso, capacitado y comprometido.

 Más información en www.mueblesroma.cl
 Showroom en Paine: Calle 10 Poniente, Parcela 263

Name: NeeshFAB
Description:
Who we are?

We are a bunch of Misfits Makers and Magicians from L.A. Together, we tap into our creativity and create beautiful products, stories, inventions. But even before anything tangible is produced, we come together to share ideas, connect with one another and simply be friends. So don’t just take us at face value, see us as a collective whole that can exceed the expectations with joy.

What we do?

We create custom items to order from the ideas and visions of our customers. We believe in sustainability, which is why clients can rest assured that our handmade goods are carefully crafted for them every single time. Our team also offers commercial and residential services across the state for any purpose you may have in mind.

Why we do it?

Decorating and fabricating is a labor of love. It is extremely rewarding because it offers us a chance to express creativity while bringing joy to others by putting together the perfect interior environment or product. We take pride in realizing our customers vision, it's all about craftsmanship and excellence.

Somos uma empresa vira na criação e aplicação de imoveis mobiliário. consultoria e manutenção dos mesmo.
visamos no rigor, qualidade e responsabilidade.

Name: Meubelfabriek Jooken
Description:
Meubelfabriek Jooken is een bedrijf actief in de productie van slaapkamer- en projectmeubilair. Hierbij ligt de focus op de bewerking van massief en fineerhout. Het uitgebreide en diverse assortiment omvat onder meer enkele bedden, dubbele bedden, kingsize bedden en hoogslapers. Deze worden allemaal vervaardigd met topmaterialen voor een superieure slaapbeleving. 

De eigen collectie slaapkamermeubilair wordt geproduceerd en geleverd aan slaap- en meubelwinkels in de Benelux. De afdeling projectmeubilair richt zich specifiek naar rusthuizen, jeugdherbergen, internaten, vakantieverblijven en studentenkamers.

Meubelfabriek Jooken garandeert met een equipe gemotiveerde en bekwame medewerkers flexibiliteit, kwalitatieve afwerking en een hoge servicegraad voor een uitsluitend B2B cliënteel.

Name: DUET
Description: The company has been operating in the market for over 26 years. Our experience, modern production line, and the dedication and creativity of our employees enable us to create unique, high-quality furniture.

Name: VEMAR d.o.o.
Description: We are a production and service company that has grown from a small family into a large community. Companies trust us when they need help with production, assembly, packaging of products and other services in the industry. We have the space, experience and staff who are happy to test themselves with various challenges on the market. We also manufacture dedicated machines and equipment that we use ourselves in our work or that are used by our business partners.

Description: Stolarski i bravarski pogon sa pravim upravljackim timom, formiran da bude profesionalna pomoc arhitrktama i studiima pri izvodjenju projekata. Kao i saradnja sa izvodjacima radova. Pored dva pogona imamo i svoju proizvodnju sigurnosnih vrata.

Name: Akburak Mobilya
Description:
Akburak Mobilya'ya ''1982'' yılında öncülük eden ve şirketimizi kuran Celal Yüksel ''40'' yılı aşkın süredir aşkla ve tutkuyla müşterilerine hizmeti sunmaya devam etmektedir.
Kaliteli kullanışlı doğal ahşap ürünlerini düşük fiyata sunarak daha fazla kişiyi mutlu etmeye odaklanmıştır. Akburak Mobilya her bireyin tarzına hitap eder ve ev dekorasyonunda önemli bir yere sahiptir.
Doğal ağaçtan oluşan ürünlerimiz 1.sınıf işçilik ve 1.sınıf malzeme kalitesiyle sadece tasarım değil sağlık da sunmaktadır. 
Tasarımlarımız kişiye özel tasarımlardır. İstediğiniz ürünü özel olarak tasarlayıp kurulumunu yapmaktayız. Sipariş öncesi yer tespiti yapılıp ölçüler alınır ve söylenilen zamanda teslimat gerçekleşir. Bizim için fikirleriniz her zaman önemlidir.
akburakmobilya.com sizler için hayallerin gerçekleşme adresidir.
Siz Hayal Edin Biz Yapalım.

 Akburak Mobilya, iç mekan ve dış mekan mobilyaları üreten bir firma olarak biliniyor. Doğaya zarar vermeden üretim yapma ve malzemeleri incelikle işleyerek müşterilere özgün tasarımlar sunma konusunda öne çıkıyorlar. Müşterilerine en uygun fiyat politikasıyla en iyi hizmeti vermeyi hedefliyorlar ve binlerce memnun müşteriye sahip olduklarını belirtiyorlar. Ayrıca, müşterilerini mağazalarına veya atölyelerine ziyaret etmeye davet ediyorlar

İç mekan ve dış mekan mobilyalarıyla hayallerinizi gerçeğe dönüştürmek için buradayız! Tasarımlarımızın sınırı yok. Doğaya zarar vermeden yaşlanmış, kuvvetli ve geçmişten gelen hikayelerle dolu malzemeleri, ustalarımızın emeğiyle incelikle işleyerek sizlere sunuyoruz.

En uygun fiyat politikamızla size en iyi hizmeti sunmayı hedefliyoruz. Binlerce memnun müşterimiz ve olumlu yorumlarımızla gücümüzü kanıtlıyoruz. Mağazalarımızı veya atölyemizi ziyaret etmek isterseniz her zaman açığız. Çayımız da sizi bekliyor olacak!

Name: Hus Design
Description: Hus Design líderes en fabricación con 10 años de experiencia. Cocinas, closets, baños, puertas y más. Diseños exclusivos

Name: Viperys
Description:
We are passionate about crafting unique and captivating spaces. At Viperys, we specialize in handcrafted rustic wooden furniture that adds a distinctive charm to any interior. Our products are an expression of our love for natural materials and meticulous attention to detail.

Whether you're seeking a sturdy dining table, original wall shelves, or practical desks, we offer a wide range of options to meet your needs. Our furniture comes in various sizes, shapes, and finishes, allowing you to customize them to your own style and space.

Each of our items is one-of-a-kind, meticulously crafted with care for every detail. We prioritize durability and quality, utilizing robust materials such as oak and pine wood. Our rustic pieces not only captivate with their design but also offer practical functionality.

At Viperys, we understand that every interior has its unique character and story. Our furniture is designed to add an unparalleled atmosphere and the warmth of wood to it. With us, you can create a space that reflects your personality and lifestyle.

We also offer tailored services to match your needs. If you have an idea for a perfect piece of furniture, we're here to bring it to life. Our passion and dedication make each project exceptional and inspiring to us.

Join our community of creative minds who value the beauty of natural materials and distinctive design. Together, we craft spaces that are easy to fall in love with and enjoy spending time in.

Viperys - Your partner in creating rustic, beautiful interiors.

Buy Less.

Quality.

Evangelize and encourage the sharing of knowledge and experiences for good practices.
Harmony with life between the intervening players like local forest owners’ community + lumberman´s + author + producer + seller + consumer.

Name: Daniels Handmade Indy
Description:
The woodshop tucked down into the forests of Nashville Indiana.
This small Indiana business has a passion for many things- freedom, a quality product, and family, to name a few. Here at Daniels Handmade Indy, our most important product is what is produced when YOU, the customer, are satisfied upon receiving your handmade work of art.That's just what these pieces are, folks. WORKS OF ART. Every single thing that is made here at Daniels Handmade Indy is made by the master craftsman, Steven Daniels, and his wife, Aspen. We don't bring others in to do the work. No shortcuts. That is our motto. Whether it be a tiny ornament cut out on our laser cutter or a giant dining table sawn straight out of a tree. Quality and originality is what you receive when you purchase from us. We enjoy the process of helping you design the perfect piece for your home or business. All options are open and anything that you can think of can be incorporated into your piece, and we can make any type of wooden furniture you can think of. We look forward to hearing from you because we ENJOY what we do and we know that you will be glad that you chose Daniels Handmade Indy.vAfter all, the most important product anyone can offer is customer satisfaction. That's exactly what you receive when you purchase a piece from us.
Thank you for your interest in Daniels Handmade Indy!

Name: Safe Living Furniture
Description:
Safe Living Furniture has 20 plus years’ experience of making solid bespoke furniture with its sister company Crispol Interiors. Evolving from manufacturing fitted wardrobes and kitchens to commercial products of exceptional quality and durability, crafted with a focus on demanding environments. Our product range extends beyond conventional furniture by seamlessly blending contemporary design and colours with structural strength.

Our Mission

At Safe Living Furniture, our expertise lies in crafting inventive and resilient furniture that addresses the practical requirement of bringing a human touch to demanding environments.

Why Safe Living Furniture?

Safe Living Furniture is a trusted leader in creating durable furniture for any challenging environment, with a constant drive to producing robust furniture. Our products are trusted throughout the many industries we serve.

Responsibly Sourced

All our products are manufactured from Egger and Kronospan who are committed to promoting sustainable forestry. They ensure compliance with legal and social standards in all supply chains. Their wood comes from 100% verified legal and controlled sources according to ISO38200. We buy roundwood preferably from certified forests in the purchasing region.

Name: Mehau
Description:
At MEHAU TRADE, we specialize in the design and manufacturing of high-quality laboratory, medical, educational, and custom furniture. Based in Tashkent, Uzbekistan, and operating for over 15 years, our company has earned a reputation for reliability, craftsmanship, and innovation.

Our production facility is equipped with advanced technology and staffed by certified specialists (ISO 9000/9001/9003/19011:2000), allowing us to deliver precision-engineered products that meet international standards. We proudly serve major institutions such as Westminster International University in Tashkent, Vakhidov Surgery Center, and UzStandard.

We are committed to continuous improvement and long-term partnerships. Our business is built on trust, quality, and transparency—and we don’t compromise. From standard metal structures to fully customized solutions for offices and homes, MEHAU TRADE delivers with care and accountability.

What We Offer:
- Laboratory and medical furniture
- Equipment for educational institutions
- Metal structures and specialized fabrication
- Exclusive office and home furniture

Why Choose Us:
- 15+ years of experience
- Modern technology and skilled craftsmanship
- Strong ethical foundation and transparent practices
- Dedication to quality and customer satisfaction

Our doors are always open to innovation, collaboration, and knowledge sharing. Whether you're a client, partner, or supplier — let's build something lasting, together.

Description:

Our strength lies in our advanced, automated production setup — enabling us to deliver high-quality, customized furniture solutions at scale. Name: GROUP ONORATI
Description:
Somos una empresa líder en hotelería hospitalaria. Nuestros sillones están concebidos como soluciones para los profesionales de la salud y el bienestar de sus pacientes y acompañantes. Ponemos especial foco en la calidad de los materiales, para que resistan al continuo uso en clínicas y hospitales, así como también en el  confort que ofrecen a quienes los utilizan. 
Sus diseños estás pensados para adaptarse de manera eficaz a los espacios. 
Contamos con modelos para acompañantes de pacientes en habitaciones, hemoterapia, hemodiálisis, extracción y recuperación, entre otros. Entendemos el servicio médico como un valor principal a la vez que consideramos que nuestros sillones acompañan y optimizan esta tarea. 
Estamos atentos a las últimas novedades del sector, es por eso que brindamos productos de vanguardia. Nuestro equipo de especialistas se ocupan de brindar un asesoramiento personalizado para dar respuesta a los requerimientos de cada institución.

Name: DEJETOS
Description:
A marca DEJETOS surge como uma evolução natural da exposição “60 em 5”, em que a reutilização de materiais descartados foi central.

A exposição “60 em 5”, parte da programação da Design Weekend São Paulo de 2024, consistiu na construção de uma plateia de 60 assentos em apenas cinco dias. Para isso, o designer Paulo Biacchi utilizou materiais de descarte provenientes das obras dos edifícios Misericórdia e Virginia da Somauma.

Madeira, metal, plástico, cadeiras, portas e outros itens foram matéria-prima para criar uma coleção que valoriza o imperfeito e o potencial dos materiais descartados. A construção celebra a capacidade criativa de transformar o que seria resíduo em produtos de grande valor artístico e funcional.

Name: Peels Meubels & Design
Description:
Bij Peels Meubels & Design draait alles om vakmanschap, creativiteit en het realiseren van uw woonwensen. Als zelfstandig meubelmaker sta ik aan het begin van mijn carrière, gedreven door een diepe passie voor mijn vak. Mijn missie? Uw ideeën omzetten in unieke, op maat gemaakte meubelstukken die niet alleen functioneel zijn, maar ook een persoonlijke touch toevoegen aan uw interieur.

Wat kunt u van mij verwachten?

Vakmanschap: Ik lever altijd de hoogste kwaliteit. Elk detail telt, en dat ziet u terug in het eindresultaat.
Betaalbaarheid: Maatwerk hoeft niet onbereikbaar te zijn. Ik geloof dat er voor elk budget een oplossing is, zonder in te boeten op kwaliteit.
Flexibiliteit: Ik ben flexibel in mijn planning en werk altijd met u samen om de beste oplossing te vinden. Geen uitdaging is te groot; ik denk met u mee en vind altijd een manier.
Toewijding: Mijn aanpak is energiek en gedreven. Ik steek graag extra tijd en moeite in uw project om ervoor te zorgen dat u 100% tevreden bent.

Bij Peels Meubels en Design staat u als klant centraal. Ik ga graag met u in gesprek om uw ideeën en wensen te bespreken. Samen creëren we meubels die niet alleen praktisch zijn, maar ook een echte eyecatcher vormen in uw woning.

Laten we samen iets moois maken. Neem contact op, en ontdek wat we voor elkaar kunnen betekenen!

Name: Thiet Dan Furniture
Description:
As one of the leading enterprises with extensive experience in manufacturing and exporting solid wood furniture. We have been highly trusted by domestic and foreign customers for our ability and expertise in designing and constructing wooden interior products.

Started operating in 2001, Thiet Dan Furniture Limited began our journey with manufacturing and exporting wooden furniture of mainly pine wood and rubber wood.

In 2008, from our main office and manufacturing plant in Di An City, Binh Duong Province, Thiet Dan has witnessed remarkable expansions namely the opening of our second factory in Tan Uyen, Binh Duong Province, which provides jobs for more than 700 employees.

In 2019, we expanded our production capability in order to fulfil customers’ demand and to match with our manufacturing potential with a third factory in Thuan An City, Binh Duong.

Wudzest Creation is a leading manufacturer in the office and home furniture industry. Specializing in the production of high-quality engineered wood products, Wudzest Creation is dedicated to providing its customers with the best possible furniture solutions for their home or office.

As a complete office furniture solution provider, Wudzest Creation can help you furnish your entire office, from the reception area to the conference room and beyond. At Wudzest Creation, we believe that furniture should not only be functional, but also a reflection of your personal style. That's why we offer a wide range of styles and finishes to choose from, so you can find the perfect piece for your home or office.

So if you're in the market for high-quality office and home furniture, look no further than Wudzest Creation. With our state-of-the-art machinery, focus on finishing, and wide range of products, we can help you furnish your space with style and comfort in mind. So, choose Wudzest Creation for all your furniture needs and enjoy the best quality products at an affordable price.

Description:
En Cuines diseñamos y desarrollamos mobiliario y soluciones a medida para espacios comerciales que buscan identidad, flexibilidad y permanencia.

Trabajamos de la mano de arquitectos, diseñadores, desarrolladores y marcas de retail y hospitalidad, entendiendo que cada proyecto es una oportunidad para construir experiencias físicas que amplifican el valor de la marca.

Especializados en el diseño, ingeniería y fabricación de mobiliario a medida —desde piezas únicas hasta estructuras comerciales completas—, fusionamos precisión artesanal, tecnología de vanguardia y una lectura profunda del espacio para crear soluciones que no solo se ven bien, sino que funcionan, evolucionan y permanecen.

Cada espacio que desarrollamos está pensado para adaptarse al cambio, optimizar la operación diaria y, al mismo tiempo, comunicar la esencia de la marca de manera auténtica y memorable.

En Cuines no fabricamos muebles:
Construimos activos estratégicos que fortalecen la identidad de cada proyecto comercial.

Our passion for craftsmanship is unrivaled, as we collaborate with the most talented artisans and designers from around the world to create exquisite pieces that stand as works of art in their own right. From luxurious sofas that envelop you in plush comfort to intricately carved dining sets that elevate your culinary experiences, our range encompasses a diverse selection to cater to every discerning taste. At Royal Concept Luxury, we go beyond offering products; we provide an immersive experience that speaks to your soul. Our team of design experts is always available to assist you in making choices that align with your vision, creating spaces that reflect your individuality and aspirations.
As a company, we are deeply committed to sustainability and ethical practices. Our production processes adhere to the highest environmental standards, and we actively support social initiatives to give back to the communities that have contributed to our success.

Join us on this journey of luxury and sophistication. Follow our page to stay updated on the latest trends, product launches, and design inspirations.

Description:
Jilles Bleijendaal (1979) is een vakman met een hart voor hout en vele andere materialen. Hij doet niets liever dan mooie meubels maken. Voor zichzelf of voor jou. Hij voltooide een opleiding aan het Hout- en Meubileringscollege in Amsterdam en startte in 2005 zijn eigen bedrijf. Vanuit zijn werkplaats in Oosterblokker levert hij persoonlijk maatwerk dat zich kenmerkt door kwalitatieve constructies, verfijnde afwerking en doordacht materiaalgebruik. Je voelt meteen of iets van Jilles is. De wens van de klant staat bij Jilles altijd voorop. Zeker als het gaat om meubels op maat of een meubelrestauratie is het prettig om met hem te sparren over de mogelijkheden.

Name: PT. Ari Solid Surface
Description:
Beli Solid Surface Langsung dari Pabrik! Apa yang membuat PT. ARI SOLID SURFACE begitu istimewa? Kami adalah produsen solid surface terpercaya yang memberikan kualitas tinggi dengan harga yang sangat terjangkau. Workshop kami berlokasi di Cileungsi, Bogor, Jawa Barat, dan kami siap memenuhi berbagai kebutuhan Anda, mulai dari counter, pantry, sink, wastafel, hingga meja resepsionis dengan ukuran sesuai keinginan Anda. PT. ARI SOLID SURFACE memiliki tim yang berpengalaman. Tim kami memiliki pengalaman di bidang interior khususnya dalam pembuatan serta instalasi top table solid surface selama lebih dari 15 tahun.

Keunggulan produk kami:

Warna yang Beragam: Kami menyediakan beragam pilihan warna, sehingga Anda dapat menyesuaikannya dengan selera dan desain interior Anda.

Bentuk dan Ukuran Sesuai Permintaan: Solid surface kami dapat dibentuk dan disesuaikan dengan keinginan Anda, sehingga Anda mendapatkan produk yang unik dan sesuai dengan kebutuhan.

Tahan Panas dan Zat Kimia: Produk kami tahan terhadap panas dan zat kimia, memberikan ketahanan jangka panjang.

Sambungan yang Tidak Terlihat: Kualitas hasil kerja kami membuat sambungan tidak terlihat, menciptakan tampilan yang elegan.

Tidak Menyerap Noda: Solid surface kami tidak akan menyerap noda, sehingga perawatan lebih mudah dan produk tetap terlihat seperti baru.

Harga Kompetitif: Kami menawarkan harga yang kompetitif, bahkan lebih terjangkau daripada produsen besar. Harga yang kami tawarkan sudah termasuk pemasangan dan bisa dinegosiasikan.

Kami siap memberikan solusi terbaik untuk proyek Anda. Untuk informasi lebih lanjut, jangan ragu untuk menghubungi kami! 

https://linktr.ee/arisolidsurface

Description:
Mele Divani es una empresa de producción Venezolana dedicada a la fabricación de muebles para el hogar, comercio, industria y hostelería.

Name: Bolina
Description:
Bolina is a Portuguese driven by sustainability, that values artisanal and sustainable processes, made in Portugal and inspired by our tradition and memory.

For this reason, we carefully choose production made in Portugal, using exclusively national materials and products, as this is the only way to ensure a unique and original product that reflects what we do best.

All our products are manufactured in small factories, using mostly end-of-cycle materials (dead stocks), leftovers,  waste from the textile industry, or products with minimal environmental impact, thus promoting a truly circular economy.

Name: Estin Home Products Co. ，LTD
Description:
Dongguan Estin Home Products Technology Co., Ltd. was established in 2015. It was initially an enterprise integrating the design, R&D, production and sales of hardware handicrafts. The company has always adhered to the concept of service first and hand in hand with foreign Wal-Mart for a long time. TARGET KOHL'S Sam's Cosco and other traditional offline retail stores have conducted friendly cooperation and achieved stable and considerable results. With the changes in the international market, the company adheres to the market concept of innovation first and technological progress, and accepts OEM and ODM from Amazon, illume and other customers at the same time.
Set up a strong design evaluation team: The team with rich market and design experience uses UG/AI/CAD and other tools to design perfect plane and three-dimensional patterns for customers to choose.
The company began to introduce a series of automatic equipment, and absorbed some professionals to focus on the design, development, production and sales of IKEA environmental technology products such as aromatherapy lamps, aroma diffusers, aromatherapy humidifiers, and air purifiers. Through the joint efforts of the team, a complete industrial chain of craft aromatherapy machines has been formed, which integrates stamping, welding, painting, assembly, movement injection molding, circuit synthesis, testing, assembly and packaging. The company currently has a plant area of 9,000 square meters, 5 independent production lines, and is fully equipped with various testing instruments and equipment, with an annual production capacity of 1.2 million units.
The company pays attention to product quality, research and development, and structure, and has special laboratories and test equipment to test product function and safety.
Quality through International Standards, Human Rights: BSCI.
Main products: aroma diffuser, humidifier, air purifier, solar lamp, candlestick ornaments, etc.

Name: Maaskant meubel- en interieurbouw
Description: Met meer dan 30 jaar ervaring in ons familiebedrijf kennen wij de kunst van het vervullen van uw wensen als geen ander. Onze inzet voor kwaliteit en stijl komt tot uiting in het gebruik van hoogwaardige materialen, aandacht voor detail en ambachtelijke precisie. Elk meubelstuk, doordrenkt van vakmanschap, wordt met liefde vervaardigd in onze eigen werkplaats. Onze zorgvuldig samengestelde selectie van materialen vertelt het verhaal van duurzaamheid en verfijning. Wij bieden niet simpelweg meubels aan: wij beloven een verfijnde stijl. Laat ons uw ruimte transformeren tot een weerspiegeling van uw persoonlijkheid of zakelijke uitstraling.

Name: NAVO – výroba a realizace interiérů na míru
Description:
NAVO design s.r.o. je česká výrobní společnost s více než 28 lety zkušeností, která se specializuje na zakázkovou výrobu interiérů a nábytku pro architekty, interiérové designéry a developery. Naším cílem je pomáhat profesionálům z oboru převádět jejich návrhy do reality – od výroby přes logistiku až po finální montáž.

Co nabízíme?
- Komplexní realizace interiérů – kuchyně, vestavěné skříně, obývací stěny, komerční interiéry
- Výroba na míru – žádné katalogové produkty, ale precizní zpracování podle návrhu architekta
- Spolupráce s architekty a designéry – my vyrábíme, vy se soustředíte na design
- Technologie a řemeslo – precizní výroba s využitím špičkových materiálů (Technistone, Blum, Egger)
Zázemí pro B2B spolupráci – vlastní výroba, tým odborníků, showroom s konceptem „Živá kuchyň“

Proč spolupracovat s NAVO?
- Úspora času a bezstarostná realizace – architekt se nemusí starat o výrobu a montáž
- Nezávislost a flexibilita – jsme výrobním partnerem, ne konkurencí
- Zkušenosti s atypickými projekty – zvládáme i složité a prémiové realizace
- Finanční benefit – nabízíme provizi za zprostředkování zakázky
- Dlouhodobá spolupráce – partnerství, které přináší hodnotu jak architektovi, tak klientovi

Hledáte spolehlivého partnera pro realizaci interiérů?
Přijďte do showroomu NAVO, kde vám ukážeme možnosti materiálů, technologií a řešení pro vaše projekty.

Spojte se s námi a zjistěte, jak vám můžeme ušetřit čas a přenést vaše návrhy do reality.

Established in Nagpur, Neo Furniture is a leading provider of high-quality, plywood-based furniture that seamlessly blends durability, functionality, and modern aesthetics. YouTube

Oferujemy najlepsze meble, schody drewniane i wszelkiego rodzaju stolarkę dostosowaną do potrzeb Klienta. Gwarantujemy profesjonalizm, szybką i rzetelną obsługę w zakresie pomiaru, doradztwa, montażu, transportu i serwisu.
Wykonujemy meble spersonalizowane do potrzeb klienta.

Name: Skotnicky Furniture
Description:
Skotnicky Furniture to polska marka mebli premium, specjalizująca się w projektowaniu i produkcji personalizowanych stołów, stolików kawowych, konsol oraz mebli do wnętrz i przestrzeni outdoor. Każdy projekt powstaje na indywidualne zamówienie — z myślą o konkretnej przestrzeni, estetyce i potrzebach klienta.

Współpracujemy z doświadczonymi rzemieślnikami i lokalnymi specjalistami, łącząc nowoczesne wzornictwo z precyzją wykonania. Fundamentem naszych mebli są starannie dobrane materiały. Pracujemy na stali malowanej proszkowo oraz naturalnym drewnie, w tym na polskim jesionie, cenionym za trwałość, stabilność i szlachetne usłojenie. Blaty wykonujemy ze spieku kamiennego Dekton od Cosentino, sprowadzanego bezpośrednio z Hiszpanii. Dzięki zaawansowanej technologii produkcji Dekton wyróżnia się wyjątkową trwałością — jest odporny na plamy, zarysowania, wysoką temperaturę oraz promieniowanie UV, co czyni go idealnym zarówno do wnętrz, jak i na zewnątrz.

Projektujemy meble, które nie wymagają kompromisów. Klient ma pełną swobodę w doborze wymiarów, proporcji i kolorystyki, a architekci zyskują partnera, który rozumie proces projektowy i dba o spójność realizacji od koncepcji po finalny detal. Nasze kolekcje obejmują zarówno meble do przestrzeni mieszkalnych, jak i serię outdoor — stworzoną z myślą o tarasach, ogrodach i projektach HoReCa.

W Skotnicky Furniture wierzymy, że mebel powinien być czymś więcej niż elementem wyposażenia. To trwała część architektury wnętrza — zaprojektowana na lata, odporna na codzienne użytkowanie i ponadczasowa w formie. Tworzymy polskie meble premium dla tych, którzy cenią jakość, indywidualność i świadomy design.

Romanzza Lisboa represents a brand with nearly 40 years of excellence in bespoke furniture and personalized design.
We specialize in creating kitchens, closets, living rooms, offices, and corporate spaces — always focusing on the integration of aesthetics, functionality, and technology.
We stand out for our precision, high-quality manufacturing, upholstery, and support for professionals in architecture, design, and construction, offering tailor-made solutions for every project, including private clients.

Name: CÉSS Studio
Description:
CÉSS Studio / High-End soft furniture.

CÉSS has long established itself as a manufacturer of exceptionally high-quality and reliable soft furniture.
During our journey we have achieved a lot, we have been through a lot, but our most important achievement is the trust of our customers. We do not just create a furniture, we create the perfect combination of design and construction that meets any requirements and tastes.
Like any story, ours began with great ambitions and a desire to create truly high-quality products., with only a small group of like-minded people, we started creating the first CÉSS models.
The quality was so impressive that our customers could not believe that we started our work only a few years ago. Our furniture was in demand, production began to develop intensely, the range expanded, new original models appeared.

CÉSS is for everyone, who appreciates comfort, uniqueness and unprecedented design.
Each order is unique to us and, even though today CÉSS is a full-fledged large-scale production, we still pay maximum attention to each customer. After all, custom–made furniture is always an individual approach and the creation of something unique. If you ask us, what kind of furniture do we like to create more? We’ll answer – furniture that you’ll like first. Furniture that will fit perfectly into the interior and design, which will be comfortable and reliable.
It does not matter at all whether it is a small armchair, a corner sofa or a wide sofa for the living room – we are ready for any experiments that wil

Are you looking for the luxury soft furniture? Does local sellers can't meet your needs? Are you tired of boring and identical models? Do you want to find something truly unique? — Meet the CÉSS studio!

Name: MMARS
Description:
En MMARS, nos dedicamos a la creación y venta de muebles de madera de pino radiata, destacándonos por nuestra calidad, compromiso con el medio ambiente y atención al detalle. Nuestra empresa se ha posicionado como un referente en el mercado gracias a nuestra pasión por el diseño y la sostenibilidad.

Conoce nuestras categorías de Productos

Fabricación de Muebles de Madera: Diseñamos y fabricamos una amplia variedad de muebles de madera de pino radiata. Nuestros productos incluyen cómodas, arrimos, veladores, mesas y más, todos hechos a mano con materiales de la más alta calidad. Cada pieza es única, combinando funcionalidad y estilo para adaptarse a cualquier espacio y gusto personal.

Restauración: Nuestro equipo se especializa en la restauración de muebles antiguos, devolviéndoles su esplendor original. Valoramos la historia y el valor sentimental de cada mueble, por lo que trabajamos con dedicación y precisión para asegurar que cada pieza restaurada conserve su integridad y belleza.

Proyectos de Mobiliario para Oficinas y Empresas: Ofrecemos soluciones personalizadas para oficinas y empresas, diseñando y fabricando mobiliario que promueve la productividad y refleja la identidad de cada organización. Desde escritorios ergonómicos hasta sofisticadas salas de reuniones, nuestros proyectos se adaptan a las necesidades específicas de cada cliente, creando espacios de trabajo funcionales y atractivos.

Comprometidos con la Sostenibilidad

En MMARS, creemos que la sostenibilidad es fundamental. Estamos comprometidos con la protección del medio ambiente y la reforestación. Colaboramos con la organización Reforestemos, donando árboles mensualmente para la reforestación de bosques en Chile. Esta iniciativa es parte de nuestro esfuerzo por contribuir a un futuro más verde y saludable, restaurando ecosistemas y apoyando la biodiversidad.

Explora el mundo de MMARS y transforma tu hogar u oficina con nuestros muebles excepcionales!

Name: Vitrum Concept Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Jesteśmy producentem mebli sklepowych, od ponad 30 lat, wyposażając największe sklepy, salony, placówki i obiekty handlowe. W naszej bogatej ofercie każdy Klient znajdzie coś do swojej branży, od wyposażenie sklepu jubilerskiego, odzieżowego lub salonu z zegarkami, po muzea, wystawy, biura, biblioteki, a nawet ambasady. Produkujemy także stoiska i wyspy handlowe. Posiadamy swój zakład produkcyjny, gdzie wykonujemy trwałe, estetyczne, odporne na uszkodzenia i łatwe w utrzymaniu w czystości funkcjonalne meble sklepowe. Do ich produkcji wykorzystujemy wyłącznie najwyższej jakości materiały, jak płyta laminowana, laminat, szkło, plexi, staron, aluminium.. Posiadamy także własna lakiernię, gdzie lakierujemy meble. Wszystko to sprawia, że decydując się na wyposażenie sklepów razem z naszą firmą, mogą Państwo mieć pewność, że zakupione u nas produkty posłużą przez wiele lat, zachowując swój naturalny, estetyczny wygląd, ciesząc oko klientów. 

Serdecznie zapraszamy do bliższego zapoznania się z naszą ofertą i asortymentem na naszej stronie internetowej.

Dlaczego warto zdecydować się na wyposażenie sklepów właśnie z firmą Vitrum Concept? W ciągu 30 lat działalności udało nam się zdobyć ogromne doświadczenie. Zaufały nam setki klientów, a ich grono z roku na rok nieustannie się poszerza. Własny, profesjonalnie wyposażony, nowoczesny zakład produkcyjny, nowoczesna linia produkcyjna, najnowsze technologie, poparte ogromnym doświadczeniem naszych pracowników oraz ciągle poszerzana szeroka oferta handlowa to gwarancja satysfakcji Klientów. Wyprodukowane meble dostarczymy własnym transportem oraz zmontujemy też własną, specjalistyczną grupą montażową, która w profesjonalny sposób wykona montaż i dostarczy meble pod wskazany adres w Warszawie, Polsce i na świecie. Nasze realizacje można zobaczyć w Berlinie, Paryżu, Wiedniu, Londynie, Mediolanie, Bolonii, Monachium. Robiliśmy także sklepy w Nowej Zelandii, Australii, w Stanach Zjednoczonych a ostatnio kolejny sklep w Indiach.

Name: ND Mobiliario y Equipamiento Integral S.L.
Description:
ND Mobiliario y Equipamiento es una empresa dedicada a la fabricación, distribución e instalación de todo tipo de mobiliario y equipamiento geriátrico.
Ubicada en la ciudad de Yecla (Murcia), centro puntero en cuanto a industria del mueble se refiere nuestro objetivo consiste en cumplir las expectativas de un mercado cada día más exigente. Por ello trabajamos, ofreciendo calidad, servicio y adaptándonos a la necesidad de cada cliente, con el objetivo de lograr la satisfacción de todos los que han depositado su confianza en nosotros.
Nuestra producción está basada en un riguroso proceso de selección, en el que utilizamos materiales de primera calidad. Desarrollamos una constante labor de I+D, adecuándonos a las recomendaciones de expertos en ergonomía, asistencia domiciliaria y sanitaria, ya que la alta calidad asistencial requiere productos de total garantía.

Name: Biomueble
Description: Somos una empresa peruana, especializada en el diseño de mobiliario ecológico con madera de palets reciclados. Nuestros productos son de alta calidad, con diseños estéticos atractivos y amigables con el medio ambiente. Al utilizar madera reciclada, contribuimos a reducir la tala de árboles y el impacto ambiental de la industria de la madera.

Name: PT. Trisena Rekainova Sinergi
Description:
Desain Laboratorium yang berstandar saat ini sebuah keharusan untuk meningkatkan kinerja Laboratorium. 
Semestinya minimum ada tiga standar yang harus dipenuhi untuk meningkatkan kinerja Laboratorium yaitu aman, sehat, dan nyaman. Dari sisi ekonomi, pengoperasian Laboratorium haruslah ekonomis. Laboratorium yang di desain non standar biasanya pengoperasiannya juga non ekonomis. 

Selain itu Laboratorium yang didesain dengan baik akan meningkatkan prestisius dan kepercayaan klien terhadap sebuah industri atau usaha yang terkait erat dengan keberadaan sebuah Laboratorium. Dalam sebuah industri terkadang Laboratorium adalah cerminan mini dari industri yang dijalankan, semakin baik kinerja Laboratorium semakin baik pula kinerja sebuah industri. 

Terkait hal diatas, kami menawarkan kepada para stakeholder yang berkecimpung dalam dunia Laboratorium dan siap menjadi partner anda dalam mewujudkan kinerja anda, yang mana jasa perusahaan kami yang dikerjakan oleh profesional puluhan tahun yang bergerak dalam bidang:
1. Desain Laboratorium. 
2. Desain dan Pembuatan Furnitur Laboratorium. 
3. Desain dan Pembuatan Lemari Asam. 
4. Desain dan Pembuatan Laminar Air Flow
5. Desain dan Pembuatan Fume Hood Scrubber. 
6. Renovasi dan Relokasi Laboratorium.

Name: Godoi Furnitures
Description:
Bem-vindos à Godoi Furnitures! Somos uma empresa especializada na fabricação de móveis com estrutura de alumínio e acabamento em corda náutica. Nossa paixão é criar soluções exclusivas para tornar os ambientes externos e internos, mais confortáveis e acolhedores.

 Nosso diferencial está na linha pet, oferecendo móveis reduzidos especialmente projetados para atender às necessidades de nossos amigos de quatro patas. Amamos animais tanto quanto amamos design, e isso reflete em nossos produtos que combinam funcionalidade e beleza.

 Sabemos que as intempéries climáticas podem ser um desafio, por isso, desenvolvemos produtos próprios que resistem aos rigores do tempo. Nossos móveis foram pensados para enfrentar sol, chuva, vento e maresia sem perder sua elegância e durabilidade.

 Seja em jardins, varandas, piscinas ou qualquer espaço ao ar livre, estamos prontos para transformar esses lugares em verdadeiros refúgios de tranquilidade e bem-estar. Nossos móveis oferecem o conforto e a resistência necessários para tornar cada momento especial.

 Se você é um profissional do setor ou um amante do design e decoração, junte-se a nós nesta jornada. Conecte-se conosco para conhecer nossos produtos exclusivos e descobrir como podemos enriquecer os projetos de seus clientes ou aprimorar seu próprio ambiente.

Name: JDY Industrial Co.，LTD
Description:
Welcome to JDY. JDY initially started manufacturing mailboxes/letterboxes and metal cabinets. In 2015 we expanded our portfolio to include the manufacture of Parcel Drop Boxes, Recycling Bins and Precision Sheet Metal Fabrication. 
Our factory is located in Jiangmen City in Guangdong Province, China. Jiangmen is 1.5 hours south of Guangzhou, which is the capital city of Guangdong Province and is home to the famous Canton Trade Fairs. We are two hours west of Hong Kong and an hour from Macau. This makes Jiangmen a very convenient location for our international clients.
We have an R&D Department and we are able to design to our client's designs and samples. JDY engineers are passionate about performance. Our team are highly skilled and professional and have extensive experience of adding value to our client’s businesses. We are recognised for the quality of our designs and that is why customers from USA, UK, Europe, Australia, New Zealand and Japan appreciate our talent and keep coming back.
We make every effort to build long term relationships with our clients. We do this by providing them the best quality products and exceptional customer service, combined with our ability to fulfil orders on time.
We have expanded our business into exporting to overseas clients over the past 18 years, and we can take care of everything from the initial designs, through to arranging shipment to your door.
You will find us competitively priced and we work hard to add value to your business, so contact us today for a prompt and friendly response and we look forward to working with you in the future.

Name: J&M Furniture Colombia
Description:
Creemos en la colaboración estrecha con nuestros clientes, nos dedicamos a escuchar atentamente las necesidades y aspiraciones; nos sumergimos en la esencia de lo que desean transmitir captando así las sutilezas y matices que realmente importan.

Nos especializamos en proyectos a la medida sin importar dimensiones, características complejas o funcionalidad.

Nuestro enfoque personalizado y detallado permite a diseñadores, interioristas, arquitectos y otros creativos materializar su visión con precisión.

Nuestra trayectoria nos ha
permitido evaluar exhaustivamente las condiciones del tiempo, el uso y la resistencia de diversas fibras.

Hemos realizado una meticulosa curaduría de fibras de origen natural, sintético y artesanal, fabricadas de manera rudimentaria o manual.

El conocimiento técnico nos permite guiar y garantizar la resistencia de los mismos en proyectos de interior y exterior con fines corporativos, bares y restaurantes, hoteles, resorts y tiendas retail.

No fabricamos para tiendas de muebles, no producimos en línea como respuesta agresiva a las tendencias de mercado.

Somos un taller que se toma el tiempo de analizar al detalle cada parte del proceso de construcción, asegurando prolijidad en la pieza y exclusividad en el diseño.

Nos apasionan las discusiones de aprendizaje mutuo donde el intercambio de información explore el potencial de cada propuesta.

2015 yılında çıktığımız bu yolda; mobilya, inşaat ve otomotiv alanında yeniliklere imza attık ve ülkemize katma değer oluşturmak amacıyla, inovasyon çalışmalarımız her geçen gün devam ediyor.

Kaliteli bir ürün sunmanın müşteri memnuniyeti için gerekli fakat yeterli olmadığı inancıyla, proje sürecinden montaj dâhil olmak üzere tüm safhalarda Harmanoğlu Mobilya ailesi olarak isteklerinizi titizlikle değerlendiriyoruz. .

Heyecanını ilk günkü gibi taze tutan firmamız dürüstlük ve iş kalitesini prensip edinerek; kaliteden ödün vermeyen, müşteri memnuniyetini ön planda tutan, ilkeli ve vizyon sahibi bir firmadır. .

Soliva Home Concept, iç mekan tasarımı ve mobilya üretiminde kaliteyi ön planda tutarak, müşterilerine yenilikçi çözümler sunar. Hem yerel hem de uluslararası pazarda faaliyet gösteren firma, farklı zevk ve ihtiyaçlara hitap eden özgün tasarımlar geliştirir. Bu süreçte, modern üretim teknikleri ve yüksek kaliteli malzemeler kullanarak dayanıklı ve şık ürünler üretir.

Firmanın sunduğu hizmetler arasında, kişiye özel mobilya tasarımı ve uygulama projeleri de bulunmaktadır. Müşterilerine sunduğu bu hizmetlerle, yaşam alanlarını kişisel zevk ve ihtiyaçlarına uygun şekilde yeniden tasarlamaktadır. Soliva Home Concept, aynı zamanda müşteri odaklı hizmet anlayışı ile projelerinde zamanında ve eksiksiz teslimat prensibi ile çalışmaktadır.

Name: JP Project meble na wymiar
Description:
Meble na wymiar są doskonałym rozwiązaniem dla osób poszukujących indywidualnego i funkcjonalnego wystroju wnętrz. Dzięki możliwości dopasowania mebli do konkretnych wymiarów pomieszczenia, można efektywnie wykorzystać przestrzeń oraz stworzyć unikatowe aranżacje.

Korzystając z usług producenta mebli na wymiar, klient ma możliwość wyboru zarówno materiałów, jak i wzorów, co pozwala na stworzenie mebli idealnie dopasowanych do swoich potrzeb i preferencji. Ponadto, meble na wymiar są trwałe i solidnie wykonane, co gwarantuje długotrwałe zadowolenie z ich użytkowania.

Name: INVIGO Mobila
Description:
La Invigo înțelegem că mobila nu trebuie să fie doar utilă, ci mai întâi de toate este o expresie a gustului individual și a stilului de viață. În showroom-ul nostru prezentăm piese rafinate atât pentru necesitățile casnice, cât și comerciale, unde doar imaginația ta stabilește limitele.

Casa este locul unde ne relaxăm la finalul unei zile stresante, iar sarcina de a o amenaja cu mobilă este o experiență ce provoacă anxietate și tot felul de întrebări. În dormitor vrei să ai parte de o stare de liniște, în living - confort, la bucătărie – energie. Toate aceste sentimente te vor ajuta sa alegi piesele potrivite pentru mobilierul casei.

 De aceea, echipa Invigo lucrează îndeaproape cu fiecare client, acceptând orice provocare de a transforma conceptele în realitate, pentru a realiza o mobilă care depășește așteptările și se pliază cu viziunile tale. Noi știm cum e, atunci când designul mobilei arată bine, însă înțelegi că, în urma căutărilor unui producător de mobilă, conceptul nu va fi posibil de realizat. Așa, ne-am propus să dăm viață oricărei idei bizare sau nonconformiste, care să corespundă perfect cu schițele și calculele pretențioase de design - te rugăm, provoacă-ne!


Mobilierul din vise poate fi real, să armonizeze cu spațiul camerei, spunând o poveste unică. Fie că alegi un stil minimalist, clasic, contemporan sau cu efecte vintage, lucrăm cu dedicație și îndemânare la fiecare piesă.

 Confecționăm cu atenție deosebită orice design pentru a îmbina 3 idei simple: calitate, durabilitate și inovație. Spre alegere îți propunem modele, realizate în diverse culori, stofe și materiale: fotolii mici și compacte, canapele masive, dressing încăpător, comode stilate, birouri multifuncționale, mese și scaune versatile, etc.

 Alege Invigo, mobilă personalizată pentru orice spațiu!

Our commitment to excellence ensures that every piece we create is not only visually appealing but also built to withstand the test of time.

Our diverse range of cane furniture includes chairs, tables, sofas, beds, dining sets, outdoor furniture, and much more. Whether you're looking to furnish your home, office, hotel, or any other commercial space, we have the perfect furniture solution to suit your style and needs. We offer a variety of designs, from classic to contemporary, ensuring that there's something for every discerning customer.

What sets us apart is our dedication to sustainability. We strive to minimize our environmental impact by using responsibly sourced cane and implementing eco-friendly manufacturing processes. By choosing our furniture, you can enjoy both the beauty of natural materials and the peace of mind that comes from supporting sustainable practices.

Customer satisfaction is at the core of our business. We work closely with our clients to understand their unique requirements and provide customized solutions tailored to their preferences. From selecting the right design to choosing the perfect finish, our knowledgeable team is committed to delivering furniture that exceeds expectations.

In addition to manufacturing, we also offer comprehensive after-sales support, including delivery, installation, and maintenance services. Our goal is to make the entire furniture buying process seamless and enjoyable for our customers.

Tworzymy meble na indywidualne zamówienie, dopasowane do specyficznych potrzeb i gustów naszych klientów.

Nasza oferta obejmuje:
