 - Meble do salonu: Stylowe i komfortowe meble, które stworzą idealne miejsce do relaksu i spotkań z rodziną i przyjaciółmi.

 - Meble do pokoju dziecięcego: Bezpieczne i kreatywne rozwiązania, które dostosują się do potrzeb Twojego dziecka.

Casa Ferro, ubicada en Pilares 405, Colonia del Valle, es un referente en la fabricación de mobiliario de alta calidad. Nuestra experiencia en el sector de restaurantes y hospitalidad nos ha permitido entender profundamente las necesidades de estos espacios, creando soluciones que combinan estilo, confort y practicidad.

 Nuestros Productos

Mobiliario para Restaurantes: Años de experiencia en el diseño y fabricación de muebles elegantes y duraderos para restaurantes.
Soluciones para Hospitalidad: Creación de ambientes lujosos y confortables para hoteles y otros espacios de hospitalidad.
Ecommerce y más: Además de nuestra presencia en ecommerce, ofrecemos una gama diversa de productos para el hogar y la oficina, disponibles para compra en línea.

 Por Qué Elegir a Casa Ferro

Diversidad de Materiales: Expertos en trabajar con una variedad de materiales de alta calidad.
Fabricación a Medida: Capacidad para personalizar productos según las especificaciones del cliente.

Name: McNeill Cabinets
Description:
McNeill Cabinets is the primary cabinet provider in Port McNeill, Northern Vancouver Island, British Columbia. 

McNeill Cabinets works with you to get the cabinets you're looking for at the budget you're looking for. Whether it's refacing cabinet doors and drawers, replacing boxes, or building completely custom, we've got options that match what you're looking for. 

McNeill Cabinets is a family-run business and has served the Northern Vancouver Island community for over 30 years. We live and breath the culture of our community and are proud to have been trusted to provide the community with professional home renovation services for over 30 years. 

Since 2025, we are proud to offer a specialized focus on providing cabinetry services to Northern Vancouver Island. Our service locations are Port McNeill, Port Hardy, Port Alice, Sointula, Alert Bay, and Woss. 

McNeill Cabinets is led by Paul Cann. Paul grew up in Port McNeill since 13 years old. He is a ticketed carpenter experienced in high-end finishing carpentry having established his craft in Edmonton in the late 1980s during their construction boom. Since then, Paul has obtained a Bachelor of Construction Management and served the Port McNeill community for over 30 years providing renovation services. In early 2025, Paul decided to establish a focus on providing cabinetry services to the community.

Description:
Chez Millesime Bois, nous croyons que chaque pièce de mobilier doit raconter une histoire. Spécialisés dans la fabrication de mobilier en bois massif, nous marions habilement l'artisanat traditionnel avec des designs modernes pour créer des pièces uniques qui transforment les espaces.

 Pour les Particuliers : Du Rêve à la Réalité

Votre maison est votre havre de paix. Nous comprenons cela et nous sommes dédiés à créer des meubles qui reflètent votre style unique. Que ce soit une table rustique en chêne pour votre salle à manger ou une bibliothèque sur mesure pour votre salon, nous donnons vie à vos idées.

 Pour les Professionnels : Des Espaces de Travail Inspirants

Un environnement de travail bien aménagé peut stimuler la créativité et la productivité. Nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec des entreprises pour concevoir et réaliser des espaces de travail sur mesure, des salles de réunion élégantes aux bureaux ergonomiques, en passant par des espaces d'accueil chaleureux.

 Durabilité et Qualité : Nos Engagements

Engagés dans une démarche écologique, nous sélectionnons nos matériaux avec soin, en privilégiant des bois issus de forêts gérées durablement. La qualité est au cœur de notre processus, garantissant que chaque pièce de mobilier résiste à l'épreuve du temps.

 Contactez-Nous : Créons Ensemble

Votre projet mérite une attention particulière. Contactez-nous pour discuter de vos idées et voyons ensemble comment donner vie à vos espaces.

Name: Panchal Store
Description:
Panchal Store, located in Kheri Village, Meham Town, Rohtak district, is the epitome of tradition meets modernity. With our tagline "Conserving the Tradition," we take pride in manufacturing both modern and vernacular furniture that caters to the local needs. Our products encompass steel beds, sofa sets, palangs, khatolas (baby cots), palanas (baby swings), and more. Our furniture plays a vital role in Indian rituals, like weddings and birth ceremonies, enhancing the traditional seating areas of homes.

Our steel beds and sofa sets are popular wedding gifts, providing comfort and durability to newlyweds. The exquisite designs and sturdy construction add elegance to wedding venues, creating a warm and inviting space for guests to celebrate. We understand the significance of these pieces in wedding rituals, leaving a lasting impression on the couple and their families.

In preserving the essence of traditional living, our palangs offer relaxation and comfort with their intricate designs. The khatolas, or baby cots, provide a safe and cozy sleeping environment for newborns during birth ceremonies. These pieces uphold the cherished customs and traditions associated with these special occasions.

At Panchal Store, we blend the expertise of skilled artisans with modern techniques and materials. Our meticulous craftsmanship ensures that each piece meets the highest quality standards, combining aesthetics with functionality. Customer satisfaction is paramount to us, and our friendly staff is always ready to assist you in finding the perfect furniture pieces that align with your style.

With a focus on preserving cultural heritage, Panchal Store delivers exceptional products and services. Visit us in Kheri Village, Meham Town, to explore our exquisite collection. Experience the harmony of tradition and contemporary design as you discover furniture that enhances your living spaces while conserving the legacy of cultural traditions.

Name: SAS nábytek

V roce 2014 jsme na jejich dovednosti navázali založením firmy SAS Nábytek. Zkratka SAS v sobě skrývá jména dvou původních zakladatelů – Sedláček a syn. Za dobu naší existence jsme získali bohaté zkušenosti s prací se dřevem a vytvořili mnoho krásných realizací, které zdobí domovy našich spokojených zákazníků. Nejčastěji řešíme zakázky v Brně a blízkém okolí, ale naše služby jsme schopni provádět kdekoliv na území ČR. Máte-li nějakou představu o tom, jak by měl Váš domov či kancelář vypadat, rádi Vám ji pomůžeme proměnit ve skutečnost.

Vizyonumuz
Müşteri ihtiyaç ve hizmetlerine yönelik sürekli kendimizi yenileyerek her geçen gün daha kaliteli ürünler üretmek ve mobilya sektöründe mobilya ile Karakaya markasını özdeşleştirerek, üretimin her aşamasında dünya standartlarında kaliteyi yakalayarak satış sonrası müşteri hizmetimizle müşteri memnuniyetini maksimum seviyeye çıkartarak müşterilerimizin yaşam tarzını farklılaştırmak.

Misyonumuz
Müşterilerimizin beklentilerine kalite ve istikrarla cevap vermek, insan sağlığına uygun, kaliteli, konforlu ürünler ile ve satış sonrası hizmeti ile tam bir müşteri memnuniyeti sağlamak.

Name: VALDI
Description:
Elite Montessori Children’s Furniture - Valdi

Based in Almaty, Kazakhstan, Valdi creates high-quality, eco-friendly Montessori furniture designed to nurture creativity, independence, and exploration in children. Every piece is crafted with natural materials, ensuring both safety and durability, aligning with Montessori principles of child-centered learning.

We believe that children deserve environments that inspire their growth. That’s why our furniture is thoughtfully designed to be accessible, practical, and aesthetically pleasing - supporting both parents and educators in creating spaces where children can thrive.

At Valdi, we are passionate about helping parents raise confident, independent children. Whether you’re a parent, teacher, or wholesaler, we offer customizable solutions tailored to your unique needs.

Let us be part of your child’s learning journey.

Name: Aqualocker
Description:
AquaLocker designs and manufactures hygienic, moisture-resistant locker systems for high-traffic, high-humidity environments. Our solutions are ideal for fitness clubs, beach resorts, cleanrooms, and production facilities where durability, hygiene, and user comfort matter most.

Our products are made with aviation-grade composite materials, tested in extreme temperatures and humidity, and built to last for over 15 years. With integrated digital and mechanical access systems, AquaLocker helps partners modernize changing rooms, reduce maintenance, and ensure a better user experience.

Launched in 2018, AquaLocker has successfully delivered projects across Russia, Belarus, and the CIS. We are now actively entering the Middle East and Southeast Asia and looking for distribution and fit-out partners in hospitality, wellness, and industrial sectors.

Name: La Fabrique de Mathieu
Description:

Adaptation parfaite à votre espace : Angles, sous-pentes, murs irréguliers, petits volumes… Nous créons des solutions intelligentes, même dans les espaces complexes ou atypiques (entrée, placard sous escalier…)

Rangements fonctionnels : Vous décidez de tout : dimensions, étagères, penderies, tiroirs… Résultat : un aménagement pratique, organisé et agréable à vivre au quotidien (dressing, placard, entrée…)

Esthétique sur-mesure : Moderne, naturel, minimaliste… Nous vous guidons dans le choix des matériaux et finitions pour un rendu harmonieux (bibliothèque, claustra, verrière, meuble TV…)

Un projet conçu, fabriqué et installé par nos soins : De la première rencontre à l’installation finale, nous suivons personnellement votre projet, dans une relation de proximité (bureau, ouvrage atypique…)

Name: Livlo
Description:
Livlo to firma zajmująca się produkcją mebli w stylu minimalistycznym oraz skandynawskim. Tworzymy meble dla osób, które stawiają na jakoś wykonania oraz unikatowy wygląd. 

Wychodząc na przeciw oczekiwaniom naszych klientów oraz marek, z którymi współpracujemy, staramy się dostosować mebel do indywidualnych potrzeb, dlatego każdy z mebli na naszym sklepie możemy poddać dowolnym modyfikacjom. W pracy z klientami cechuje nas elastyczność ponieważ chcemy aby każdy odbiorca otrzymał mebel, który spełni jego wszelkie oczekiwania. 

Posiadamy bogatą gamę produktów takich jak regały na książki, biurka do biura czy szafki pod telewizor, ale zajmujemy się także produkcją mebli na zamówienie specjalne. 

Chętnie współpracujemy z architektami, którzy w swoich projektach nie idą na kompromisy i stawiają jako główny cel jakoś i dokładność odwzorowania projektu w rzeczywistości.

Name: DDFHome - Mieszkaj. My zadbamy o resztę.
Hugel Kitchens
Description:
Hugel Kitchens is a family-owned kitchen manufacturer based in Yeadon, Leeds, with over 25 years of experience in the industry. They specialize in designing, manufacturing, and installing bespoke kitchens tailored to individual client needs. Their in-house production facility allows them to create custom-made kitchens, ensuring high quality and attention to detail.

Key Services:

Kitchen Design: Experienced designers work to maximize kitchen spaces, creating layouts that fit both large and small areas.

Manufacturing: Operating their own factory enables the production of custom kitchens, as opposed to mass-produced units.

Installation: Offers various installation services for kitchen units, appliances, and worktops, including managing building modifications to achieve the desired kitchen design.

Their showroom, located at 5 Moorfield Road, Yeadon, Leeds, LS19 7BN, displays a range of designs from modern to traditional. Visitors can explore various cabinets, doors, worktops, and handles, and consult with experienced staff for personalized advice.

Hugel Kitchens also provides a DIY kitchen solution, manufacturing and supplying kitchens based on customer designs for those who prefer to handle installation themselves. They offer free, no-obligation design consultations to assist clients in creating a kitchen that suits their style and needs.

For more information or to schedule a consultation, contact Hugel Kitchens at 0113 250 6767 or via email at info@hugelkitchens.co.uk.

Description:
